<!DOCTYPE html>
<!-- Build: 2026-05-27 13:14:24 -->
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>PickFlow 6021</title>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/xlsx/0.18.5/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jspdf/2.5.1/jspdf.umd.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jspdf-autotable/3.5.31/jspdf.plugin.autotable.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/xlsx/0.18.5/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
  <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/9.23.0/firebase-app-compat.js"></script>
<script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/9.23.0/firebase-database-compat.js"></script>
<style>
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
:root {
  --bg: #f4f6fa; --surface: #ffffff; --surface2: #eef1f8;
  --border: #d0d7e8; --accent: #1a5276; --accent2: #1a7a4a;
  --text: #1a1f36; --text2: #5a6484; --danger: #c0392b;
  --warning: #d97706; --success: #1a7a4a;
  --font: 'Courier New', monospace;
}
body { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font); min-height: 100vh; }

/* LOGIN */
.login-screen { position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:var(--bg);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:9999; }
.login-box { background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:40px;width:420px;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
.login-logo { font-size:24px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:4px; }
.login-logo span { color:var(--accent2); }
.login-sub { font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:8px; }
.login-loc { font-size:13px;color:var(--accent2);font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:28px;letter-spacing:1px; }
.user-btn { width:100%;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text);cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);font-size:12px;transition:all 0.15s;text-align:left;margin-bottom:6px; }
.user-btn:hover { border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent); }
.user-btn.selected { border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(26,82,118,0.1);color:var(--accent); }

/* HEADER */
.header { background:var(--surface);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:12px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between; }
.logo { font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--accent); }
.logo span { color:var(--accent2); }
.logo-loc { font-size:10px;color:var(--accent2);letter-spacing:2px;margin-left:8px;border:1px solid var(--accent2);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px; }
.status-bar { display:flex;gap:12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);align-items:center; }
.status-dot { display:inline-block;width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--success);margin-right:4px;animation:pulse 2s infinite; }
@keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.4} }
.sync-indicator { font-size:11px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:3px; }
.sync-ok { color:var(--accent2); }
.sync-pending { color:var(--warning); }
.sync-err { color:var(--danger); }

/* LAYOUT */
.main { display:grid;grid-template-columns:260px 1fr;height:calc(100vh - 53px); }
.sidebar { background:var(--surface);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden; }
.sidebar-top { padding:10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center; }
.sidebar-user { font-size:12px;color:var(--accent);font-weight:bold; }
.sidebar-tabs { display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }
.sidebar-tab { flex:1;padding:8px;background:transparent;border:none;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px; }
.sidebar-tab.active { border-bottom-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);background:rgba(26,82,118,0.05); }
.sidebar-actions { padding:10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }
.ticket-list { flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:8px; }

/* BUTTONS */
.btn { padding:7px 12px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text);cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all 0.15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;justify-content:center; }
.btn:hover { border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent); }
.btn-primary { background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);color:white;font-weight:bold; }
.btn-primary:hover { background:#154360;color:white; }
.btn-success { background:var(--accent2);border-color:var(--accent2);color:white;font-weight:bold; }
.btn-danger { border-color:var(--danger);color:var(--danger); }
.btn-danger:hover { background:var(--danger);color:white; }
.btn-sm { padding:4px 10px;font-size:11px; }
.btn:disabled { opacity:0.4;cursor:not-allowed; }

/* CONTENT */
.content { overflow-y:auto;padding:20px; }
.panel { max-width:1400px;margin:0 auto; }

/* CARDS */
.stats-grid { display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px; }
.stat-card { background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:14px; }
.stat-label { font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px; }
.stat-value { font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent); }
.stat-value.green { color:var(--accent2); }
.stat-value.orange { color:var(--warning); }

.section-title { font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }

/* TICKET */
.ticket-card { background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s; }
.ticket-card:hover { border-color:var(--accent); }
.ticket-card.active { border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(26,82,118,0.03); }
.ticket-id { font-size:13px;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:bold; }

/* TICKET HEADER */
.ticket-header { background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:16px;overflow:hidden; }
.ticket-header-body { padding:16px 20px; }
.ticket-toolbar { display:flex;gap:8px;padding:10px 20px;background:var(--surface2);border-top:1px solid var(--border);flex-wrap:wrap; }

/* TABLE */
.data-table { width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px; }
.data-table th { padding:8px 10px;text-align:left;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text2);border-bottom:2px solid var(--border);font-weight:bold;white-space:nowrap; }
.data-table td { padding:7px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(208,215,232,0.5);vertical-align:middle; }
.data-table tr:hover td { background:rgba(26,82,118,0.03); }
.data-table tr.dmg-row td { background:rgba(192,57,43,0.05); }
.data-table tr.totals-row td { font-weight:bold;background:#f0f0f0;border-top:2px solid var(--border); }

/* FORM */
.form-grid { display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px; }
.form-group { display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px; }
.form-group label { font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:bold; }
.form-group input, .form-group select { background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:12px;outline:none;transition:border-color 0.15s; }
.form-group input:focus, .form-group select:focus { border-color:var(--accent); }

/* MODAL */
.modal-overlay { position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:1000; }
.modal { background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:24px;width:560px;max-width:95vw;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto; }
.modal h2 { font-size:14px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:20px;color:var(--accent); }
.modal-actions { display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:20px; }

/* ALERTS */
.alert { padding:10px 14px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:12px; }
.alert-info { background:#1a5276;border:2px solid #154360;color:#ffffff; }
.alert-success { background:#1a7a4a;border:2px solid #145a34;color:#ffffff; }
.alert-warning { background:#d97706;border:2px solid #b45309;color:#ffffff; }
.alert-danger { background:#c0392b;border:2px solid #922b21;color:#ffffff; }

.empty-state { text-align:center;padding:60px 20px;color:var(--text2); }
.empty-state .icon { font-size:48px;margin-bottom:16px; }

/* ARCHIVE */
.archive-item { padding:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:6px;cursor:pointer;opacity:0.8; }
.archive-item:hover { border-color:var(--text2); }
.archive-date-hdr { font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px;padding:8px 4px 4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:6px; }

/* ROLL ENTRY */
.roll-entry { background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:8px; }

::-webkit-scrollbar { width:4px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background:var(--surface); }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:var(--border);border-radius:2px; }

@media print {
  .header,.sidebar,.ticket-toolbar,.modal-overlay { display:none!important; }
  .main { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  body { background:white; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- LOGIN -->
<div id="login-screen" class="login-screen">
  <div class="login-box">
    <div style="margin-bottom:12px">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Piper Warehouse" style="width:220px;height:auto;display:block;margin:0 auto 8px auto;">
    </div>
    <div class="login-sub">WAREHOUSE MANAGEMENT</div>
    <div class="login-loc">📍 LOCATION 6021 — GREENSBORO</div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:12px;letter-spacing:1px">SELECT USER</div>
    <div id="user-list-regular">
      <!-- populated by JS -->
    </div>
    <div id="pwd-section" style="display:none;margin:12px 0">
      <input type="password" id="pwd-input" placeholder="Enter password"
        style="width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:12px;outline:none;text-align:center"
        onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doLogin()">
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="doLogin()" id="login-btn" disabled style="width:100%;margin-top:8px">Sign In →</button>
    <div id="login-error" style="color:var(--danger);font-size:11px;margin-top:8px;display:none">Incorrect password</div>
    <div style="margin-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:10px">
      <span id="admin-login-link" onclick="toggleAdminLogin()" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:1px;user-select:none">&#9679;&#9679;&#9679; ADMIN</span>
    </div>
    <div id="admin-login-section" style="display:none;margin-top:8px">
      <div id="user-list-admin"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MAIN APP -->
<div id="main-app" style="display:none">
  <div class="header">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Piper Warehouse" style="height:auto;width:220px;display:block;">
    </div>
    <div class="status-bar">
      <span id="data-status"><span class="status-dot" style="background:var(--danger)"></span>NO DATA</span>
      <span id="sync-status" class="sync-indicator sync-pending">⟳ CONNECTING...</span>
      <span id="current-time"></span>
      <button onclick="showDashboard()" title="Home" style="padding:3px 10px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;line-height:1">🏠</button>
      <button onclick="location.reload(true)" style="padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1px">↻ REFRESH</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="main">
    <div class="sidebar">
      <div class="sidebar-top">
        <span class="sidebar-user" id="user-display">—</span>
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="logout()">Sign Out</button>
      </div>
      <div class="sidebar-tabs">
        <button class="sidebar-tab active" id="tab-open" onclick="switchSidebarTab('open')">OPEN</button>
        <button class="sidebar-tab" id="tab-archive" onclick="switchSidebarTab('archive')">ARCHIVE</button>
      </div>
      <div class="sidebar-actions">
        <button class="btn btn-primary" id="import-btn" onclick="showImport()">⬆ Import Data</button>
        <button class="btn btn-success" id="new-ticket-btn" onclick="showNewTicket()" disabled>+ New Pick Ticket</button>
        <button class="btn" id="preview-btn" onclick="showDataPreview()" disabled style="font-size:11px">🔍 Preview Data</button>
        <button class="btn" id="tons-btn" onclick="showInventorySummary()" disabled style="font-size:11px;background:var(--surface2);border-color:var(--border)">📦 Customer Ton View</button>
        <button class="btn" id="cc-btn" onclick="showCycleCountStart()" disabled style="font-size:11px;background:var(--surface2);border-color:var(--border)">🔢 Cycle Counts</button>
        <button class="btn" id="edi-btn" onclick="showEDIImportFile()" disabled style="font-size:11px;background:var(--surface2);border-color:var(--border)">📄 EDI Import File</button>
        <button class="btn" id="putaway-btn" onclick="showPendingPutAway()" disabled style="font-size:11px;background:var(--surface2);border-color:var(--border)">📥 Pending Put Away</button>
        <button class="btn" id="lastputaway-btn" onclick="showLastPutAway()" disabled style="font-size:11px;background:var(--surface2);border-color:var(--border)">📋 Last Put Away</button>
        <button class="btn" id="archive-settings-btn" onclick="showArchiveSettings()" style="font-size:11px;display:none">📁 Archive Settings</button>
        <button class="btn" id="manage-users-btn" onclick="showUserManagement()" style="font-size:11px;display:none">👥 Manage Users</button>
      </div>
      <div class="ticket-list" id="ticket-list">
        <div style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;">No tickets yet</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="content">
      <div class="panel" id="main-panel">
        <div class="empty-state">
          <div class="icon">🗂</div>
          <div style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:8px">WELCOME TO PICKFLOW 6021</div>
          <div style="font-size:12px">Import inventory files and DIR report to get started.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="modal-container"></div>
<input type="file" id="file-input" accept=".xlsx,.xls,.xlsb" style="display:none" multiple onchange="handleFileImport(event)">

<script>
// ─── CONSTANTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// BU_MAP: key = LEFT(3) of Product ID2 (uppercase), value = display name
const BU_MAP = {
  'COV': 'COVINGTON XDK', 'DAR': 'CBM', 'HBH': 'HBH', 'LAN': 'LANET',
  'MPS': 'HBH', 'NOR': 'NORCROSS XDK', 'PIP': 'CBM', 'SCI': 'SCI GAMES',
  'VAL': 'LANET', 'WES': 'CONWAY', 'WHS': 'CBM',
  '189': 'TWIN RIVERS', 'RMD': 'TWIN RIVERS', '190': 'TWIN RIVERS',
  'W60': 'TWIN RIVERS', '192': 'TWIN RIVERS', '193': 'TWIN RIVERS', '194': 'TWIN RIVERS',
  '036': 'IP', '205': 'IP', '650': 'IP', '305': 'IP', '085': 'IP',
  '065': 'IP', '295': 'IP', '025': 'IP', '385': 'IP', '365': 'IP',
  '970': 'IPG - ITAPE', '264': 'IPG - ITAPE',
  '315': 'CATALYST XDK', '394': 'CATALYST', '298': 'CATALYST', '04-': 'CATALYST',
  '724': 'CATALYST', '726': 'CATALYST', '727': 'CATALYST', '730': 'CATALYST',
  'IPG': 'CATALYST', '732': 'CATALYST', '400': 'CATALYST', '402': 'CATALYST',
  '821': 'CATALYST', '450': 'CATALYST', '403': 'CATALYST',
  '401': 'CATALYST',
  '729': 'CATALYST',
  '312': 'CATALYST',
  'ATL': 'ATL UPM',
};

const BU_SEQ_DEFAULT = {
  'COV':'FIFO','DAR':'FIFO','HBH':'FEFO','LAN':'FEFO','MPS':'FEFO',
  'NOR':'FIFO','PIP':'FIFO','SCI':'FEFO','VAL':'FEFO','WES':'FEFO','WHS':'FIFO',
  '189':'FIFO','RMD':'FIFO','190':'FIFO','W60':'FIFO','192':'FIFO','193':'FIFO','194':'FIFO',
  '036':'FIFO','205':'FIFO','650':'FIFO','305':'FIFO','085':'FIFO','065':'FIFO',
  '295':'FIFO','025':'FIFO','385':'FIFO','365':'FIFO',
  '970':'FIFO','264':'FIFO',
  '315':'FIFO','394':'FIFO','298':'FIFO','04-':'FIFO','724':'FIFO','726':'FIFO',
  '727':'FIFO','730':'FIFO','IPG':'FIFO','732':'FIFO','400':'FIFO','402':'FIFO',
  '821':'FIFO','450':'FIFO','403':'FIFO','401':'FIFO','729':'FIFO','312':'FIFO',
  'ATL':'FIFO',
};

const BU_ZMO_DEFAULT = {
  'COV':true,'HBH':true,'LAN':true,'MPS':true,'SCI':true,'VAL':true,'WES':true,
};

function resolveBU(rawBU) {
  if (!rawBU) return '';
  const key = rawBU.toString().trim().substring(0,3).toUpperCase(); // case-insensitive lookup
  // Firebase map keys are stored uppercase; BU_MAP keys are uppercase
  const firebaseMap = (state.buMap && Object.keys(state.buMap).length) ? state.buMap : {};
  // Return display name exactly as defined in the map (case preserved)
  return firebaseMap[key] || BU_MAP[key] || key;
}

// Re-resolve all BU values in inventory (called after buMap loads from Firebase)
function cleanupBUs() {
  // Re-resolve ALL inventory BU values from buRaw to correct display name
  const customerNames = new Set(state.inventory.map(r=>r.customer).filter(Boolean));
  let fixed = 0;
  state.inventory.forEach(r => {
    // Derive buRaw if missing
    if (!r.buRaw && r.bu && r.bu.length >= 3) {
      r.buRaw = r.bu.substring(0,3).toUpperCase();
    }
    if (r.buRaw) {
      const correct = resolveBU(r.buRaw);
      if (correct && correct !== r.bu) {
        r.bu = correct;
        fixed++;
      }
    }
  });
  if (fixed > 0) console.log('cleanupBUs: fixed ' + fixed + ' BU display names');
}

function reResolveBUs() {
  state.inventory.forEach(r => {
    if (r.buRaw) r.bu = resolveBU(r.buRaw, r.customer);
  });
}

const GHOST_LOCATION = '23-GHOST-00';
const CYCLE_COUNT_PATTERN = 'CYC_CNT'; // locations containing CYC_CNT are Cycle Count
const FIFO_ACCOUNTS = ['COVINGTON XDK','CBM','NORCROSS XDK','BLANK'];
const FEFO_ACCOUNTS = ['SCI GAMES','HBH','CONWAY','LANET'];

const USERS = [
  { id:'Ocontreras', name:'Omar Contreras', password:null, role:'admin' },
];

const FB_CONFIG = { databaseURL: "https://pickflow-3b80d-default-rtdb.firebaseio.com" };
let db = null;
let eodTimer = null;

// ─── STATE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let state = {
  currentUser: null,
  users: [],          // loaded from Firebase, falls back to USERS seed
  inventory: [],      // all rolls from all customer files
  dirData: {},        // keyed by Batch/Lot# → { zmo, expDate, soDoc, customerPO }
  tickets: [],
  archivedTickets: [],
  activeTicket: null,
  sidebarTab: 'open',
  eodTime: '17:00',
  eodEnabled: false,
  dataLoaded: false,
  currentView: 'dashboard', // tracks active screen to prevent unwanted re-renders
  buMap: {},
  lastDirImport: null,
  buSeqMap: {},
  buZmoMap: {},
  importMode: 'inventory',
  lastImport: null
};

let selectedUserId = null;

// ─── CLOCK ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function updateClock() {
  const now = new Date();
  const eastern = new Date(now.toLocaleString('en-US',{timeZone:'America/New_York'}));
  const jan = new Date(eastern.getFullYear(),0,1).getTimezoneOffset();
  const jul = new Date(eastern.getFullYear(),6,1).getTimezoneOffset();
  const tz = now.getTimezoneOffset() < Math.max(jan,jul) ? 'EDT' : 'EST';
  const d = eastern.toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit',year:'numeric'});
  const t = eastern.toLocaleTimeString('en-US',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
  document.getElementById('current-time').textContent = d + ' ' + t + ' ' + tz;
}
setInterval(updateClock,1000); updateClock();

// ─── FIREBASE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function initFirebase() {
  try {
    if (typeof firebase === 'undefined') { setSyncStatus('connecting'); return false; }
    if (!firebase.apps.length) firebase.initializeApp(FB_CONFIG);
    db = firebase.database();
    return true;
  } catch(e) { setSyncStatus('connecting'); return false; }
}

function setSyncStatus(s) {
  const el = document.getElementById('sync-status');
  if (!el) return;
  if (s==='ok') { el.className='sync-indicator sync-ok'; el.textContent='● SYNCED'; }
  else if (s==='err') { el.className='sync-indicator sync-err'; el.textContent='✕ ERROR'; }
  else { el.className='sync-indicator sync-pending'; el.textContent='⟳ SYNCING...'; }
}

function listenToFirebase() {
  if (!initFirebase()) { setTimeout(listenToFirebase,2000); return; }
  setSyncStatus('connecting');

  // Tickets
  db.ref('6021/tickets').on('value', snap => {
    const data = snap.val()||{};
    const incoming = Object.values(data);
    const remoteIds = new Set(incoming.map(t=>t.id));
    incoming.forEach(t => {
      const idx = state.tickets.findIndex(lt=>lt.id===t.id);
      if (idx>=0) state.tickets[idx]=t; else state.tickets.push(t);
    });
    state.tickets = state.tickets.filter(t=>remoteIds.has(t.id));
    state.tickets.sort((a,b)=>a.created-b.created);
    updateTicketList();
    // Only re-render ticket screens — never jump away from other views
    if (state.activeTicket) {
      const still = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===state.activeTicket);
      if (still) {
        // Quietly refresh the active ticket without a full re-render
        // (viewTicket would jump the screen; just update the sidebar list)
      } else {
        // Active ticket was deleted — go to dashboard
        state.activeTicket = null;
        showDashboard();
      }
    }
    // Do NOT call showDashboard() here — let the user stay on whatever screen they're on
    setSyncStatus('ok');
  }, ()=>setSyncStatus('err'));

  // Archive
  db.ref('6021/archive').on('value', snap => {
    const data = snap.val();
    if (data && Array.isArray(data)) {
      state.archivedTickets = data;
      if (state.sidebarTab==='archive') renderArchiveList();
    }
  });

  // Settings
  db.ref('6021/settings').on('value', snap => {
    const data = snap.val();
    if (!data) return;
    if (data.userSettings) {
      (state.users.length?state.users:USERS).forEach(u => {
        if (data.userSettings[u.id]) {
          u.role = data.userSettings[u.id].role||u.role;
          const pwd = data.userSettings[u.id].password;
          u.password = (pwd==='__none__'||pwd===null||pwd===undefined) ? null : pwd;
        }
      });
    }
    if (data.eodTime) state.eodTime = data.eodTime;
    if (data.eodEnabled!==undefined) state.eodEnabled = data.eodEnabled;
  });

  // Last import timestamp
  db.ref('6021/lastDirImport').on('value', snap => {
    const ts = snap.val();
    if (ts) state.lastDirImport = ts;
  });

  // Users — load from Firebase, seed defaults if empty
  db.ref('6021/users').on('value', snap => {
    const data = snap.val();
    if (data && Object.keys(data).length) {
      state.users = Object.entries(data).map(([id,u])=>({id,...u}));


    } else {
      // Seed defaults on first run
      state.users = USERS.map(u=>({...u}));
      const seed = {};
      state.users.forEach(u=>{ seed[u.id]={name:u.name,password:u.password,role:u.role}; });
      db.ref('6021/users').set(seed).catch(()=>{});
    }
    buildLoginScreen();
  });

  db.ref('6021/buMap').on('value', snap => {
    const data = snap.val();
    if (data && Object.keys(data).length) {
      state.buMap = data;
      if (state.inventory.length) {
        reResolveBUs();
        // Persist corrected BU values back to Firebase so all users benefit
        const compact = state.inventory.map(r=>({
          ...r,
          dateRecd: r.dateRecd ? r.dateRecd.getTime() : null,
          expDate: r.expDate ? r.expDate.getTime() : null,
          dirExpDate: r.dirExpDate ? r.dirExpDate.getTime() : null,
        }));
        db.ref('6021/inventory').set(compact).catch(()=>{});
      }
    }
  });
  db.ref('6021/buSeqMap').on('value', snap => {
    const data = snap.val();
    if (data) state.buSeqMap = data;
  });
  db.ref('6021/buZmoMap').on('value', snap => {
    const data = snap.val();
    if (data) state.buZmoMap = data;
  });

  // cycleCount6021 connection loaded on demand
  db.ref('6021/lastImport').on('value', snap => {
    const ts = snap.val();
    if (ts) { state.lastImport = ts; updateImportStamp(); }
  });

  // Inventory from Firebase
  db.ref('6021/inventory').on('value', snap => {
    const data = snap.val();
    if (data && Array.isArray(data) && data.length>0) {
      state.inventory = data.map(r=>({
        ...r,
        dateRecd: r.dateRecd ? new Date(r.dateRecd) : null,
        expDate: r.expDate ? new Date(r.expDate) : null,
        dirExpDate: r.dirExpDate ? new Date(r.dirExpDate) : null,
      }));
      // Re-resolve BU display names using current buMap (fixes stale Firebase values)
      if (state.buMap && Object.keys(state.buMap).length) reResolveBUs();
      if (!state.dataLoaded) {
        // First load only — enable UI and show dashboard
        state.dataLoaded = true;
        enableAppButtons();
        updateImportStamp();
        if (state.currentUser) showDashboard();
        // Auto-snapshot today's tons if not yet saved today
        const todayKey = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
        if (db) db.ref('6021/tonSnapshots/'+todayKey).once('value', snap => {
          if (!snap.val()) setTimeout(() => saveTonSnapshot(true), 2000);
        });
      } else {
        // Subsequent silent updates — just refresh state, don't jump screens
        updateImportStamp();
      }
    }
  });

  // DIR data
  db.ref('6021/dirData').on('value', snap => {
    const data = snap.val();
    if (data) {
      // Normalize — ensure zmo field is always soDoc+'-'+soItem for ZMO doc types
      Object.values(data).forEach(d => {
        if (!d.zmo && d.soDoc) {
          d.zmo = d.soDoc.toString().trim() + (d.soItem ? '-' + d.soItem.toString().trim() : '');
        }
      });
      state.dirData = data;
    }
  });
}

function saveTickets() {
  if (!db) return;
  setSyncStatus('pending');
  const data = {};
  state.tickets.forEach(t=>{ data[t.id]=t; });
  db.ref('6021/tickets').set(data).then(()=>setSyncStatus('ok')).catch(()=>setSyncStatus('err'));
}

function saveArchive() {
  if (!db) return;
  db.ref('6021/archive').set(state.archivedTickets).catch(e=>console.error(e));
}

function saveSettings() {
  if (!db) return;
  const userSettings = {};
  (state.users.length?state.users:USERS).forEach(u=>{ userSettings[u.id]={ role:u.role, password:u.password!==null?u.password:'__none__' }; });
  db.ref('6021/settings').set({ userSettings, eodTime:state.eodTime, eodEnabled:state.eodEnabled }).catch(e=>console.error(e));
}

function updateImportStamp() {
  const el = document.getElementById('data-status');
  if (!el || !state.inventory.length) return;
  const ts = state.lastImport ? new Date(state.lastImport) : null;
  const tsStr = ts ? ' | Last Import: '+ts.toLocaleDateString('en-US')+' '+ts.toLocaleTimeString('en-US',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}) : '';
  el.innerHTML = '<span class="status-dot"></span>LOADED: '+state.inventory.length.toLocaleString()+' ROLLS'+tsStr;
}

function enableAppButtons() {
  const nb = document.getElementById('new-ticket-btn');
  const pb = document.getElementById('preview-btn');
  const tb = document.getElementById('tons-btn');
  const ccb = document.getElementById('cc-btn');
  if (ccb) ccb.disabled = false;
  const edib = document.getElementById('edi-btn');
  if (edib) edib.disabled = false;
  const pab = document.getElementById('putaway-btn');
  const lpb = document.getElementById('lastputaway-btn');
  if (nb) nb.disabled = false;
  if (pb) pb.disabled = false;
  if (tb) tb.disabled = false;
  if (pab) pab.disabled = false;
  if (lpb) lpb.disabled = false;
}

// ─── AUTH ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleUserBtn(btn) {
  const uid = btn.getAttribute('data-uid');
  selectUser(btn, uid);
}

function buildLoginScreen() {
  const list = document.getElementById('user-list-regular');
  const adminList = document.getElementById('user-list-admin');
  if (!list) return;
  const users = state.users.length ? state.users : USERS;
  let regularHtml = '', adminHtml = '';
  users.forEach(u => {
    const bg = u.role==='admin' ? 'rgba(217,119,6,0.15)' : 'rgba(26,122,74,0.15)';
    const col = u.role==='admin' ? 'var(--warning)' : 'var(--accent2)';
    const btn = '<button class="user-btn" data-uid="' + u.id + '" onclick="handleUserBtn(this)">' +
      u.name +
      '<span style="float:right;font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;background:' + bg + ';color:' + col + '">' + u.role.toUpperCase() + '</span>' +
      '</button>';
    // Only hide Omar's specific ID behind the admin link
    if (u.id === 'Ocontreras') adminHtml += btn;
    else regularHtml += btn;
  });
  list.innerHTML = regularHtml || '<div style="color:var(--text2);font-size:12px;padding:8px">No regular users yet.</div>';
  if (adminList) adminList.innerHTML = adminHtml;
}

function toggleAdminLogin() {
  const sec = document.getElementById('admin-login-section');
  const lnk = document.getElementById('admin-login-link');
  if (!sec) return;
  const visible = sec.style.display !== 'none';
  sec.style.display = visible ? 'none' : 'block';
  lnk.style.color = visible ? 'var(--text2)' : 'var(--accent)';
}

function selectUser(btn, userId) {
  selectedUserId = userId;
  document.querySelectorAll('.user-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('selected'));
  btn.classList.add('selected');
  const user = (state.users.length?state.users:USERS).find(u=>u.id===userId);
  const pwdSection = document.getElementById('pwd-section');
  document.getElementById('login-error').style.display='none';
  if (user.id === 'Ocontreras') {
    // Master admin — show password field but allow entry with or without password
    pwdSection.style.display = user.password ? 'block' : 'none';
    document.getElementById('pwd-input').value='';
    if (user.password) document.getElementById('pwd-input').focus();
    document.getElementById('login-btn').disabled = false;
    pwdSection.querySelector && pwdSection.querySelector('input') && (pwdSection.querySelector('input').placeholder = 'Password (or leave blank to reset)');
  } else if (user.password===null) {
    pwdSection.style.display='none'; document.getElementById('login-btn').disabled=false;
  } else {
    pwdSection.style.display='block'; document.getElementById('pwd-input').value=''; document.getElementById('pwd-input').focus(); document.getElementById('login-btn').disabled=false;
  }
}

function doLogin() {
  if (!selectedUserId) return;
  const user = (state.users.length?state.users:USERS).find(u=>u.id===selectedUserId);
  if (!user) return;
  if (user.id === 'Ocontreras') {
    // Master admin: correct password grants normal access; blank clears the password
    const entered = document.getElementById('pwd-input').value;
    if (user.password !== null && entered === '') {
      // Blank entered — clear password in Firebase so next login is passwordless
      db.ref('6021/users/Ocontreras/password').set(null).catch(()=>{});
      user.password = null;
    } else if (user.password !== null && entered !== user.password) {
      document.getElementById('login-error').style.display='block';
      document.getElementById('login-error').textContent = 'Incorrect password. Leave blank to clear it.';
      document.getElementById('pwd-input').value=''; return;
    }
  } else if (user.password!==null) {
    const entered = document.getElementById('pwd-input').value;
    if (entered!==user.password) { document.getElementById('login-error').style.display='block'; document.getElementById('pwd-input').value=''; return; }
  }
  state.currentUser = user;
  document.getElementById('login-screen').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('main-app').style.display='grid';
  document.getElementById('user-display').textContent = user.name.split(' ')[0].toUpperCase();
  // Import available to all users; archive settings + manage users = admin only
  document.getElementById('import-btn').style.display='flex';
  // Archive Settings available to all users; Manage Users = admin only
  document.getElementById('archive-settings-btn').style.display='flex';
  if (user.role==='admin') { document.getElementById('manage-users-btn').style.display='flex'; }
  else { document.getElementById('manage-users-btn').style.display='none'; }
  if (state.dataLoaded) showDashboard();
  setupEodTimer();
}

function logout() {
  state.currentUser=null; selectedUserId=null;
  document.querySelectorAll('.user-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('selected'));
  document.getElementById('pwd-section').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('login-btn').disabled=true;
  document.getElementById('login-error').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('login-screen').style.display='flex';
  document.getElementById('main-app').style.display='none';
  if (eodTimer) clearInterval(eodTimer);
}

function isAdmin() { return state.currentUser&&state.currentUser.role==='admin'; }

// ─── IMPORT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function showImport() {
  const invCount = state.inventory.length;
  const dirCount = Object.keys(state.dirData).length;
  document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()">
      <div class="modal">
        <h2>⬆ IMPORT DATA</h2>
        ${invCount ? `<div class="alert alert-success">✓ Inventory: ${invCount.toLocaleString()} rolls loaded. DIR: ${dirCount} records.</div>` : ''}
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px">
          <label style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;cursor:pointer;padding:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px">
            <input type="radio" name="itype" value="inventory" ${invCount?'checked':''} style="margin-top:2px">
            <div><div style="font-weight:bold">Customer Inventory File</div><div style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px">Import one customer file at a time — replaces existing rolls for that customer</div></div>
          </label>
          <label style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;cursor:pointer;padding:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px">
            <input type="radio" name="itype" value="dir" ${!invCount?'checked':''} style="margin-top:2px">
            <div><div style="font-weight:bold">DIR Report</div><div style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px">Import DIR file to link ZMO, expiration dates by Lot #</div></div>
          </label>
          ${isAdmin() ? `
          <label style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;cursor:pointer;padding:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px">
            <input type="radio" name="itype" value="bumap" style="margin-top:2px">
            <div><div style="font-weight:bold">BU Reference Guide</div><div style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px">Import BU code → name mapping file (Col 1: code, Col 2: name) — Admin only</div></div>
          </label>
          <label style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;cursor:pointer;padding:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px">
            <input type="radio" name="itype" value="clear" style="margin-top:2px">
            <div><div style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--danger)">Clear All Inventory</div><div style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px">Remove all inventory and start fresh (keeps tickets) — Admin only</div></div>
          </label>` : ''}
        </div>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="triggerImport()" style="width:100%">Choose File →</button>
        <div class="modal-actions"><button class="btn" onclick="closeModal()">Cancel</button></div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
}

function triggerImport() {
  state.importMode = document.querySelector('input[name="itype"]:checked').value;
  if ((state.importMode==='bumap' || state.importMode==='clear') && !isAdmin()) {
    showAlert('Only admins can perform this action.','warning'); return;
  }
  if (state.importMode==='bumap') {
    closeModal();
    document.getElementById('file-input').click();
    return;
  }
  if (state.importMode==='clear') {
    if (!confirm('Clear all inventory data? Tickets will be kept.')) return;
    state.inventory = [];
    db.ref('6021/inventory').set([]).catch(()=>{});
    closeModal();
    showAlert('Inventory cleared.','success');
    showDashboard();
    return;
  }
  // Inventory import supports multiple files; DIR/BU are single-file only
  document.getElementById('file-input').multiple = (state.importMode === 'inventory');
  closeModal();
  document.getElementById('file-input').click();
}

function handleFileImport(e) {
  const files = Array.from(e.target.files||[]);
  if (!files.length) return;
  e.target.value = '';

  // Single-file modes
  if (state.importMode === 'dir' || state.importMode === 'bumap') {
    const file = files[0];
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function(ev) {
      try {
        const wb = XLSX.read(ev.target.result,{type:'binary',cellDates:true});
        if (state.importMode==='dir') importDIR(wb);
        else importBUMap(wb);
      } catch(err) { showAlert('Import failed: '+err.message,'danger'); }
    };
    reader.readAsBinaryString(file);
    return;
  }

  // Inventory — process multiple files sequentially
  let idx = 0;
  const results = [];
  function processNext() {
    if (idx >= files.length) {
      // All done — show summary
      const total = results.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.added,0);
      const customers = results.map(r=>r.customer).filter(Boolean).join(', ');
      showAlert('✓ Imported '+files.length+' file'+(files.length>1?'s':'')+': '+total+' rolls. Customers: '+customers,'success');
      // Save final inventory to Firebase
      const compact = state.inventory.map(r=>({
        ...r,
        dateRecd: r.dateRecd ? r.dateRecd.getTime() : null,
        expDate: r.expDate ? r.expDate.getTime() : null,
        dirExpDate: r.dirExpDate ? r.dirExpDate.getTime() : null,
      }));
      db.ref('6021/inventory').set(compact).catch(()=>{});
      updateImportStamp();
      showDashboard();
      return;
    }
    const file = files[idx++];
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = function(ev) {
      try {
        const wb = XLSX.read(ev.target.result,{type:'binary',cellDates:true});
        const result = importInventory(wb, file.name, true); // true = batch mode (skip Firebase save)
        results.push(result||{added:0,customer:file.name});
      } catch(err) {
        results.push({added:0,customer:file.name,error:err.message});
        showAlert('Error importing '+file.name+': '+err.message,'danger');
      }
      processNext();
    };
    reader.readAsBinaryString(file);
  }
  processNext();
}

function importBUMap(wb) {
  const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]];
  const rows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(ws,{header:1,defval:''});
  const map = {};
  const seqMap = {};  // BU code → FIFO or FEFO
  const zmoMap = {};  // BU code → true if ZMO filter applies
  rows.forEach((row,i) => {
    if (i===0) return; // skip header
    const code = (row[0]||'').toString().trim().toUpperCase().substring(0,3);
    const name = (row[1]||'').toString().trim();
    const seq = (row[2]||'').toString().trim().toUpperCase(); // FIFO or FEFO
    const zmo = (row[3]||'').toString().trim().toUpperCase(); // ZMO or empty
    if (code && name) {
      map[code] = name;
      if (seq) seqMap[code] = seq;
      if (zmo.includes('ZMO')) zmoMap[code] = true;
    }
  });
  if (!Object.keys(map).length) { showAlert('No BU mappings found in file.','warning'); return; }
  state.buMap = map;
  state.buSeqMap = seqMap;
  state.buZmoMap = zmoMap;
  if (db) {
    db.ref('6021/buMap').set(map).catch(()=>{});
    db.ref('6021/buSeqMap').set(seqMap).catch(()=>{});
    db.ref('6021/buZmoMap').set(zmoMap).catch(()=>{});
  }
  showAlert('✓ BU Reference loaded — '+Object.keys(map).length+' mappings ('+Object.keys(zmoMap).length+' ZMO-based).','success');
}

function importDIR(wb) {
  const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]];
  const allRows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(ws,{header:1,defval:'',raw:false});

  // Find header row (contains 'Batch')
  let hi = -1;
  for (let i=0;i<Math.min(15,allRows.length);i++) {
    if (allRows[i].some(c=>typeof c==='string'&&c.trim()==='Batch')) { hi=i; break; }
  }
  if (hi<0) { showAlert('Could not find Batch column in DIR file.','danger'); return; }

  const hdr = allRows[hi];
  const col = (name) => hdr.findIndex(h=>typeof h==='string'&&h.trim()===name);

  // Store column headers for EDI column picker
  window._dirColumnHeaders = hdr.map((h,i) => ({
    idx: i,
    name: (h||'').toString().trim(),
    letter: i < 26 ? String.fromCharCode(65+i) : String.fromCharCode(64+Math.floor(i/26))+String.fromCharCode(65+(i%26))
  }));
  console.log('[DIR columns]', window._dirColumnHeaders.map(c=>c.letter+':'+c.name).join(' | '));
  const batchI    = col('Batch');
  const matI      = col('Material');
  const matDescI  = col('Material Description');
  const docTypeI  = col('Doc Type');
  const soDocI    = col('SO Document');
  const soItemI   = col('SO Item');
  const custPoI   = col('Customer PO Number');
  const mfgDateI  = col('Date of Manufacture');
  const grossWtI  = col('Gross Weight');
  const nameI     = col('Name');
  const tonsI     = col('Tons');
  const widthI    = col('Width');
  const qtyMlfI   = col('Qty(MLF)');
  // Stock Category
  const stockCatI = ['Stock Cat','Stock Category','Stk Cat','StkCat','Cat','Spec. Stock'].reduce((f,n)=>f>=0?f:col(n), -1);
  // Shipment Number
  const shipmentI = ['Shipment','Shipment Number','Ship No','Ship #','Delivery','Inbound Delivery','Trans. Order','Transfer Order'].reduce((f,n)=>f>=0?f:col(n), -1);
  // Purchasing Document + Item (for PO# column in EDI)
  // Purchasing Document = Column U (index 20), PO Item = Column V (index 21)
  // Fixed column positions per DIR format; header name as fallback
  const purchDocI  = hdr.length > 20 ? 20 : ['Purchasing Document','Purch. Doc.','Purchase Order','PO Number','PO'].reduce((f,n)=>f>=0?f:col(n), -1);
  const purchItemI = hdr.length > 21 ? 21 : ['PO Item','Purch. Item','Item No.','Itm','Order Item'].reduce((f,n)=>f>=0?f:col(n), -1);
  const vehicleI   = ['Vehicle ID','Vehicle','Veh. ID','Veh ID','License Plate','Truck ID','Carrier ID','Means of Transport'].reduce((f,n)=>f>=0?f:col(n), -1);

  state.dirData = {};
  for (let i=hi+1;i<allRows.length;i++) {
    const r = allRows[i];
    const batch = (r[batchI]||'').toString().trim();
    if (!batch) continue;

    // Parse date - handle both string and date objects
    let mfgDate = '';
    if (mfgDateI>=0 && r[mfgDateI]) {
      const raw = r[mfgDateI].toString().trim();
      if (raw) mfgDate = raw;
    }

    // Parse gross weight - may have commas
    let grossWt = 0;
    if (grossWtI>=0 && r[grossWtI]) {
      grossWt = parseFloat(r[grossWtI].toString().replace(/,/g,''))||0;
    }

    const docType = docTypeI>=0 ? (r[docTypeI]||'').toString().trim() : '';
    const soDoc   = soDocI>=0   ? (r[soDocI]||'').toString().trim()   : '';
    const soItem  = soItemI>=0 ? (r[soItemI]||'').toString().trim() : '';
    // ZMO = SO Document + "-" + SO Item (only when Doc Type = ZMO)
    // ZMO = SO Document + "-" + SO Item (pad item to ensure e.g. "10" not "1")
    const soItemStr = soItem ? soItem.toString().trim() : '';
    // Build ZMO from soDoc+soItem for any docType that has a soDoc reference
    const zmo = soDoc ? soDoc + (soItemStr ? '-'+soItemStr : '') : '';

    state.dirData[batch] = {
      material:     matI>=0    ? (r[matI]||'').toString().trim()    : '',
      matDesc:      matDescI>=0? (r[matDescI]||'').toString().trim() : '',
      docType,
      soDoc,
      soItem,
      zmo,
      customerPO:   custPoI>=0 ? (r[custPoI]||'').toString().trim() : '',
      mfgDate,
      grossWt,
      tons:         tonsI>=0   ? (parseFloat(r[tonsI])||0)          : 0,
      width:        widthI>=0  ? (parseFloat(r[widthI])||0)         : 0,
      qtyMlf:       qtyMlfI>=0 ? (parseFloat(r[qtyMlfI])||0)        : 0,
      customerName: nameI>=0   ? (r[nameI]||'').toString().trim()   : '',
      stockCat:     stockCatI>=0  ? (r[stockCatI]||'').toString().trim()  : '',
      shipment:     shipmentI>=0  ? (r[shipmentI]||'').toString().trim()  : '',
      purchDoc:     purchDocI>=0  ? (r[purchDocI]||'').toString().trim()  : '',
      // Store raw values at the EDI-mapped indices for PO# column (updated via picker)
      _pd: r[window._ediPurchDocIdx  !== undefined ? window._ediPurchDocIdx  : 20] !== undefined ? (r[window._ediPurchDocIdx  !== undefined ? window._ediPurchDocIdx  : 20]||'').toString().trim() : '',
      _pi: r[window._ediPurchItemIdx !== undefined ? window._ediPurchItemIdx : 21] !== undefined ? (r[window._ediPurchItemIdx !== undefined ? window._ediPurchItemIdx : 21]||'').toString().trim() : '',
      purchItem:    purchItemI>=0 ? (r[purchItemI]||'').toString().trim() : '',
      vehicleId:    vehicleI>=0   ? (r[vehicleI]||'').toString().trim()   : '',
    };
  }

  // Re-apply DIR data to loaded inventory
  if (state.inventory.length>0) {
    state.inventory.forEach(r => {
      const dir = r.lot ? state.dirData[r.lot] : null;
      if (dir) {
        if (dir.zmo) r.zmo = dir.zmo;
        if (dir.mfgDate) r.dirExpDate = parseDate(dir.mfgDate);
        if (dir.grossWt && !r.grossWt) r.grossWt = dir.grossWt;
      }
    });
    // Re-save inventory with updated DIR data
    const compact = state.inventory.map(r=>({
      ...r,
      dateRecd: r.dateRecd?r.dateRecd.getTime():null,
      expDate: r.expDate?r.expDate.getTime():null,
      dirExpDate: r.dirExpDate?r.dirExpDate.getTime():null,
    }));
    db.ref('6021/inventory').set(compact).catch(()=>{});
  }

  if (db) {
    db.ref('6021/dirData').set(state.dirData).catch(()=>{});
    db.ref('6021/lastDirImport').set(Date.now()).catch(()=>{});
  }
  state.lastDirImport = Date.now();
  const zmoCount = Object.values(state.dirData).filter(d=>d.zmo).length;
  showAlert('✓ DIR loaded — '+Object.keys(state.dirData).length+' batch records ('+zmoCount+' ZMO).','success');
  closeModal();
}

function importInventory(wb, filename, batchMode=false) {
  // Try Sheet1 first, then first sheet
  let ws = wb.Sheets['Sheet1'] || wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]];
  const allRows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(ws,{header:1,defval:'',raw:false});

  // Find header row by looking for 'SKU'
  let hi = -1;
  for (let i=0;i<Math.min(10,allRows.length);i++) {
    if (allRows[i].some(c=>typeof c==='string'&&c.trim()==='SKU')) { hi=i; break; }
  }
  if (hi<0) { showAlert('Could not find SKU column in file: '+filename,'danger'); return; }

  const hdr = allRows[hi];
  const ci = {};
  hdr.forEach((h,i)=>{ if(h) ci[h.toString().trim()]=i; });

  const custI = ci['Customer']??-1;
  const poI = ci['PO #']??-1;
  const skuI = ci['SKU']??-1;
  const prodI = ci['Product ID']??-1;
  const prod2I = ci['Product ID2']??-1;  // used for BU calculation
  const pcsI = ci['Pcs']??-1;
  const pendI = ci['Pcs Pending']??-1;
  const dmgI = ci['Dmg']??-1;
  const stI = Object.keys(ci).find(k=>k.toLowerCase().includes('inventory status'));
  const statusIdx = stI ? ci[stI] : -1;
  const lotI = ci['Lot #']??-1;
  const expI = ci['Expiration Date']??-1;
  const locI = ci['Location']??-1;
  const skidI = ci['SkidID']??-1;
  const dateRecdI = ci["Date Rec'd"]??-1;
  const uniqueWtI = ci['Unique Weight']??-1;  // primary weight source
  const grossWtI = ci['Gross Weight']??-1;    // fallback
  const bolI = ci['Inbound BOL']??-1;
  const buColI = ci['BU']??-1;               // only in Smurfit file
  const invI = ci['Invoice #']??-1;

  // Identify all customers in this file, then replace only their rolls
  const incomingCustomers = new Set();
  for (let i=hi+1;i<allRows.length;i++) {
    const r = allRows[i];
    const cust = (r[custI]||'').toString().trim();
    if (cust) incomingCustomers.add(cust);
  }
  // Remove existing rolls for these customers before re-importing
  if (incomingCustomers.size) {
    const before = state.inventory.length;
    state.inventory = state.inventory.filter(r=>!incomingCustomers.has(r.customer));
    console.log('Replaced '+( before-state.inventory.length)+' existing rolls for: '+[...incomingCustomers].join(', '));
  }

  let added = 0, skipped = 0;
  for (let i=hi+1;i<allRows.length;i++) {
    const r = allRows[i];
    const loc = (r[locI]||'').toString().trim();
    const sku = (r[skuI]||'').toString().trim();
    if (!sku||!loc) continue;

    let status = statusIdx>=0 ? (r[statusIdx]||'').toString().trim().toUpperCase() : 'AVAILABLE';
    // Any roll in a 23-QH location is marked DAMAGED (but still available to pick)
    if (loc.toUpperCase().includes('23-QH')) status = 'DAMAGED';
    // Ghost location → force GHOST status
    if (loc.toUpperCase() === GHOST_LOCATION.toUpperCase()) status = 'GHOST';
    // Cycle Count location → force CYCLE COUNT status (still available to pick)
    if (loc.toUpperCase().includes(CYCLE_COUNT_PATTERN.toUpperCase())) status = 'CYCLE COUNT';
    // Include AVAILABLE, DAMAGED, GHOST, CYCLE COUNT; exclude anything else
    const isGhost = status === 'GHOST';
    const isCycleCount = status === 'CYCLE COUNT';
    if (!isGhost && !isCycleCount && status && status!=='AVAILABLE' && status!=='DAMAGED') { skipped++; continue; }

    const lot = (r[lotI]||'').toString().trim();
    const dateRecdRaw = dateRecdI>=0 ? r[dateRecdI] : null;
    const expRaw = expI>=0 ? r[expI] : null;
    const productId = prodI>=0 ? (r[prodI]||'').toString().trim() : '';

    // BU = LEFT(3) of Product ID2 (uppercase) matched against BU_MAP
    // Smurfit has a BU column which already contains LEFT(F,3) result
    const _prod2val = prod2I>=0 ? (r[prod2I]||'').toString().trim() : '';
    const _prod1val = prodI>=0  ? (r[prodI]||'').toString().trim()  : '';
    const _buCol    = buColI>=0 && r[buColI] && !String(r[buColI]).startsWith('=')
                      ? r[buColI].toString().trim() : '';
    // Priority: BU column (Smurfit) → LEFT(3) of Prod ID2 → LEFT(3) of Prod ID
    const buRaw = (_buCol || _prod2val.substring(0,3) || _prod1val.substring(0,3)).substring(0,3).toUpperCase();
    const cust = (r[custI]||'').toString().trim();
    const bu = resolveBU(buRaw);

    // Calculate Unique Weight and Tons
    const uniqueWt = uniqueWtI>=0 ? (parseFloat(r[uniqueWtI])||0) : (grossWtI>=0 ? (parseFloat(r[grossWtI])||0) : 0);
    const tons = uniqueWt / 2000; // =UniqueWeight/2000

    // Get ZMO/expDate from DIR if available
    const dirRecord = lot ? (state.dirData[lot]||null) : null;

    state.inventory.push({
      customer: cust,
      buRaw: buRaw.substring(0,3).toUpperCase(),
      po: (r[poI]||'').toString().trim(),
      sku,
      productId,
      prod2: prod2I>=0 ? (r[prod2I]||'').toString().trim() : '',
      pcs: parseFloat(r[pcsI])||1,
      pcsPending: pendI>=0 ? (parseFloat(r[pendI])||0) : 0,
      dmg: dmgI>=0 ? (parseFloat(r[dmgI])||0) : 0,
      status,
      lot,
      expDate: parseDate(expRaw),
      location: loc,
      skidId: (r[skidI]||'').toString().trim(),
      dateRecd: parseDate(dateRecdRaw),
      grossWt: uniqueWt,
      bol: (r[bolI]||'').toString().trim(),
      bu,
      tons: parseFloat(tons.toFixed(4)),
      invoice: invI>=0 ? (r[invI]||'').toString().trim() : '',
      zmo: dirRecord ? (dirRecord.zmo || (dirRecord.soDoc ? dirRecord.soDoc+(dirRecord.soItem?'-'+dirRecord.soItem:'') : '') || '') : '',
      dirExpDate: dirRecord && dirRecord.mfgDate ? parseDate(dirRecord.mfgDate) : null,
    });
    added++;
  }

  // Sync to Firebase
  const compact = state.inventory.map(r=>({
    ...r,
    dateRecd: r.dateRecd ? r.dateRecd.getTime() : null,
    expDate: r.expDate ? r.expDate.getTime() : null,
    dirExpDate: r.dirExpDate ? r.dirExpDate.getTime() : null,
  }));
  state.lastImport = Date.now();
  state.dataLoaded = true;
  enableAppButtons();

  if (!batchMode) {
    // Single file — save to Firebase immediately and notify
    db.ref('6021/inventory').set(compact).catch(()=>{});
    db.ref('6021/lastImport').set(state.lastImport).catch(()=>{});
    updateImportStamp();
    showAlert(`✓ ${filename}: ${added} rolls imported for ${[...incomingCustomers].join(', ')}. Total: ${state.inventory.length} rolls.`,'success');
    showDashboard();
  }
  // Return result for batch aggregation
  return { added, customer: [...incomingCustomers].join(', ') };
}

function parseDate(v) {
  if (!v) return null;
  if (v instanceof Date) return isNaN(v)?null:v;
  const d = new Date(v);
  return isNaN(d)?null:d;
}

// ─── ROLL SEQUENCING ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function getCustomerGroup(customer, buRaw) {
  if (buRaw) {
    const key = buRaw.toString().trim().substring(0,3).toUpperCase();
    // Check Firebase-loaded map first, then hardcoded defaults
    const seq = (state.buSeqMap && state.buSeqMap[key]) || BU_SEQ_DEFAULT[key];
    if (seq === 'FEFO') return 'FEFO';
    if (seq === 'FIFO') return 'FIFO';
    // Key lookup failed — check full BU display name against known account lists
    // e.g. 'CONWAY' key='CON' not in map, but 'CONWAY' is in FEFO_ACCOUNTS
    const buUp = buRaw.toString().trim().toUpperCase();
    if (FEFO_ACCOUNTS.some(a=>buUp.includes(a.toUpperCase()))) return 'FEFO';
    if (FIFO_ACCOUNTS.some(a=>buUp.includes(a.toUpperCase()))) return 'FIFO';
  }
  const c = (customer||'').toUpperCase();
  if (FIFO_ACCOUNTS.some(a=>c.includes(a.toUpperCase()))) return 'FIFO';
  if (FEFO_ACCOUNTS.some(a=>c.includes(a.toUpperCase()))) return 'FEFO';
  return 'FIFO';
}

function buUsesZMO(buRaw) {
  if (!buRaw) return false;
  const key = buRaw.toString().trim().substring(0,3).toUpperCase();
  return !!(state.buZmoMap && state.buZmoMap[key]) || !!(BU_ZMO_DEFAULT[key]);
}

function sortRolls(rolls, customer, bu) {
  const group = getCustomerGroup(customer, bu);
  return [...rolls].sort((a,b) => {
    if (group==='FEFO') {
      const ea = (a.dirExpDate||a.expDate||new Date(9999,0,1)).getTime();
      const eb = (b.dirExpDate||b.expDate||new Date(9999,0,1)).getTime();
      if (ea!==eb) return ea-eb;
    }
    // FIFO — sort by Date Rec'd
    const da = (a.dateRecd||new Date(9999,0,1)).getTime();
    const db2 = (b.dateRecd||new Date(9999,0,1)).getTime();
    if (da!==db2) return da-db2;
    // Within same date — sort by location, then lot#, then skid ID for sequential order
    const locCmp = (a.location||'').localeCompare(b.location||'');
    if (locCmp!==0) return locCmp;
    const lotCmp = (a.lot||'').localeCompare(b.lot||'', undefined, {numeric:true, sensitivity:'base'});
    if (lotCmp!==0) return lotCmp;
    return (a.skidId||'').toString().localeCompare((b.skidId||'').toString(), undefined, {numeric:true});
  });
}

// ─── TICKET ID ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function genTicketId(callback) {
  if (!db) { callback('PK-'+(Date.now().toString().slice(-5))); return; }
  db.ref('6021/ticketCounter').transaction(cur=>(cur||0)+1).then(result=>{
    if (result.committed) callback('PK-'+String(result.snapshot.val()).padStart(5,'0'));
    else callback('PK-'+(Date.now().toString().slice(-5)));
  }).catch(()=>callback('PK-'+(Date.now().toString().slice(-5))));
}

// ─── DASHBOARD ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function buildStatCards() {
  const customers = [...new Set(state.inventory.map(r=>r.customer))].length;
  const locations = [...new Set(state.inventory.map(r=>r.location))].length;
  const dmgRolls = state.inventory.filter(r=>r.status==='DAMAGED').length;

  // DIR matches: inventory rolls whose Lot# exists in dirData
  const dirKeys = Object.keys(state.dirData||{});
  const dirMatches = dirKeys.length > 0
    ? state.inventory.filter(r=>r.lot && state.dirData[r.lot]).length
    : 0;
  const dirTotal = state.inventory.length;
  const dirPct = dirTotal > 0 ? Math.round(dirMatches/dirTotal*100) : 0;
  const dirColor = dirPct >= 90 ? 'var(--accent2)' : dirPct >= 50 ? 'var(--warning)' : 'var(--danger)';
  const zmoRolls = dirKeys.length > 0
    ? state.inventory.filter(r=>r.lot && state.dirData[r.lot] && state.dirData[r.lot].zmo).length
    : 0;

  let h = '<div class="stats-grid" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr)">';
  h += '<div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Total Rolls</div><div class="stat-value">'+state.inventory.length.toLocaleString()+'</div></div>';
  h += '<div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Customers</div><div class="stat-value green">'+customers+'</div></div>';
  h += '<div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Locations</div><div class="stat-value">'+locations+'</div></div>';
  h += '<div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Damaged</div><div class="stat-value orange">'+dmgRolls+'</div></div>';
  h += '<div class="stat-card" title="'+dirMatches+' of '+dirTotal+' rolls matched to DIR records">';
  h += '<div class="stat-label">DIR MATCHES</div>';
  h += '<div class="stat-value" style="color:'+dirColor+'">'+dirMatches.toLocaleString()+'</div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px">'+dirPct+'% of '+dirTotal.toLocaleString()+' rolls</div>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div class="stat-card" title="Rolls with ZMO reference from DIR">';
  h += '<div class="stat-label">ZMO ROLLS</div>';
  h += '<div class="stat-value" style="color:var(--accent)">'+zmoRolls.toLocaleString()+'</div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px">'+Object.keys(state.dirData||{}).length.toLocaleString()+' DIR records</div>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '</div>';
  return h;
}

function showDashboard() {
  state.currentView = 'dashboard';
  state.activeTicket = null;
  updateTicketList();


  document.getElementById('main-panel').innerHTML = `
    <div class="panel">
      <div class="section-title">SYSTEM OVERVIEW</div>
      ${buildStatCards()}
      <div class="section-title">OPEN TICKETS (${state.tickets.length})</div>
      ${state.tickets.length===0
        ? '<div class="alert alert-info">No open tickets. Click "+ New Pick Ticket" to start.</div>'
        : state.tickets.map(t=>`
          <div class="ticket-card" onclick="viewTicket('${t.id}')">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
              <div>
                <div class="ticket-id">${t.id}${t.refNum?' · '+t.refNum:''}</div>
                <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text);margin-top:3px">${t.customer||'No customer'} ${t.bu?'· '+t.bu:''}</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px">${t.destination||''}${t.appt?' · '+t.appt:''} · ${t.clerk||''}</div>
              </div>
              <div style="text-align:right">
                <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--accent2);font-weight:bold">${(t.selectedRolls||[]).length} rolls</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">${new Date(t.created).toLocaleDateString()}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>`).join('')}
    </div>`;
}

// ─── NEW TICKET ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function showNewTicket() {
  const customers = [...new Set(state.inventory.map(r=>r.customer).filter(Boolean))].sort();
  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
  document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()">
      <div class="modal" style="width:640px">
        <h2>+ NEW PICK TICKET</h2>
        <div class="form-grid">
          <div class="form-group"><label>DATE</label><input type="date" id="nd-date" value="${today}"></div>
          <div class="form-group"><label>CLERK *</label><input type="text" id="nd-clerk" value="${state.currentUser?state.currentUser.name:''}" autofocus></div>
          <div class="form-group"><label>REFERENCE # *</label><input type="text" id="nd-ref" placeholder="e.g. CP-10715 or RELEASE 287"></div>
          <div class="form-group"><label>CUSTOMER</label>
            <select id="nd-customer" onchange="updateBUOptions()">
              <option value="">Select customer...</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group"><label>BU (Business Unit)</label>
            <select id="nd-bu-main" onchange="updateSKUOptions()">
              <option value="">Select BU...</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group"><label>DELIVERY DATE</label><input type="date" id="nd-appt"></div>
          <div style="grid-column:1/-1"></div>
          <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:1/-1"><label>DESTINATION</label><input type="text" id="nd-dest" placeholder="Destination"></div>
          <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:1/-1"><label>NOTES (optional)</label><input type="text" id="nd-notes" placeholder="Additional notes"></div>
          <div class="form-group"><label>PICKER</label><input type="text" id="nd-picker" placeholder="Picker name"></div>
          <div class="form-group"><label>STAGED LOC</label><input type="text" id="nd-staged" placeholder="Staged location"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="modal-actions">
          <button class="btn" onclick="closeModal()">Cancel</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="createTicket()">Create Ticket →</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  // Populate customer dropdown after modal renders
  const custSel = document.getElementById('nd-customer');
  if (custSel) {
    customers.forEach(c => {
      const o = document.createElement('option');
      o.value = c; o.textContent = c;
      custSel.appendChild(o);
    });
  }
  // Populate BU dropdown based on initial customer selection
  updateBUOptions();
}

// addSkuLine moved to ticket view

function updateBUOptions() {
  const cust = document.getElementById('nd-customer')?.value || '';
  // Get unique BU values from inventory for this customer
  // Build BU options: value=display name, label=display name
  const buDisplaySet = new Set();
  state.inventory
    .filter(r=>(!cust||r.customer===cust) && r.bu)
    .forEach(r => buDisplaySet.add(r.bu));

  const buSel = document.getElementById('nd-bu-main');
  if (buSel) {
    buSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select BU...</option>' +
      [...buDisplaySet].sort().map(b=>'<option value="'+b+'">'+b+'</option>').join('');
  }
  updateSKUOptions();
}

// updateSKUOptions moved to ticket view

function createTicket() {
  const clerk = document.getElementById('nd-clerk').value.trim();
  const refNum = document.getElementById('nd-ref').value.trim();
  if (!clerk||!refNum) { showAlert('Clerk and Reference # are required.','warning'); return; }
  const apptRaw = document.getElementById('nd-appt').value;
  const apptDisplay = apptRaw ? new Date(apptRaw+'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}) : '';

  const topBU = document.getElementById('nd-bu-main')?.value || '';
  // Start with one empty SKU line - user fills in on ticket view
  const skuLines = [{ sku:'', bu:topBU, qty:0, selectedRolls:[] }];

  genTicketId(id => {
    try {
    const ticket = {
      id,
      refNum,
      clerk,
      customer: document.getElementById('nd-customer').value,
      bu: topBU,
      vpo: '',
      orderNum: '',
      zmo: '',
      appt: apptDisplay,
      stagedLoc: document.getElementById('nd-staged').value.trim(),
      destination: document.getElementById('nd-dest').value.trim(),
      picker: document.getElementById('nd-picker').value.trim(),
      notes: document.getElementById('nd-notes').value.trim(),
      ticketDate: document.getElementById('nd-date').value,
      created: Date.now(),
      skuLines,        // array of { sku, bu, qty, selectedRolls }
      selectedRolls: [], // all rolls combined (for backwards compat)
      status: 'open'
    };
    state.tickets.push(ticket);
    state.activeTicket = id;
    closeModal();
    saveTickets();
    updateTicketList();
    viewTicket(id);

    } catch(e) { showAlert('Error creating ticket: '+e.message,'danger'); console.error(e); }
  });
}

// ─── VIEW TICKET ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleTicketClick(el) {
  const tid = el.getAttribute('data-tid');
  if (tid) viewTicket(tid);
}

function handleDashboardTicketClick(el) {
  const tid = el.getAttribute('data-tid');
  if (tid) viewTicket(tid);
}

function updateTicketList() {
  document.getElementById('ticket-count') && (document.getElementById('ticket-count').textContent = state.tickets.length+'/20');
  const list = document.getElementById('ticket-list');
  if (state.sidebarTab==='archive') { renderArchiveList(); return; }
  if (!state.tickets.length) { list.innerHTML='<div style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text2);font-size:11px">No tickets yet</div>'; return; }
  let listHtml = '';
  state.tickets.forEach(t => {
    const active = t.id===state.activeTicket ? 'active' : '';
    const rolls = t.skuLines ? t.skuLines.reduce((s,l)=>s+(l.selectedRolls||[]).length,0) : (t.selectedRolls||[]).length;
    listHtml += '<div class="ticket-card ' + active + '" data-tid="' + t.id + '" onclick="handleTicketClick(this)">';
    listHtml += '<div class="ticket-id">' + t.id + '</div>';
    listHtml += '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text);margin-top:2px">' + (t.refNum||'—') + ' · ' + (t.customer||'—') + '</div>';
    listHtml += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">' + rolls + ' rolls · ' + (t.clerk||'') + '</div>';
    listHtml += '</div>';
  });
  list.innerHTML = listHtml;
}

function renderSkuLineSectionTitle(ticket, totalRolls, totalWt, totalTons, totalQty) {
  const pct = totalQty > 0 ? Math.min(100, Math.round(totalRolls/totalQty*100)) : null;
  return '<div class="section-title">SELECTED ROLLS (' + totalRolls +
    (totalQty>0 ? ' / ' + totalQty + ' QTY' : '') + ') · ' +
    totalWt.toLocaleString() + ' lbs · ' + totalTons.toFixed(1) + ' tons</div>';
}

function renderSkuLinesSections(ticket, id) {
  if (!ticket.skuLines||!ticket.skuLines.length) return '';
  let html = renderSkuLineSectionTitle(
    ticket,
    ticket.skuLines.reduce((s,l)=>(s+(l.selectedRolls||[]).length),0),
    ticket.skuLines.reduce((s,l)=>(s+(l.selectedRolls||[]).reduce((a,r)=>a+(r.grossWt||0),0)),0),
    ticket.skuLines.reduce((s,l)=>(s+(l.selectedRolls||[]).reduce((a,r)=>a+(r.tons||0),0)),0),
    ticket.skuLines.reduce((s,l)=>s+(l.qty||0),0)
  );

  ticket.skuLines.forEach((line, li) => {
    const lineRolls = (line.selectedRolls||[]).map(r=>({
      ...r,
      dateRecd: r.dateRecd ? new Date(r.dateRecd) : null,
      expDate: r.expDate ? new Date(r.expDate) : null,
      dirExpDate: r.dirExpDate ? new Date(r.dirExpDate) : null,
    }));
    const lineWt = lineRolls.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.grossWt||0),0);
    const lineTons = lineRolls.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);
    const met = line.qty>0 && lineRolls.length>=line.qty;
    const color = met ? 'var(--accent2)' : lineRolls.length>0 ? 'var(--warning)' : 'var(--text2)';

    html += '<div style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:12px;overflow:hidden">';
    html += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">';
    html += '<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">' + (line.sku||'No SKU') + '</div>';
    if (line.bu) html += '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">BU: <strong>' + line.bu + '</strong></div>';
    html += '<div style="font-size:11px;color:'+color+'"><strong>' + lineRolls.length + '</strong>' + (line.qty>0?' / '+line.qty+' rolls':' rolls') + '</div>';
    html += '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">' + lineWt.toLocaleString() + ' lbs · ' + lineTons.toFixed(1) + ' tons</div>';
    html += '</div>';

    html += '<div style="overflow-x:auto"><table class="data-table" style="margin:0">';
    html += '<thead><tr><th>RECV DATE</th><th>EXP DATE</th><th>LOT #</th><th>SKID ID</th><th>PRODUCT ID</th><th>PRODUCT ID 2</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>STATUS</th><th>INBOUND BOL</th><th style="text-align:center">PCS</th><th style="text-align:right">WEIGHT</th><th style="text-align:right">TONS</th><th></th></tr></thead>';
    html += '<tbody>';

    if (lineRolls.length===0) {
      html += '<tr><td colspan="11" style="text-align:center;color:var(--text2);padding:12px">No rolls selected</td></tr>';
    } else {
      lineRolls.forEach(r => {
        const expD = r.dirExpDate||r.expDate;
        html += '<tr class="' + (r.status==='DAMAGED'?'dmg-row':'') + '">';
        html += '<td>' + (r.dateRecd?r.dateRecd.toLocaleDateString():'—') + '</td>';
        html += '<td>' + (expD?new Date(expD).toLocaleDateString():'—') + '</td>';
        html += '<td style="font-size:11px">' + (r.lot||'—') + '</td>';
        html += '<td style="font-size:11px">' + (r.skidId||'—') + '</td>';
        html += '<td style="font-size:11px">' + (r.productId||'—') + '</td>';
        html += '<td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--accent)">' + (r.prod2||'—') + '</td>';
        html += '<td style="font-weight:bold">' + (r.location||'—') + '</td>';
        const _isPick = (r.pcsPending||0)>0;
        const _statDisp = _isPick ? 'PICKED' : (r.status||'AVAILABLE');
        const _statCol = _isPick?'var(--warning)':r.status==='DAMAGED'?'var(--danger)':r.status==='GHOST'?'var(--text2)':r.status==='CYCLE COUNT'?'var(--accent)':'var(--accent2)';
        html += '<td style="font-weight:bold;color:'+_statCol+'">'+_statDisp+'</td>';
        html += '<td style="font-size:11px">' + (r.bol||'—') + '</td>';
        html += '<td style="text-align:center">1</td>';
        html += '<td style="text-align:right">' + (r.grossWt||0).toLocaleString() + '</td>';
        html += '<td style="text-align:right">' + (r.tons||0).toFixed(1) + '</td>';
        html += '<td><button onclick="removeRollFromLine(\'' + id + '\',' + li + ',\'' + r.skidId + '\')" style="background:none;border:none;color:var(--danger);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:2px 6px">✕</button></td>';
        html += '</tr>';
      });
      html += '<tr class="totals-row"><td colspan="7" style="text-align:right">SUBTOTAL</td>';
      html += '<td style="text-align:center">' + lineRolls.length + '</td>';
      html += '<td style="text-align:right">' + lineWt.toLocaleString() + '</td>';
      html += '<td style="text-align:right">' + lineTons.toFixed(1) + '</td>';
      html += '<td></td></tr>';
    }

    html += '</tbody></table></div></div>';
  });
  return html;
}

function viewTicket(id) {
  state.activeTicket = id;
  const ticket = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===id);
  if (!ticket) return;
  updateTicketList();

  // Ensure skuLines exists
  if (!ticket.skuLines||!ticket.skuLines.length) {
    ticket.skuLines = [{sku:ticket.sku||'',bu:ticket.bu||'',qty:0,selectedRolls:ticket.selectedRolls||[]}];
  }

  const allSelected = ticket.skuLines.flatMap(l=>(l.selectedRolls||[]).map(r=>({
    ...r,
    dateRecd: r.dateRecd?new Date(r.dateRecd):null,
    expDate: r.expDate?new Date(r.expDate):null,
    dirExpDate: r.dirExpDate?new Date(r.dirExpDate):null,
  })));

  const totalRolls = allSelected.length;
  const totalWt = allSelected.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.grossWt||0),0);
  const totalTons = allSelected.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);
  const totalQty = ticket.skuLines.reduce((s,l)=>s+(l.qty||0),0);
  const rollBorderColor = totalQty>0&&totalRolls>=totalQty ? 'var(--accent2)' : totalRolls>0 ? 'var(--warning)' : 'var(--border)';
  const rollsDisplay = totalRolls + (totalQty>0 ? ' <span style="font-size:16px;color:var(--text2)"> / '+totalQty+'</span>' : '');

  let h = '<div class="panel">';

  // ── TICKET HEADER ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  h += '<div class="ticket-header" style="padding-bottom:0">';
  h += '<div class="ticket-header-body">';

  // Top 3 boxes: Ref#, QTY Requested, Destination
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-bottom:16px">';
  h += '<div style="text-align:center;border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px">';
  h += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:4px">REFERENCE NUMBER</div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:36px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">'+(ticket.refNum||'—')+'</div>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div style="text-align:center;border:2px solid '+(totalQty>0?'var(--accent2)':'var(--border)')+';border-radius:8px;padding:12px">';
  h += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:4px">QTY REQUESTED</div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:48px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2)">'+(totalQty||'—')+'</div>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div style="text-align:center;border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px">';
  h += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:4px">DESTINATION</div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:36px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--text)">'+(ticket.destination||'—')+'</div>';
  if (ticket.stagedLoc) h += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:4px">STAGED: <strong>'+ticket.stagedLoc+'</strong></div>';
  h += '</div></div>';

  // VPO / ZMO
  if (ticket.vpo||ticket.zmo) {
    const cols = ticket.vpo&&ticket.zmo ? '1fr 1fr' : '1fr';
    h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:'+cols+';gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px">';
    if (ticket.vpo) h += '<div style="text-align:center;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px">VPO</div><div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:bold">'+ticket.vpo+'</div></div>';
    if (ticket.zmo) h += '<div style="text-align:center;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px"><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px">ZMO</div><div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:bold">'+ticket.zmo+'</div></div>';
    h += '</div>';
  }

  // Notes
  if (ticket.notes) {
    h += '<div style="border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;margin-bottom:12px;text-align:center">';
    h += '<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">NOTES: </span><strong>'+ticket.notes+'</strong></div>';
  }

  // Info grid
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px 24px;margin-bottom:12px">';
  const _allBUs = ticket.bu || [...new Set((ticket.skuLines||[]).filter(l=>l.bu).map(l=>l.bu))].join(', ');
  h += '<div style="font-size:11px"><span style="color:var(--text2)">PCS PENDING: </span><strong>'+allSelected.filter(r=>r.pcsPending>0).length+'</strong></div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:11px"><span style="color:var(--text2)">CUSTOMER: </span><strong>'+( ticket.customer||'—')+'</strong></div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:11px"><span style="color:var(--text2)">BU: </span><strong style="color:var(--warning)">'+(_allBUs||'—')+'</strong></div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:11px"><span style="color:var(--text2)">DATE: </span><strong>'+(ticket.ticketDate||'—')+'</strong></div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:11px"><span style="color:var(--text2)">DESTINATION: </span><strong>'+(ticket.destination||'—')+'</strong></div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:11px"><span style="color:var(--text2)">CLERK: </span><strong>'+(ticket.clerk||'—')+'</strong></div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:11px"><span style="color:var(--text2)">PICKER: </span><strong>'+(ticket.picker||'—')+'</strong></div>';
  h += '</div>';

  // ── SKU / QTY ENTRY ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  h += '<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:12px 0 4px 0;margin-top:8px">';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px">';
  h += '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text2)">SKU LINES</div>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" data-tid="'+id+'" onclick="addSkuLineToTicket(this.dataset.tid)">+ Add SKU</button>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr auto;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px;text-align:center;padding:0 2px">';
  const hd = 'font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1px';
  h += '<div style="'+hd+'">SKU</div>';
  h += '<div style="'+hd+'">ZMO</div>';
  h += '<div style="'+hd+'">VPO</div>';
  h += '<div style="'+hd+'">ORDER #</div>';
  h += '<div style="'+hd+'">QTY</div>';
  h += '<div></div>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div id="sku-lines-editor">';
  ticket.skuLines.forEach((line,li) => {
    const skuOpts = [...new Set(state.inventory.filter(r=>{
      if (ticket.customer && r.customer !== ticket.customer) return false;
      if (line.bu && r.bu !== line.bu) return false;
      // ZMO filter — only apply when ZMO field has a non-empty value
      const _zmoQ = (line.zmo||'').toString().trim();
      if (_zmoQ) {
        const rZmo = getRollZmo(r);
        if (rZmo !== _zmoQ.toUpperCase()) return false;
      }
      // Order # filter — only apply when Order # field has a non-empty value
      const _ordQ = (line.orderNum||'').toString().trim();
      const _buUp = (line.bu||'').toUpperCase();
      if (_ordQ && (_buUp.includes('TWIN RIVERS') || _buUp.includes('CATALYST'))) {
        const p2 = (r.prod2||'').toString().toUpperCase();
        const tokens = _ordQ.toUpperCase().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
        if (!tokens.some(t => p2.includes(t))) return false;
      }
      return true;
    }).map(r=>r.sku))].sort();
    const lineSelected = (line.selectedRolls||[]).length;
    const lineQty = line.qty||0;
    const lineColor = lineQty>0&&lineSelected>=lineQty ? 'var(--accent2)' : lineSelected>0 ? 'var(--warning)' : 'var(--text2)';
    const _lineBuRes = line.bu ? line.bu.toString().trim() : null;
    const availRolls = state.inventory.filter(r => {
      if (ticket.customer && r.customer !== ticket.customer) return false;
      if (_lineBuRes) {
        const _rBuRes = resolveBU(r.buRaw||'') || r.bu;
        if (_rBuRes !== _lineBuRes) return false;
      }
      if (line.sku && r.sku !== line.sku) return false;
      if (line.zmo && line.zmo.trim()) {
        const _dr = r.lot ? state.dirData[r.lot] : null;
        const rz = (r.zmo||(_dr?_dr.zmo:'')||'').toString().trim().toUpperCase();
        if (rz !== line.zmo.toString().trim().toUpperCase()) return false;
      }
      if (line.orderNum && _lineBuRes && (_lineBuRes.toUpperCase().includes('TWIN RIVERS') || _lineBuRes.toUpperCase().includes('CATALYST'))) {
        const p2 = (r.prod2||'').toString().toUpperCase();
        const tokens = line.orderNum.toString().trim().toUpperCase().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
        if (!tokens.some(t => p2.includes(t))) return false;
      }
      if ((r.pcsPending||0) > 0) return false; // already picked
      if ((r.status||'') === 'GHOST') return false; // ghost not available
      return true;
    }).length;
    const showZmo = true;
    const gridCols = '2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr auto';
    const inp = 'background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 8px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;outline:none;text-align:center;width:100%';
