    h += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:'+gridCols+';gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;align-items:start">';
    h += '<div>';
    h += '<select data-tid="'+id+'" data-li="'+li+'" class="sku-edit-sku" onchange="updateTicketSkuLine(this)" style="'+inp+'">';
    h += '<option value="">Select SKU...</option>';
    skuOpts.forEach(s => { h += '<option value="'+s+'"'+(s===line.sku?' selected':'')+'>'+s+'</option>'; });
    h += '</select>';
    h += '</div>';
    h += '<input type="text" data-tid="'+id+'" data-li="'+li+'" class="sku-edit-zmo" value="'+(line.zmo||'')+'" placeholder="ZMO #" onchange="updateTicketSkuLine(this)" style="'+inp+'">';
    h += '<input type="text" data-tid="'+id+'" data-li="'+li+'" class="sku-edit-vpo" value="'+(line.vpo||'')+'" placeholder="VPO #" onchange="updateTicketSkuLine(this)" style="'+inp+'">';
    // Order # — active only for Twin Rivers, greyed out otherwise
    const isTwinRivers = (line.bu||'').toUpperCase().includes('TWIN RIVERS') || (line.bu||'').toUpperCase().includes('CATALYST');
    h += '<input type="text" data-tid="'+id+'" data-li="'+li+'" class="sku-edit-ordernum" value="'+(line.orderNum||'')+'" placeholder="Order #" onchange="updateTicketSkuLine(this)" title="Twin Rivers: filter by Prod ID 2 order reference" style="'+inp+(isTwinRivers?'':';opacity:0.3;pointer-events:none')+'">';
    h += '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px">';
    h += '<input type="number" data-tid="'+id+'" data-li="'+li+'" class="sku-edit-qty" value="'+(line.qty||'')+'" placeholder="QTY" min="1" onchange="updateTicketSkuLine(this)" style="'+inp+'">';
    if (lineQty>0) h += '<span style="font-size:10px;color:'+lineColor+';font-weight:bold;white-space:nowrap">'+lineSelected+' sel</span>';
    if (line.sku) {
      const availColor2 = availRolls===0?'var(--danger)':availRolls<lineQty?'var(--warning)':'var(--accent2)';
      h += '<span style="font-size:10px;color:'+availColor2+';font-weight:bold">'+availRolls+' avail</span>';
    }
    h += '</div>';
    h += '<button data-tid="'+id+'" data-li="'+li+'" onclick="removeSkuLineFromTicket(this.dataset.tid,parseInt(this.dataset.li))" style="background:none;border:1px solid var(--danger);color:var(--danger);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:10px;'+(li===0?'visibility:hidden':'')+'">✕</button>';
    h += '</div>';
  });
  h += '</div>';
  h += '</div>';

  h += '</div>'; // ticket-header-body

  // Toolbar
  h += '<div class="ticket-toolbar">';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" style="font-weight:bold" data-tid="'+id+'" onclick="showSkuRollSelector(this.dataset.tid)">📋 Select Rolls</button>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" style="font-weight:bold" data-tid="'+id+'" onclick="editTicket(this.dataset.tid)">✎ Edit</button>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" style="font-weight:bold" data-tid="'+id+'" onclick="exportPickTicketPDF(this.dataset.tid)">📄 Pick Ticket</button>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" style="font-weight:bold" data-tid="'+id+'" onclick="exportLoadTag(this.dataset.tid)">🏷 Load Tag</button>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" style="font-weight:bold" onclick="printCCCurrentSheet()">🖨 Print</button>';
  h += '<div style="flex:1"></div>';
  if (isAdmin()) h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" style="font-weight:bold;border-color:var(--warning);color:var(--warning)" data-tid="'+id+'" onclick="archiveTicket(this.dataset.tid)">📁 Archive</button>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" style="font-weight:bold" data-tid="'+id+'" onclick="deleteTicket(this.dataset.tid)">✕ Delete</button>';
  h += '</div>'; // toolbar
  h += '</div>'; // ticket-header

  // ── SKU LINES ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  h += renderSkuLinesSections(ticket, id);

  // Grand total
  if (totalRolls>0) {
    h += '<div style="text-align:right;padding:8px 14px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;font-weight:bold;font-size:12px;margin-top:8px">';
    h += 'GRAND TOTAL: '+totalRolls+' rolls · '+totalWt.toLocaleString()+' lbs · '+totalTons.toFixed(1)+' tons';
    h += '</div>';
  }

  h += '</div>'; // panel

  document.getElementById('main-panel').innerHTML = h;
}



// ─── ROLL SELECTOR ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function showSkuRollSelector(id) {
  const ticket = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===id);
  if (!ticket) return;
  if (!ticket.skuLines||!ticket.skuLines.length) {
    ticket.skuLines=[{sku:ticket.sku||'',bu:ticket.bu||'',qty:0,selectedRolls:[]}];
  }
  if (ticket.skuLines.length===1) {
    openGroupedSelector(id, 0);
  } else {
    let ph = '<div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()"><div class="modal"><h2>📋 SELECT ROLLS — CHOOSE SKU LINE</h2><div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px">';
    ticket.skuLines.forEach((line,li) => {
      const cnt = (line.selectedRolls||[]).length;
      const col = cnt>=(line.qty||0)&&line.qty>0 ? 'var(--accent2)' : 'var(--warning)';
      ph += '<button class="btn" data-id="'+id+'" data-li="'+li+'" onclick="openGroupedSelector(this.dataset.id,parseInt(this.dataset.li))" style="justify-content:space-between;padding:12px 16px">';
      ph += '<span style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">'+(line.sku||'No SKU')+(line.bu?' · '+line.bu:'')+'</span>';
      ph += '<span style="color:'+col+'">'+cnt+(line.qty>0?' / '+line.qty:'')+ ' rolls</span></button>';
    });
    ph += '</div><div class="modal-actions"><button class="btn" onclick="closeModal()">Cancel</button></div></div></div>';
    document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML = ph;
  }
}


function getRollZmo(r) {
  // Check stored zmo on roll record first
  if (r.zmo && r.zmo.trim()) return r.zmo.toString().trim().toUpperCase();
  // Live lookup from DIR data
  if (r.lot && state.dirData[r.lot]) {
    const dir = state.dirData[r.lot];
    // Use combined zmo field if available
    if (dir.zmo && dir.zmo.trim()) return dir.zmo.toString().trim().toUpperCase();
    // Build from soDoc + soItem whenever soDoc exists (any docType)
    if (dir.soDoc) {
      const combined = dir.soDoc.toString().trim() + (dir.soItem ? '-' + dir.soItem.toString().trim() : '');
      return combined.toUpperCase();
    }
  }
  return '';
}

function openGroupedSelector(id, lineIdx) {
  const ticket = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===id);
  if (!ticket) return;
  const line = ticket.skuLines[lineIdx];
  const group = getCustomerGroup(ticket.customer, line.bu);
  const dateLabel = group==='FEFO' ? 'Expiration Date' : 'Receipt Date';
  const targetQty = line.qty || 0;

  // Filter inventory by customer + BU + SKU + ZMO (if ZMO entered)
  const lineZmoClean = line.zmo ? line.zmo.toString().trim().toUpperCase() : '';
  // line.bu is already a resolved display name (e.g. "IPG - ITAPE", "SCI GAMES")
  // Never re-resolve it via substring(0,3) — that causes collisions (e.g. "IPG" → CATALYST)
  const lineBuResolved = line.bu ? line.bu.toString().trim() : null;

  let rolls = state.inventory.filter(r => {
    if (ticket.customer && r.customer !== ticket.customer) return false;
    // Only filter by BU if it resolves to a known display name
    if (lineBuResolved) {
      const rBuResolved = resolveBU(r.buRaw||r.bu) || r.bu;
      if (rBuResolved !== lineBuResolved) return false;
    }
    if (line.sku && r.sku !== line.sku) return false;
    if (lineZmoClean) {
      const rollZmo = getRollZmo(r);
      if (rollZmo !== lineZmoClean) return false;
    }
    // Order # filter — Twin Rivers + Catalyst, matches against Prod ID 2
    // Splits on whitespace so "5644659 82095337" matches if prod2 contains either token
    if (line.orderNum && lineBuResolved && (lineBuResolved.toUpperCase().includes('TWIN RIVERS') || lineBuResolved.toUpperCase().includes('CATALYST'))) {
      const p2 = (r.prod2||'').toString().toUpperCase();
      const tokens = line.orderNum.toString().trim().toUpperCase().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
      if (!tokens.some(t => p2.includes(t))) return false;
    }
    if ((r.pcsPending||0) > 0) return false;
    if ((r.status||'') === 'GHOST') return false; // ghost not available to pick
    return true;
  });
  console.log('Roll filter: customer='+ticket.customer+' bu='+line.bu+' sku='+line.sku+' zmo='+line.zmo+' orderNum='+line.orderNum+' → '+rolls.length+' rolls');
  // Show sample of what ZMO + prod2 values exist for this SKU
  const allSkuRolls = state.inventory.filter(r=>r.sku===line.sku && (!ticket.customer||r.customer===ticket.customer));
  const sampleZmos = [...new Set(allSkuRolls.map(r=>getRollZmo(r)).filter(Boolean))].slice(0,5);
  const sampleProd2 = [...new Set(allSkuRolls.map(r=>(r.prod2||'').trim()).filter(Boolean))].sort();
  console.log('SKU '+line.sku+' has '+allSkuRolls.length+' total rolls. Sample ZMOs:', sampleZmos);
  console.log('Sample Prod ID 2 values:', sampleProd2);
  console.log('Line ZMO cleaned:', lineZmoClean, '| Order#:', line.orderNum);
  rolls = sortRolls(rolls, ticket.customer, line.bu);

  const selectedSkids = new Set((line.selectedRolls||[]).map(r=>String(r.skidId)));

  // Group all rolls by date, each group collapsible
  const dateGroups = {};
  rolls.forEach(r => {
    const dk = group==='FEFO'
      ? ((r.dirExpDate||r.expDate) ? new Date(r.dirExpDate||r.expDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'No Date')
      : (r.dateRecd ? new Date(r.dateRecd).toLocaleDateString() : 'No Date');
    if (!dateGroups[dk]) dateGroups[dk] = [];
    dateGroups[dk].push(r);
  });
  const dateKeys = Object.keys(dateGroups).sort((a,b) => {
    if (a==='No Date') return 1; if (b==='No Date') return -1;
    return new Date(a) - new Date(b);
  });
  window._rollDateGroups = dateGroups;
  window._rollDateKeys = dateKeys;

  // Store for manipulation
  window._rollList = rolls;
  window._rollSelected = new Set(selectedSkids);
  window._rollLineIdx = lineIdx;
  window._rollTicketId = id;

  let h = '<div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()">';
  h += '<div class="modal" style="width:980px;max-width:97vw">';
  h += '<h2>📋 '+(line.sku||'All SKUs')+(line.bu?' · '+line.bu:'')+' — '+group+' by '+dateLabel+'</h2>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:12px">';
  h += '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">'+rolls.length+' rolls in '+dateKeys.length+' date group'+(dateKeys.length!==1?'s':'')+'</span>';
  if (targetQty>0) h += '<span style="font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">Target: '+targetQty+' rolls</span>';
  h += '<div style="flex:1"></div>';
  h += '<span id="roll-sel-count" style="font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2)">'+selectedSkids.size+' selected</span>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="clearAllRollSel()">Clear All</button>';
  h += '</div>';

  if (rolls.length===0) {
    // Show what BU values exist for this customer to help debug
    const custRolls = state.inventory.filter(r=>!ticket.customer||r.customer===ticket.customer);
    const availBUs = [...new Set(custRolls.map(r=>r.bu).filter(Boolean))].sort();
    const availSKUs = [...new Set(custRolls.filter(r=>!line.bu||r.bu===line.bu).map(r=>r.sku))].sort();
    h += '<div class="alert alert-warning">';
    h += 'No inventory found for Customer: <strong>'+(ticket.customer||'—')+'</strong> · BU: <strong>'+(line.bu||'any')+'</strong> · SKU: <strong>'+(line.sku||'any')+'</strong>'+(line.orderNum?' · Order#: <strong>'+line.orderNum+'</strong>':'')+' <br>';
    h += '<span style="font-size:10px">Available BUs for this customer: '+(availBUs.join(', ')||'none')+'</span><br>';
    h += '<span style="font-size:10px">Available SKUs for this BU: '+(availSKUs.join(', ')||'none')+'</span>';
    if (line.orderNum) {
      const allP2 = [...new Set(allSkuRolls.map(r=>(r.prod2||'').trim()).filter(Boolean))].sort();
      h += '<br><span style="font-size:10px"><strong>All Prod ID 2 values for SKU '+line.sku+' ('+allP2.length+' unique):</strong></span>';
      h += '<div style="font-size:10px;max-height:120px;overflow-y:auto;background:#fff8f0;border:1px solid #f0d0a0;border-radius:4px;padding:4px 8px;margin-top:3px;line-height:1.7">'+(allP2.map(v=>'<span style="display:inline-block;margin-right:12px">'+v+'</span>').join('')||'none')+'</div>';
    }
    h += '</div>';
  }

  const CHUNK = 40;
  window._rollChunkData = {}; // gi -> [chunk0rolls, chunk1rolls, ...]
  h += '<div style="max-height:62vh;overflow-y:auto">';
  dateKeys.forEach((dk, gi) => {
    const gr = dateGroups[dk];
    const gWt = gr.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.grossWt||0),0);
    const gTons = gr.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);
    const allChk = gr.every(r=>window._rollSelected.has(String(r.skidId)));
    const grpOpen = false; // all collapsed on initial view
    // Split date group into 40-roll chunks
    const chunks = [];
    for (let i=0; i<gr.length; i+=CHUNK) chunks.push(gr.slice(i,i+CHUNK));
    window._rollChunkData[gi] = chunks;
    h += '<div style="border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:8px;overflow:hidden">';
    h += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:9px 12px;background:var(--surface2);cursor:pointer" data-gi="'+gi+'" onclick="toggleGrp(+this.dataset.gi)">';
    h += '<span id="garr-'+gi+'" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">'+(grpOpen?'&#9660;':'&#9654;')+'</span>';
    h += '<span style="font-weight:bold;font-size:13px;color:var(--accent)">'+dateLabel+': '+dk+'</span>';
    // Show distinct ZMO values for this date group
    const grpZmos = [...new Set(gr.map(r=>r.zmo||(r.lot&&state.dirData[r.lot]?state.dirData[r.lot].zmo:'')||'').filter(Boolean))];
    if (grpZmos.length) h += '<span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2)">ZMO: '+grpZmos.join(', ')+'</span>';
    h += '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">'+gr.length+' rolls &middot; '+gWt.toLocaleString()+' lbs &middot; '+gTons.toFixed(1)+' tons</span>';
    h += '<div style="flex:1"></div>';
    h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" style="font-size:10px" data-gi="'+gi+'" onclick="event.stopPropagation();selGrp(+this.dataset.gi)">Select All</button>';
    h += '<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" style="font-size:10px" data-gi="'+gi+'" onclick="event.stopPropagation();clrGrp(+this.dataset.gi)">Clear</button>';
    h += '</div>';
    h += '<div id="gbody-'+gi+'" style="display:'+(grpOpen?'block':'none')+';padding:4px 8px">';
    // Render 40-roll sub-chunks (only chunk if > 40 rolls in this date group)
    chunks.forEach((ch, ci) => {
      const cId = gi+'-'+ci;
      const cWt = ch.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.grossWt||0),0);
      const cTons = ch.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);
      const cAllChk = ch.every(r=>window._rollSelected.has(String(r.skidId)));
      const cOpen = false; // all collapsed on initial view
      const cLabel = chunks.length>1 ? 'Rolls '+(gi*0+ci*CHUNK+1)+'&#8211;'+(ci*CHUNK+ch.length) : '';
      h += '<div style="border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:6px;overflow:hidden">';
      h += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:6px 10px;background:var(--bg,var(--surface2));cursor:pointer" data-cid="'+cId+'" onclick="toggleChunk(this.dataset.cid)">';
      h += '<span id="carr-'+cId+'" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">'+(cOpen?'&#9660;':'&#9654;')+'</span>';
      if (cLabel) h += '<span style="font-weight:bold;font-size:12px;color:var(--accent2)">'+cLabel+'</span>';
      h += '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">'+ch.length+' rolls &middot; '+cWt.toLocaleString()+' lbs &middot; '+cTons.toFixed(1)+' tons</span>';
      h += '<div style="flex:1"></div>';
      h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" style="font-size:10px" data-cid="'+cId+'" onclick="event.stopPropagation();selChunk(this.dataset.cid)">Select All</button>';
      h += '<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" style="font-size:10px" data-cid="'+cId+'" onclick="event.stopPropagation();clrChunk(this.dataset.cid)">Clear</button>';
      h += '</div>';
      h += '<div id="cbody-'+cId+'" style="display:'+(cOpen?'block':'none')+'">';
      h += '<table class="data-table" style="font-size:11px;margin:0"><thead><tr>';
      h += '<th><input type="checkbox"'+(cAllChk?' checked':'')+' data-cid="'+cId+'" onchange="chunkChk(this.dataset.cid,this.checked)"></th>';
      h += '<th>'+(group==='FEFO'?'EXP DATE':'RECV DATE')+'</th><th>LOT #</th><th>SKID ID</th><th>PRODUCT ID</th><th>PRODUCT ID 2</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>ZMO</th><th>STATUS</th><th style="text-align:right">WEIGHT</th><th style="text-align:right">TONS</th>';
      h += '</tr></thead><tbody>';
      ch.forEach(r => {
        const chk = window._rollSelected.has(String(r.skidId));
        const bg = chk ? 'rgba(26,122,74,0.08)' : '';
        const dv = group==='FEFO' ? ((r.dirExpDate||r.expDate)?new Date(r.dirExpDate||r.expDate).toLocaleDateString():'&mdash;') : (r.dateRecd?new Date(r.dateRecd).toLocaleDateString():'&mdash;');
        h += '<tr style="background:'+bg+';cursor:pointer" data-skid="'+r.skidId+'" onclick="toggleRoll(this)">';
        h += '<td><input type="checkbox" class="rchk"'+(chk?' checked':'')+' data-skid="'+r.skidId+'" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" onchange="toggleRollByChk(this)"></td>';
        h += '<td>'+dv+'</td><td style="font-size:10px">'+r.lot+'</td><td style="font-size:10px">'+r.skidId+'</td>';
        h += '<td style="font-size:10px;max-width:160px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap">'+r.productId+'</td>';
        h += '<td style="font-size:10px;max-width:120px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap">'+(r.prod2||'&mdash;')+'</td>';
        h += '<td style="font-weight:bold">'+r.location+'</td>';
        const rowZmo = r.zmo || (r.lot && state.dirData[r.lot] ? state.dirData[r.lot].zmo : '') || '&mdash;';
        h += '<td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--accent)">'+rowZmo+'</td>';
        const isPicked = (r.pcsPending||0) > 0;
    const displayStatus = isPicked ? 'PICKED' : (r.status||'AVAILABLE');
    const statusColor = isPicked ? 'var(--warning)' : r.status==='DAMAGED' ? 'var(--danger)' : r.status==='GHOST' ? 'var(--text2)' : r.status==='CYCLE COUNT' ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--accent2)';
    h += '<td style="color:'+statusColor+';font-weight:bold">'+displayStatus+'</td>';
        h += '<td style="text-align:right">'+(r.grossWt||0).toLocaleString()+'</td>';
        h += '<td style="text-align:right">'+(r.tons||0).toFixed(1)+'</td></tr>';
      });
      h += '</tbody></table></div></div>';
    });
    h += '</div></div>';
  });
  h += '</div>';

  // Short indicator
  if (targetQty>0) {
    h += '<div id="roll-short-msg" style="font-size:12px;margin:8px 0;font-weight:bold;color:var(--warning)"></div>';
  }

  h += '<div class="modal-actions"><button class="btn" onclick="closeModal()">Cancel</button>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveRollSel()">Save Selection →</button></div>';
  h += '</div></div>';
  document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML = h;
  updateRollSelCount();
}

// Navigate pages — saves in-flight selections before re-render
window.setRollSelectorPage = function(id, lineIdx, page) {
  const ticket = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===id);
  if (!ticket) return;
  ticket.skuLines[lineIdx].selectedRolls = (window._rollList||[]).filter(r=>(window._rollSelected||new Set()).has(r.skidId));
  window._selectorPage = page;
  openGroupedSelector(id, lineIdx);
};




function selGrp(gi) {
  const dk = (window._rollDateKeys||[])[gi];
  ((window._rollDateGroups||{})[dk]||[]).forEach(r => {
    const sid = String(r.skidId);
    window._rollSelected.add(sid);
    const row = document.querySelector('tr[data-skid="'+sid+'"]');
    if (row) { row.style.background='rgba(26,122,74,0.08)'; const c=row.querySelector('.rchk'); if(c) c.checked=true; }
  });
  // Check all chunk header checkboxes within this group
  document.querySelectorAll('#gbody-'+gi+' thead input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(c=>{ c.checked=true; });
  updateRollSelCount();
}

function clrGrp(gi) {
  const dk = (window._rollDateKeys||[])[gi];
  ((window._rollDateGroups||{})[dk]||[]).forEach(r => {
    const sid = String(r.skidId);
    window._rollSelected.delete(sid);
    const row = document.querySelector('tr[data-skid="'+sid+'"]');
    if (row) { row.style.background=''; const c=row.querySelector('.rchk'); if(c) c.checked=false; }
  });
  // Uncheck all chunk header checkboxes within this group
  document.querySelectorAll('#gbody-'+gi+' thead input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(c=>{ c.checked=false; });
  updateRollSelCount();
}

function toggleChunk(cid) {
  const body = document.getElementById('cbody-'+cid);
  const arr  = document.getElementById('carr-'+cid);
  if (!body) return;
  const open = body.style.display !== 'none';
  body.style.display = open ? 'none' : 'block';
  if (arr) arr.textContent = open ? '►' : '▼';
}

function _chunkRolls(cid) {
  const parts = cid.split('-');
  const gi = +parts[0], ci = +parts[1];
  return ((window._rollChunkData||{})[gi]||[])[ci]||[];
}

function selChunk(cid) {
  _chunkRolls(cid).forEach(r => {
    const sid = String(r.skidId);
    window._rollSelected.add(sid);
    const row = document.querySelector('tr[data-skid="'+sid+'"]');
    if (row) { row.style.background='rgba(26,122,74,0.08)'; const c=row.querySelector('.rchk'); if(c) c.checked=true; }
  });
  const hdr = document.querySelector('#cbody-'+cid+' thead input[type="checkbox"]');
  if (hdr) hdr.checked = true;
  updateRollSelCount();
}

function clrChunk(cid) {
  _chunkRolls(cid).forEach(r => {
    const sid = String(r.skidId);
    window._rollSelected.delete(sid);
    const row = document.querySelector('tr[data-skid="'+sid+'"]');
    if (row) { row.style.background=''; const c=row.querySelector('.rchk'); if(c) c.checked=false; }
  });
  const hdr = document.querySelector('#cbody-'+cid+' thead input[type="checkbox"]');
  if (hdr) hdr.checked = false;
  updateRollSelCount();
}

function chunkChk(cid, checked) { if(checked) selChunk(cid); else clrChunk(cid); }

function toggleGrp(gi) {
  const body = document.getElementById('gbody-'+gi);
  const arr  = document.getElementById('garr-'+gi);
  if (!body) return;
  const open = body.style.display !== 'none';
  body.style.display = open ? 'none' : 'block';
  if (arr) arr.textContent = open ? '►' : '▼';
}

function toggleGrpChk(gi, checked) { if(checked) selGrp(gi); else clrGrp(gi); }

function clearAllRollSel() {
  window._rollSelected.clear();
  document.querySelectorAll('tr[data-skid]').forEach(row=>{ row.style.background=''; });
  document.querySelectorAll('.rchk').forEach(c=>{ c.checked=false; });
  // Also uncheck group header checkboxes
  document.querySelectorAll('thead input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(c=>{ c.checked=false; });
  updateRollSelCount();
}

function toggleRoll(row) {
  const skid = row.dataset.skid;
  if (!skid) return;
  const chk = window._rollSelected.has(skid);
  if (chk) { window._rollSelected.delete(skid); row.style.background=''; }
  else { window._rollSelected.add(skid); row.style.background='rgba(26,122,74,0.08)'; }
  const cb = row.querySelector('.rchk');
  if (cb) cb.checked = !chk;
  updateRollSelCount();
}

function toggleRollByChk(chkEl) {
  const skid = chkEl.dataset.skid;
  const row = chkEl.closest('tr');
  if (chkEl.checked) { window._rollSelected.add(skid); if(row) row.style.background='rgba(26,122,74,0.08)'; }
  else { window._rollSelected.delete(skid); if(row) row.style.background=''; }
  updateRollSelCount();
}

function updateRollSelCount() {
  const cnt = window._rollSelected ? window._rollSelected.size : 0;
  const el = document.getElementById('roll-sel-count');
  if (el) el.textContent = cnt+' selected';
  const ticket = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===window._rollTicketId);
  const line = ticket&&ticket.skuLines ? ticket.skuLines[window._rollLineIdx] : null;
  const target = line ? (line.qty||0) : 0;
  const msg = document.getElementById('roll-short-msg');
  if (msg && target>0) {
    if (cnt>=target) { msg.style.color='var(--accent2)'; msg.textContent='✓ Target met: '+cnt+' / '+target+' rolls selected'; }
    else { msg.style.color='var(--warning)'; msg.textContent='⚠ Short: '+cnt+' of '+target+' rolls selected ('+( target-cnt)+' remaining)'; }
  }
}

function saveRollSel() {
  const ticket = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===window._rollTicketId);
  if (!ticket) return;
  const line = ticket.skuLines[window._rollLineIdx];
  const selected = (window._rollList||[]).filter(r=>window._rollSelected.has(String(r.skidId)));
  const sorted = sortRolls(selected, ticket.customer);
  line.selectedRolls = sorted.map(r=>({
    ...r,
    dateRecd: r.dateRecd?r.dateRecd.getTime():null,
    expDate: r.expDate?r.expDate.getTime():null,
    dirExpDate: r.dirExpDate?r.dirExpDate.getTime():null,
  }));
  ticket.selectedRolls = ticket.skuLines.flatMap(l=>l.selectedRolls||[]);
  saveTickets();
  closeModal();
  viewTicket(window._rollTicketId);
}

function removeRollFromLine(id, lineIdx, skidId) {
  const ticket = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===id);
  if (!ticket||!ticket.skuLines[lineIdx]) return;
  ticket.skuLines[lineIdx].selectedRolls=(ticket.skuLines[lineIdx].selectedRolls||[]).filter(r=>r.skidId!==skidId);
  ticket.selectedRolls=ticket.skuLines.flatMap(l=>l.selectedRolls||[]);
  saveTickets();
  viewTicket(id);
}


function updateTicketSkuLine(el) {
  const tid = el.dataset.tid;
  const li = parseInt(el.dataset.li);
  const ticket = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===tid);
  if (!ticket||!ticket.skuLines[li]) return;
  const row = el.closest('div');
  if (!row) return;
  const skuEl = row.querySelector('.sku-edit-sku');
  const buEl = row.querySelector('.sku-edit-bu');
  const qtyEl = row.querySelector('.sku-edit-qty');
  if (buEl) ticket.skuLines[li].bu = buEl.value.trim();
  if (skuEl) ticket.skuLines[li].sku = skuEl.value;
  if (qtyEl) ticket.skuLines[li].qty = parseInt(qtyEl.value)||0;
  const zmoEl = row.querySelector('.sku-edit-zmo');
  if (zmoEl) ticket.skuLines[li].zmo = zmoEl.value.trim();
  const vpoEl = row.querySelector('.sku-edit-vpo');
  if (vpoEl) ticket.skuLines[li].vpo = vpoEl.value.trim();
  const orderNumEl = row.querySelector('.sku-edit-ordernum');
  if (orderNumEl) ticket.skuLines[li].orderNum = orderNumEl.value.trim();
  saveTickets();
  // If BU changed, refresh the view so SKU list updates
  if (el.classList.contains('sku-edit-bu')) {
    viewTicket(tid);
  }
}

function addSkuLineToTicket(tid) {
  const ticket = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===tid);
  if (!ticket) return;
  ticket.skuLines.push({sku:'',bu:ticket.bu||'',qty:0,zmo:'',vpo:'',orderNum:'',selectedRolls:[]});
  saveTickets();
  viewTicket(tid);
}

function removeSkuLineFromTicket(tid, li) {
  const ticket = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===tid);
  if (!ticket||ticket.skuLines.length<=1) return;
  ticket.skuLines.splice(li,1);
  saveTickets();
  viewTicket(tid);
}

function editTicket(id) {
  const t = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===id); if (!t) return;
  const customers = [...new Set(state.inventory.map(r=>r.customer).filter(Boolean))].sort();
  const customerNames = new Set(state.inventory.map(r=>r.customer));
  const allBUs = [...new Set(state.inventory.filter(r=>r.bu&&!customerNames.has(r.bu)).map(r=>r.bu))].sort();

  let h = '<div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()">';
  h += '<div class="modal" style="width:620px">';
  h += '<h2>✎ EDIT TICKET — '+t.id+'</h2>';
  h += '<div class="form-grid">';
  h += '<div class="form-group"><label>DATE</label><input type="date" id="ed-date" value="'+(t.ticketDate||'')+'"></div>';
  h += '<div class="form-group"><label>CLERK</label><input type="text" id="ed-clerk" value="'+(t.clerk||'')+'"></div>';
  h += '<div class="form-group"><label>REFERENCE #</label><input type="text" id="ed-ref" value="'+(t.refNum||'')+'"></div>';
  h += '<div class="form-group"><label>CUSTOMER</label><select id="ed-customer" onchange="editUpdateBU()">';
  h += '<option value="">Select customer...</option>';
  customers.forEach(c => { h += '<option value="'+c+'"'+(c===t.customer?' selected':'')+'>'+c+'</option>'; });
  h += '</select></div>';
  h += '<div class="form-group"><label>BU</label><select id="ed-bu">';
  h += '<option value="">Select BU...</option>';
  allBUs.forEach(b => { h += '<option value="'+b+'"'+(b===t.bu?' selected':'')+'>'+b+'</option>'; });
  h += '</select></div>';
  h += '<div class="form-group"><label>DELIVERY DATE</label><input type="date" id="ed-appt" value="'+(t.appt||'')+'"></div>';
  h += '<div class="form-group"><label>STAGED LOC</label><input type="text" id="ed-staged" value="'+(t.stagedLoc||'')+'"></div>';
  h += '<div class="form-group"><label>DESTINATION</label><input type="text" id="ed-dest" value="'+(t.destination||'')+'"></div>';
  h += '<div class="form-group"><label>PICKER</label><input type="text" id="ed-picker" value="'+(t.picker||'')+'"></div>';
  h += '<div class="form-group"><label>NOTES</label><input type="text" id="ed-notes" value="'+(t.notes||'')+'"></div>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div class="modal-actions">';
  h += '<button class="btn" onclick="closeModal()">Cancel</button>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-primary" data-tid="'+id+'" onclick="saveEdit(this.dataset.tid)">Save Changes</button>';
  h += '</div></div></div>';
  document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML = h;
}

function editUpdateBU() {
  const cust = (document.getElementById('ed-customer')||{}).value || '';
  const customerNames = new Set(state.inventory.map(r=>r.customer));
  const buDisplaySet2 = new Set();
  state.inventory.filter(r=>(!cust||r.customer===cust)&&r.bu).forEach(r=>buDisplaySet2.add(r.bu));
  const buSel = document.getElementById('ed-bu');
  if (!buSel) return;
  const cur = buSel.value;
  buSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select BU...</option>';
  [...buDisplaySet2].sort().forEach(b=>{ const o=document.createElement('option'); o.value=b; o.textContent=b; if(b===cur) o.selected=true; buSel.appendChild(o); });
}


function saveEdit(id) {
  const t = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===id); if (!t) return;
  t.ticketDate  = document.getElementById('ed-date').value;
  t.clerk       = document.getElementById('ed-clerk').value.trim();
  t.refNum      = document.getElementById('ed-ref').value.trim();
  t.customer    = document.getElementById('ed-customer').value;
  t.bu          = document.getElementById('ed-bu').value;
  t.appt        = document.getElementById('ed-appt').value;
  t.stagedLoc   = document.getElementById('ed-staged').value.trim();
  t.destination = document.getElementById('ed-dest').value.trim();
  t.picker      = document.getElementById('ed-picker').value.trim();
  t.notes       = document.getElementById('ed-notes').value.trim();
  // Update BU on all SKU lines to match new BU
  if (t.skuLines) {
    t.skuLines.forEach(l => { l.bu = t.bu; });
  }
  closeModal(); saveTickets(); viewTicket(id);
}

// ─── DELETE / ARCHIVE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function deleteTicket(id) {
  if (!confirm('Delete this pick ticket?')) return;
  state.tickets = state.tickets.filter(t=>t.id!==id);
  state.activeTicket = null;
  saveTickets(); updateTicketList(); showDashboard();
}

function archiveTicket(id, silent=false) {
  if (!isAdmin()) { showAlert('Only admins can archive.','warning'); return; }
  const ticket = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===id); if (!ticket) return;
  if (!silent&&!confirm('Archive this ticket?')) return;
  ticket.archivedAt = Date.now();
  ticket.archivedBy = state.currentUser?state.currentUser.name:'System';
  state.archivedTickets.push(ticket);
  state.tickets = state.tickets.filter(t=>t.id!==id);
  if (state.activeTicket===id) state.activeTicket=null;
  const cutoff = Date.now()-(90*24*60*60*1000);
  state.archivedTickets = state.archivedTickets.filter(t=>t.archivedAt>cutoff);
  saveTickets(); saveArchive(); updateTicketList();
  showDashboard();
  if (!silent) showAlert('Ticket archived.','success');
}

// ─── ARCHIVE LIST ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function switchSidebarTab(tab) {
  state.sidebarTab = tab;
  ['open','archive'].forEach(t => {
    const btn = document.getElementById('tab-'+t);
    if (btn) btn.classList.toggle('active', t===tab);
  });
  if (tab === 'archive') {
    renderArchiveList();
  } else {
    // Re-render open tickets list
    updateTicketList();
  }
}

function renderArchiveList(filterDate='') {
  const list = document.getElementById('ticket-list');
  if (!state.archivedTickets.length) { list.innerHTML='<div style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text2);font-size:11px">No archived tickets</div>'; return; }
  const groups={};
  [...state.archivedTickets].sort((a,b)=>b.archivedAt-a.archivedAt).forEach(t=>{
    const d=new Date(t.archivedAt).toLocaleDateString();
    if (!groups[d]) groups[d]=[];
    groups[d].push(t);
  });
  let html=`<div style="padding:6px 4px"><input type="date" onchange="renderArchiveList(this.value)" style="width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:5px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;margin-bottom:6px;outline:none"></div>`;
  Object.entries(groups).forEach(([date,tickets])=>{
    if (filterDate&&new Date(date).toISOString().split('T')[0]!==filterDate) return;
    html+=`<div class="archive-date-hdr">📅 ${date} — ${tickets.length} ticket${tickets.length>1?'s':''}</div>`;
    tickets.forEach(t=>{
      html+=`<div class="archive-item" onclick="viewArchivedTicket('${t.id}')">
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--accent)">${t.id}</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text)">${t.refNum||'—'} · ${t.customer||'—'}</div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${(t.selectedRolls||[]).length} rolls · ${t.archivedBy||'—'}</div>
      </div>`;
    });
  });
  list.innerHTML=html;
}

function viewArchivedTicket(id) {
  const ticket = state.archivedTickets.find(t=>t.id===id); if (!ticket) return;
  const selected = (ticket.selectedRolls||[]).map(r=>({...r,dateRecd:r.dateRecd?new Date(r.dateRecd):null,expDate:r.expDate?new Date(r.expDate):null,dirExpDate:r.dirExpDate?new Date(r.dirExpDate):null}));
  const totalRolls=selected.length, totalWt=selected.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.grossWt||0),0), totalTons=selected.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);
  document.getElementById('main-panel').innerHTML = `
    <div class="panel">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px">
        <div style="font-size:16px;color:var(--accent2);font-weight:bold">${ticket.id}</div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--accent2);border:1px solid var(--accent2);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;letter-spacing:1px">ARCHIVED</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">Archived ${new Date(ticket.archivedAt).toLocaleString()} by ${ticket.archivedBy||'—'}</div>
        <div style="flex:1"></div>
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="exportPickTicketPDF('${id}',true)">📄 Pick Ticket</button>
        ${isAdmin()?`<button class="btn btn-sm" style="color:var(--accent2);border-color:var(--accent2)" onclick="restoreTicket('${id}')">↩ Restore</button>`:''}
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px">
        <div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">REF #: </span><strong>${ticket.refNum||'—'}</strong></div>
        <div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">CUSTOMER: </span><strong>${ticket.customer||'—'}</strong></div>
        <div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">DESTINATION: </span><strong>${ticket.destination||'—'}</strong></div>
        <div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">ROLLS: </span><strong>${totalRolls}</strong></div>
        <div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">WEIGHT: </span><strong>${totalWt.toLocaleString()} lbs</strong></div>
        <div><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">TONS: </span><strong>${totalTons.toFixed(1)}</strong></div>
      </div>
      <div style="overflow-x:auto">
        <table class="data-table" style="font-size:11px">
          <thead><tr><th>RECV DATE</th><th>EXP DATE</th><th>LOT #</th><th>SKID ID</th><th>PRODUCT ID</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>INBOUND BOL</th><th>SKIDS</th><th>PCS</th><th>WEIGHT</th><th>TONS</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody>
            ${selected.map(r=>`<tr class="${r.status==='DAMAGED'?'dmg-row':''}">
              <td>${r.dateRecd?r.dateRecd.toLocaleDateString():'—'}</td>
              <td>${(r.dirExpDate||r.expDate)?new Date(r.dirExpDate||r.expDate).toLocaleDateString():'—'}</td>
              <td>${r.lot||'—'}</td><td>${r.skidId||'—'}</td>
              <td>${r.productId||'—'}</td><td style="font-weight:bold">${r.location||'—'}</td>
              <td>${r.bol||'—'}</td><td style="text-align:center">1</td><td style="text-align:center">1</td>
              <td style="text-align:right">${(r.grossWt||0).toLocaleString()}</td>
              <td style="text-align:right">${(r.tons||0).toFixed(1)}</td>
            </tr>`).join('')}
            <tr class="totals-row"><td colspan="7" style="text-align:right">GRAND TOTAL</td><td style="text-align:center">${totalRolls}</td><td style="text-align:center">${totalRolls}</td><td style="text-align:right">${totalWt.toLocaleString()}</td><td style="text-align:right">${totalTons.toFixed(1)}</td></tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>`;
}

function restoreTicket(id) {
  if (!isAdmin()) return;
  const ticket = state.archivedTickets.find(t=>t.id===id); if (!ticket) return;
  delete ticket.archivedAt; delete ticket.archivedBy;
  state.tickets.push(ticket);
  state.archivedTickets = state.archivedTickets.filter(t=>t.id!==id);
  saveTickets(); saveArchive();
  switchSidebarTab('open');
  showAlert('Ticket restored.','success');
}

// ─── PDF EXPORTS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function exportPickTicketPDF(id, fromArchive=false) {
  const ticket = fromArchive ? state.archivedTickets.find(t=>t.id===id) : state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===id);
  if (!ticket) return;

  const skuLines = ticket.skuLines||[];
  const allSelected = skuLines.flatMap(l=>(l.selectedRolls||[]).map(r=>({
    ...r,
    dateRecd: r.dateRecd?new Date(r.dateRecd):null,
    expDate: r.expDate?new Date(r.expDate):null,
    dirExpDate: r.dirExpDate?new Date(r.dirExpDate):null,
    _sku: l.sku, _bu: l.bu
  })));
  const totalRolls = allSelected.length;
  const totalWt = allSelected.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.grossWt||0),0);
  const totalTons = allSelected.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);
  const totalQty = skuLines.reduce((s,l)=>s+(l.qty||0),0);

  const {jsPDF} = window.jspdf;
  const doc = new jsPDF({orientation:'landscape', unit:'mm', format:'letter'});
  const pageW=279, margin=10, col2=pageW/2;

  // ── HEADER BOXES (4 across) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  const bw = (pageW-margin*2)/4 - 2;
  doc.setDrawColor(180); doc.setLineWidth(0.4);

  function headerBox(x, label, value, valueSize, valueColor) {
    doc.rect(x, 8, bw, 22);
    doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(7); doc.setTextColor(120);
    doc.text(label, x+2, 14);
    doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(valueSize||14);
    if (Array.isArray(valueColor)) doc.setTextColor(valueColor[0], valueColor[1], valueColor[2]);
    else doc.setTextColor(20);
    doc.text(String(value||''), x+bw/2, 24, {align:'center'});
  }

  headerBox(margin,        'REFERENCE NUMBER', ticket.refNum, 16, [26,82,118]);
  headerBox(margin+bw+2,   'ROLLS', String(totalQty), 22, [26,122,74]);
  headerBox(margin+bw*2+4, 'DELIVERY DATE', ticket.appt||'—', 12);
  headerBox(margin+bw*3+6, 'STAGED LOC', ticket.stagedLoc||'', 12);

  // ── DESTINATION / PICKER ROW ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  const dY = 34;
  const halfW = (pageW-margin*2)/2 - 1;
  const destBoxX = margin;
  const pickerBoxX = margin + halfW + 2;
  doc.rect(destBoxX, dY, halfW, 14);
  doc.rect(pickerBoxX, dY, halfW, 14);
  doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(7); doc.setTextColor(120);
  doc.text('DESTINATION', destBoxX+2, dY+5);
  doc.text('PICKER', pickerBoxX+2, dY+5);
  doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(13); doc.setTextColor(20);
  // Center destination within its box
  doc.text((ticket.destination||'').substring(0,35), destBoxX + halfW/2, dY+11, {align:'center'});
  doc.text((ticket.picker||'').substring(0,30), pickerBoxX + halfW/2, dY+11, {align:'center'});

  // ── NOTES ROW ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const nY = dY + 16;
  const fullW = pageW - margin*2;
  doc.rect(margin, nY, fullW, 12);
  doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(7); doc.setTextColor(120);
  doc.text('NOTES', margin+2, nY+4);
  if (ticket.notes) {
    doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(10); doc.setTextColor(20);
    doc.text(ticket.notes.substring(0,120), margin + fullW/2, nY+9, {align:'center'});
  }

  // ── INFO BAR ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  let startY = nY + 15;
  doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(7); doc.setTextColor(80);
  const infoText = 'Pcs Pending: '+allSelected.filter(r=>r.pcsPending>0).length+
    '  |  Customer: '+(ticket.customer||'—')+
    (ticket.vpo?'  |  VPO: '+ticket.vpo:'')+
    (ticket.zmo?'  |  ZMO: '+ticket.zmo:'')+
    '  |  Inv Status: AVAILABLE';
  doc.text(infoText, margin, startY);
  startY += 5;

  // ── SKU LINE SUMMARY ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (skuLines.length > 0) {
    // Draw SKU lines as a prominent banner
    const skuBannerH = skuLines.filter(l=>l.sku).length * 10 + 4;
    doc.setFillColor(240, 245, 255);
    doc.rect(margin, startY, pageW-margin*2, skuBannerH, 'F');
    doc.setDrawColor(26,82,118); doc.setLineWidth(0.3);
    doc.rect(margin, startY, pageW-margin*2, skuBannerH);

    let skuY = startY + 7;
    const validSkuLines = skuLines.filter(l=>l.sku);
    validSkuLines.forEach((l, li) => {
      const qty = l.qty||0;
      // SKU label (fixed width column)
      doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
      doc.text('SKU:', margin+4, skuY);
      // SKU value (bold, fixed start position)
      doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(11); doc.setTextColor(26,82,118);
      doc.text(l.sku, margin+18, skuY);
      // BU — match SKU font style
      if (l.bu) {
        doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
        doc.text('·', margin+18+58, skuY);
        doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(11); doc.setTextColor(26,82,118);
        doc.text(l.bu, margin+18+64, skuY);
      }
      // ZMO — match SKU/BU font style
      if (l.zmo) {
        doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
        doc.text('·', margin+18+105, skuY);
        doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
        doc.text('ZMO:', margin+18+110, skuY);
        doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(11); doc.setTextColor(26,82,118);
        doc.text(l.zmo, margin+18+122, skuY);
      }
      // VPO — match SKU/BU font style
      if (l.vpo) {
        const vpoX = l.zmo ? margin+18+165 : margin+18+110;
        doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
        doc.text('·', vpoX, skuY);
        doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
        doc.text('VPO:', vpoX+5, skuY);
        doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(11); doc.setTextColor(26,82,118);
        doc.text(l.vpo, vpoX+17, skuY);
      }
      // QTY - right aligned, bold green, same size
      doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(11); doc.setTextColor(26,122,74);
      doc.text(String(qty)+' rolls', pageW-margin-4, skuY, {align:'right'});

      if (li < validSkuLines.length-1) {
        doc.setDrawColor(200); doc.setLineWidth(0.2);
        doc.line(margin+2, skuY+3, pageW-margin-2, skuY+3);
      }
      skuY += 10;
    });
    startY += skuBannerH + 3;
  }

  // ── TABLE — segmented by SKU ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Col 0=RECV DATE, 1=EXP DATE, 2=PICKED(checkbox), 3=LOT#, 4=SKID ID,
  // 5=PRODUCT ID, 6=PRODUCT ID 2, 7=LOCATION, 8=INBOUND BOL, 9=SKIDS, 10=PCS, 11=WEIGHT, 12=TONS
  const head = [['RECV DATE','EXP DATE','PICKED','LOT #','SKID ID','PRODUCT ID','PRODUCT ID 2','LOCATION','STATUS','PCS','WEIGHT','TONS']];
  // 11 cols, total 259mm — BOL + SKIDS removed, more room for content
  const colStyles = {
    0:{cellWidth:20},                         // RECV DATE
    1:{cellWidth:20},                         // EXP DATE
    2:{cellWidth:13, halign:'center'},         // PICKED (checkbox)
    3:{cellWidth:30},                         // LOT #
    4:{cellWidth:23},                         // SKID ID
    5:{cellWidth:36},                         // PRODUCT ID
    6:{cellWidth:22},                         // PRODUCT ID 2
    7:{cellWidth:22},                         // LOCATION
    8:{cellWidth:20},                         // STATUS
    9:{cellWidth:14, halign:'center'},         // PCS
    10:{cellWidth:19, halign:'right'},         // WEIGHT
    11:{cellWidth:18, halign:'right'}          // TONS
  };

  // Group by SKU line
  skuLines.forEach((line, li) => {
    const lineRolls = (line.selectedRolls||[]).map(r=>({
      ...r,
      dateRecd: r.dateRecd?new Date(r.dateRecd):null,
      expDate: r.expDate?new Date(r.expDate):null,
      dirExpDate: r.dirExpDate?new Date(r.dirExpDate):null,
    }));
    if (lineRolls.length===0 && skuLines.length===1) return;

    const lineWt = lineRolls.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.grossWt||0),0);
    const lineTons = lineRolls.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);

    const tableRows = lineRolls.map(r=>[
      r.dateRecd?r.dateRecd.toLocaleDateString():'—',
      (r.dirExpDate||r.expDate)?new Date(r.dirExpDate||r.expDate).toLocaleDateString():'—',
      '', // PICKED — checkbox drawn in didDrawCell
      r.lot||'—', r.skidId||'—', r.productId||'—', r.prod2||'—', r.location||'—', ((r.pcsPending||0)>0?'PICKED':(r.status||'AVAILABLE')),
      '1',
      (r.grossWt||0).toLocaleString(), (r.tons||0).toFixed(1)
    ]);

    // Subtotal row per SKU
    if (skuLines.length>1) {
      tableRows.push(['','','','','','','','Subtotal',String(lineRolls.length),String(lineRolls.length),lineWt.toLocaleString(),lineTons.toFixed(1)]);
    }

    // ── Per-SKU label above each table ──────────────────────────────────────
    {
      // Build label parts: SKU · BU · ZMO · VPO
      let labelX = margin;
      const labelY = startY + 4;
      doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
      doc.text('SKU:', labelX, labelY);
      labelX += 10;
      doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(11); doc.setTextColor(26,82,118);
      doc.text(line.sku||'', labelX, labelY);
      labelX += doc.getTextWidth(line.sku||'') + 5;
      if (line.bu) {
        doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
        doc.text('·', labelX, labelY); labelX += 4;
        doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
        doc.text('BU:', labelX, labelY); labelX += 8;
        doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(11); doc.setTextColor(26,82,118);
        doc.text(line.bu, labelX, labelY);
        labelX += doc.getTextWidth(line.bu) + 5;
      }
      if (line.zmo) {
        doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
        doc.text('·', labelX, labelY); labelX += 4;
        doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
        doc.text('ZMO:', labelX, labelY); labelX += 12;
        doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(11); doc.setTextColor(26,82,118);
        doc.text(line.zmo, labelX, labelY);
        labelX += doc.getTextWidth(line.zmo) + 5;
      }
      if (line.vpo) {
        doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
        doc.text('·', labelX, labelY); labelX += 4;
        doc.text('VPO:', labelX, labelY); labelX += 12;
        doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(11); doc.setTextColor(26,82,118);
        doc.text(line.vpo, labelX, labelY);
        labelX += doc.getTextWidth(line.vpo) + 5;
      }
      if (line.orderNum) {
        doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(8); doc.setTextColor(80);
        doc.text('·', labelX, labelY); labelX += 4;
        doc.text('ORDER:', labelX, labelY); labelX += 16;
        doc.setFont('helvetica','bold'); doc.setFontSize(11); doc.setTextColor(26,82,118);
        doc.text(line.orderNum, labelX, labelY);
      }
      startY += 8;
    }

    doc.autoTable({
      startY,
      margin:{left:margin, right:margin},
      tableWidth: pageW-margin*2,
      showHead: 'everyPage',
      pageBreak: 'auto',
      rowPageBreak: 'avoid',
      didDrawPage: function(data) { startY = data.settings.startY; },
      didDrawCell: function(data) {
        // Draw a small checkbox in the PICKED column (col 2) for body rows
        if (data.column.index===2 && data.section==='body') {
          const isSubtotal = data.row.index===tableRows.length-1 && skuLines.length>1;
          if (!isSubtotal) {
            const x = data.cell.x + (data.cell.width - 4) / 2;
            const y = data.cell.y + (data.cell.height - 4) / 2;
            doc.setDrawColor(80); doc.setLineWidth(0.4);
            doc.rect(x, y, 4, 4);
          }
        }
      },
      head,
      body: tableRows,
      styles:{fontSize:8.5, cellPadding:2},
      headStyles:{fillColor:[26,82,118], textColor:255, fontStyle:'bold'},
      columnStyles: colStyles,
      didParseCell: function(data) {
        const isSubtotal = data.row.index===tableRows.length-1 && skuLines.length>1;
        if (isSubtotal) { data.cell.styles.fontStyle='bold'; data.cell.styles.fillColor=[235,245,255]; }
      }
    });

    startY = doc.lastAutoTable.finalY + 3;
  });

  // Grand Total
  if (skuLines.length>1 && totalRolls>0) {
    doc.autoTable({
      startY: startY+2,
      margin:{left:margin,right:margin},
      tableWidth:pageW-margin*2,
      showHead:'never',
      body:[['','','','','','','GRAND TOTAL',String(totalRolls),String(totalRolls),totalWt.toLocaleString(),totalTons.toFixed(1)]],
      styles:{fontSize:8,cellPadding:2,fontStyle:'bold'},
      columnStyles:{...colStyles, 5:{cellWidth:colStyles[5].cellWidth,halign:'right'}},
      didParseCell: function(data) { data.cell.styles.fillColor=[220,240,220]; }
    });
  }

  // ── FOOTER ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const pageH = 216;
  let footY = doc.lastAutoTable.finalY + 8;
  if (footY + 38 > pageH-5) { doc.addPage(); footY=15; }

  doc.setFont('helvetica','normal'); doc.setFontSize(7); doc.setTextColor(100);
  doc.text('STAGE LOC', margin, footY);
  doc.setDrawColor(180); doc.setLineWidth(0.3);
  doc.rect(margin, footY+2, pageW-margin*2, 12);
  const verY = footY+20;
  doc.text('VERIFIED BY', margin, verY);
  doc.line(margin, verY+7, col2-5, verY+7);
  doc.text('VER. DATE', col2+5, verY);
  doc.line(col2+5, verY+7, pageW-margin, verY+7);

  window.open(URL.createObjectURL(doc.output('blob')),'_blank');
}


function exportLoadTag(id) {
  const ticket = state.tickets.find(t=>t.id===id); if (!ticket) return;
  const totalRolls = (ticket.selectedRolls||[]).length;
  const {jsPDF}=window.jspdf;

  function drawTag(doc) {
    const pageW=279,pageH=216,cx=pageW/2;
    doc.setFillColor(255,255,255); doc.rect(0,0,pageW,pageH,'F');
    doc.setDrawColor(200); doc.setLineWidth(0.5);
    doc.rect(10,5,pageW-20,pageH-10);
    doc.setFont('helvetica','bold');
    doc.setFontSize(14); doc.setTextColor(120);
    doc.text('REFERENCE #',cx,48,{align:'center'});
    doc.setFontSize(56); doc.setTextColor(20);
    doc.text(ticket.refNum||'—',cx,90,{align:'center'});
    doc.setDrawColor(200); doc.setLineWidth(0.3);
    doc.line(40,100,pageW-40,100);
    doc.setFontSize(14); doc.setTextColor(120);
    doc.text('DESTINATION',cx,115,{align:'center'});
    doc.setFontSize(36); doc.setTextColor(20);
    doc.text(ticket.destination||'—',cx,138,{align:'center'});
    doc.line(40,148,pageW-40,148);
    doc.setFontSize(14); doc.setTextColor(120);
    doc.text('APPT.',cx,162,{align:'center'});
    doc.setFontSize(28); doc.setTextColor(20);
    doc.text(ticket.appt||'—',cx,182,{align:'center'});
  }

  const doc=new jsPDF({orientation:'landscape',unit:'mm',format:'letter'});
  drawTag(doc); doc.addPage(); drawTag(doc);
  window.open(URL.createObjectURL(doc.output('blob')),'_blank');
}

// ─── DATA PREVIEW ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function clearDirFilter() {
  var l=document.getElementById('df-lot'); if(l) l.value='';
  var s=document.getElementById('df-sku'); if(s) s.value='';
  applyDirFilter();
}

function applyDirFilter() {
  const lotF = (document.getElementById('df-lot')||{}).value||'';
  const skuF = (document.getElementById('df-sku')||{}).value||'';
  const lotQ = lotF.trim().toUpperCase();
  const skuQ = skuF.trim().toUpperCase();
  const allEntries = Object.entries(state.dirData||{});
  const filtered = allEntries.filter(([batch,d])=>{
    if (lotQ && !batch.toUpperCase().includes(lotQ)) return false;
    if (skuQ && !(d.material||'').toUpperCase().includes(skuQ) && !(d.matDesc||'').toUpperCase().includes(skuQ)) return false;
    return true;
  });
  const countEl = document.getElementById('dir-record-count');
  if (countEl) countEl.textContent = filtered.length.toLocaleString()+' of '+allEntries.length.toLocaleString()+' records shown';
  const wrap = document.getElementById('dir-table-wrap');
  if (!wrap) return;
  if (filtered.length===0) { wrap.innerHTML='<div style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text2)">No matching DIR records.</div>'; return; }
  let t = '<table class="data-table" style="font-size:11px"><thead><tr><th>BATCH / LOT #</th><th>MATERIAL #</th><th>MATERIAL DESC</th><th>DOC TYPE</th><th>ZMO</th><th>CUSTOMER PO</th><th>MFG DATE</th><th>CUSTOMER</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
  filtered.forEach(([batch,d])=>{
    t += '<tr>';
    t += '<td style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">'+batch+'</td>';
    t += '<td style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">'+(d.material||'—')+'</td>';
    t += '<td style="font-size:10px">'+(d.matDesc||'—')+'</td>';
    t += '<td>'+(d.docType||'—')+'</td>';
    const dZmo = d.zmo || (d.soDoc ? d.soDoc+(d.soItem?'-'+d.soItem:'') : '');
    t += '<td style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2)">'+(dZmo||'—')+'</td>';
    t += '<td>'+(d.customerPO||'—')+'</td>';
    t += '<td>'+(d.mfgDate||'—')+'</td>';
    t += '<td>'+(d.customerName||'—')+'</td>';
    t += '</tr>';
  });
  t += '</tbody></table>';
  wrap.innerHTML = t;
}


function applyInvFilter(page) {
  page = page||0;
  const cust = (document.getElementById('f-cust')||{}).value||'';
  // Populate BU dropdown if empty
  const buSel = document.getElementById('f-bu');
  if (buSel && buSel.options.length <= 1) {
    const bus = [...new Set(state.inventory.map(r=>r.bu).filter(Boolean))].sort();
    bus.forEach(b => { const o=document.createElement('option'); o.value=b; o.textContent=b; buSel.appendChild(o); });
  }
  const bu   = (buSel||{}).value||'';
  const sku  = (document.getElementById('f-sku')||{}).value||'';
  const loc  = (document.getElementById('f-loc')||{}).value||'';
  const lot  = (document.getElementById('f-lot')||{}).value||'';
  window._invPage = page;

  let filtered = state.inventory;
  if (cust) filtered = filtered.filter(r=>r.customer.toLowerCase().includes(cust.toLowerCase()));
  if (bu)   filtered = filtered.filter(r=>(r.bu||'').toLowerCase()===bu.toLowerCase());
  if (sku)  filtered = filtered.filter(r=>r.sku.toLowerCase().includes(sku.toLowerCase()));
  if (loc)  filtered = filtered.filter(r=>r.location.toLowerCase().includes(loc.toLowerCase()));
  if (lot)  filtered = filtered.filter(r=>(r.lot||'').toLowerCase().includes(lot.toLowerCase()));
  // Sort by Customer → SKU → Lot #
  filtered = [...filtered].sort((a,b)=>{
    const cCmp = (a.customer||'').localeCompare(b.customer||'');
    if (cCmp!==0) return cCmp;
    const sCmp = (a.sku||'').localeCompare(b.sku||'', undefined, {numeric:true});
    if (sCmp!==0) return sCmp;
    return (a.lot||'').localeCompare(b.lot||'', undefined, {numeric:true, sensitivity:'base'});
  });

  const ps=50, st=page*ps, sl=filtered.slice(st,st+ps), tot=filtered.length, pg=Math.ceil(tot/ps)||1;
  const isFiltered = cust||bu||sku||loc||lot;

  let h = '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px">';
  h += '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">Showing '+(st+1)+'–'+Math.min(st+ps,tot)+' of '+tot.toLocaleString()+' rolls'+(isFiltered?' (filtered)':'')+'</span>';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;gap:6px">';
  if (page>0) h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="applyInvFilter('+(page-1)+')">← Prev</button>';
  h += '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);padding:5px 8px">Page '+(page+1)+'/'+pg+'</span>';
  if (page<pg-1) h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="applyInvFilter('+(page+1)+')">Next →</button>';
  h += '</div></div>';

  h += '<div style="overflow-x:auto"><table class="data-table" style="font-size:11px">';
  h += '<thead><tr><th>CUSTOMER</th><th>SKU</th><th>PROD ID 1</th><th>PROD ID 2</th><th>PCS</th><th>PCS PEND</th><th>STATUS</th><th>LOT #</th><th>SKID ID</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>DATE REC\'D</th><th>EXP DATE</th><th>ZMO</th><th>WEIGHT</th></tr></thead><tbody>';

  sl.forEach(r => {
    const expD = r.dirExpDate||r.expDate;
    const zmo = r.zmo||(r.lot&&state.dirData[r.lot]?state.dirData[r.lot].zmo:'')||'—';
    h += '<tr class="'+(r.status==='DAMAGED'?'dmg-row':'')+'">';
    h += '<td style="color:var(--accent)">'+(r.customer||'—')+'</td>';
    h += '<td>'+(r.sku||'—')+'</td>';
    h += '<td style="font-size:10px">'+(r.productId||'—')+'</td>';
    h += '<td style="font-size:10px">'+(r.prod2||'—')+'</td>';
    h += '<td style="text-align:center">'+r.pcs+'</td>';
    h += '<td style="text-align:center;'+(r.pcsPending>0?'color:var(--warning);font-weight:bold':'')+'">'+(r.pcsPending||0)+'</td>';
    const isPicked = (r.pcsPending||0) > 0;
    const displayStatus = isPicked ? 'PICKED' : (r.status||'AVAILABLE');
    const statusColor = isPicked ? 'var(--warning)' : r.status==='DAMAGED' ? 'var(--danger)' : r.status==='GHOST' ? 'var(--text2)' : r.status==='CYCLE COUNT' ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--accent2)';
    h += '<td style="color:'+statusColor+';font-weight:bold">'+displayStatus+'</td>';
    h += '<td style="font-size:10px">'+(r.lot||'—')+'</td>';
    h += '<td style="font-size:10px">'+(r.skidId||'—')+'</td>';
    h += '<td style="font-weight:bold">'+(r.location||'—')+'</td>';
    h += '<td>'+(r.dateRecd?new Date(r.dateRecd).toLocaleDateString():'—')+'</td>';
    h += '<td>'+(expD?new Date(expD).toLocaleDateString():'—')+'</td>';
    h += '<td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--accent)">'+zmo+'</td>';
    h += '<td style="text-align:right">'+(r.grossWt||0).toLocaleString()+'</td>';
    h += '</tr>';
  });

  h += '</tbody></table></div>';
  const wrap = document.getElementById('inv-table-wrap');
  if (wrap) wrap.innerHTML = h;
}

function clearInvFilters() {
  ['f-cust','f-sku','f-loc','f-lot'].forEach(id=>{ const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.value=''; });
  const buSel2=document.getElementById('f-bu'); if(buSel2) buSel2.value='';
  applyInvFilter(0);
}

// ─── TON SNAPSHOT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function buildTonSnapshotData() {
  const inv = state.inventory;
  const getStatus = r => {
    if ((r.pcsPending||0) > 0) return 'PICKED';
    const loc = (r.location||'').toUpperCase();
    const st  = (r.status||'').toUpperCase();
    if (loc === '23-GHOST-00' || st === 'GHOST') return 'GHOST';
    if (st === 'DAMAGED' || loc.includes('23-QH')) return 'DAMAGED';
    if (loc.includes('CYC_CNT') || st === 'CYCLE COUNT') return 'CYCLE COUNT';
    return 'AVAILABLE';
  };
  const statuses = ['AVAILABLE','PICKED','DAMAGED','CYCLE COUNT','GHOST'];
  const customers = [...new Set(inv.map(r=>r.customer||'UNKNOWN'))].sort();
  const map = {};
  customers.forEach(c => {
    map[c] = {};
    [...statuses,'TOTAL'].forEach(s => map[c][s] = {tons:0, rolls:0});
  });
  const grand = {};
  [...statuses,'TOTAL'].forEach(s => grand[s] = {tons:0, rolls:0});

  inv.forEach(r => {
    const cust = r.customer||'UNKNOWN';
    const st   = getStatus(r);
    const tons = r.tons||0;
    map[cust][st].tons  += tons; map[cust][st].rolls  += 1;
    map[cust]['TOTAL'].tons += tons; map[cust]['TOTAL'].rolls += 1;
    grand[st].tons  += tons; grand[st].rolls  += 1;
    grand['TOTAL'].tons += tons; grand['TOTAL'].rolls += 1;
  });
  return { customers: map, grand };
}

function saveTonSnapshot(auto) {
  if (!db) { if (!auto) showAlert('Not connected.','warning'); return; }
  const today    = new Date();
  const dateKey  = today.toISOString().slice(0,10); // YYYY-MM-DD
  const snap     = buildTonSnapshotData();
  const payload  = {
    date:      dateKey,
    savedAt:   today.getTime(),
    savedBy:   state.currentUser || 'system',
    importTs:  state.lastImport  || null,
    customers: snap.customers,
    grand:     snap.grand
  };
  db.ref('6021/tonSnapshots/' + dateKey).set(payload)
    .then(() => {
      if (!auto) showAlert('✓ Snapshot saved for ' + today.toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'long',day:'numeric',year:'numeric'}), 'success');
    })
    .catch(err => { if (!auto) showAlert('Error: '+err.message,'danger'); });
}

function viewTonSnapshots() {
  const panel = document.getElementById('main-panel');
  panel.innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px"><div style="color:var(--text2)">Loading snapshots...</div></div>';
  if (!db) { panel.innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px"><div class="alert alert-warning">Not connected.</div></div>'; return; }

  db.ref('6021/tonSnapshots').orderByChild('savedAt').once('value', snap => {
    const data = snap.val() || {};
    const snaps = Object.values(data).sort((a,b) => b.savedAt - a.savedAt);

    if (!snaps.length) {
      panel.innerHTML = `<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px">
          <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px">📅 TON SNAPSHOT HISTORY</div>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="showInventorySummary()">← Back</button>
        </div>
        <div style="color:var(--text2);text-align:center;padding:40px">No snapshots saved yet. Use 📸 Save Snapshot from the ton view.</div>
      </div>`;
      return;
    }

    const statuses  = ['AVAILABLE','PICKED','DAMAGED','CYCLE COUNT','GHOST','TOTAL'];
    const sColors   = { 'AVAILABLE':'var(--accent2)','PICKED':'var(--warning)','DAMAGED':'var(--danger)','CYCLE COUNT':'var(--accent)','GHOST':'var(--text2)','TOTAL':'var(--text)' };
    const firstSnap = snaps[0];

    // Build date selector
    let dateOpts = snaps.map(s => `<option value="${s.date}">${new Date(s.savedAt).toLocaleDateString('en-US',{weekday:'short',month:'short',day:'numeric',year:'numeric'})} — ${new Date(s.savedAt).toLocaleTimeString('en-US',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}</option>`).join('');

    let html = `
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
      <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px">📅 TON SNAPSHOT HISTORY</div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
        <select id="snap-date-sel" onchange="renderTonSnapshot(this.value)"
          style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:12px;outline:none">
          ${dateOpts}
        </select>
        ${isAdmin()?`<button onclick="deleteTonSnapshot(document.getElementById('snap-date-sel').value)" style="background:none;border:none;color:var(--danger);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px" title="Delete this snapshot">🗑</button>`:''}
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="showInventorySummary()">← Back to Current</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="snap-content"></div>`;

    panel.innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px">' + html + '</div>';
    window._tonSnapsData = data;
    renderTonSnapshot(firstSnap.date);
  });
}

function renderTonSnapshot(dateKey) {
  const data  = window._tonSnapsData || {};
  const snap  = data[dateKey];
  if (!snap) return;

  const statuses = ['AVAILABLE','PICKED','DAMAGED','CYCLE COUNT','GHOST','TOTAL'];
  const sColors  = { 'AVAILABLE':'var(--accent2)','PICKED':'var(--warning)','DAMAGED':'var(--danger)','CYCLE COUNT':'var(--accent)','GHOST':'var(--text2)','TOTAL':'var(--text)' };
  const isSmurfit = c => c && (c.toUpperCase().includes('SMURFIT') || c.toUpperCase().includes('WESTROCK'));
  const customers = Object.keys(snap.customers||{}).sort();
  const grand     = snap.grand || {};
  const fmt = n => Math.round(n||0);

  // Summary bar
  let html = `<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:12px">
    Snapshot: ${new Date(snap.savedAt).toLocaleString()} &nbsp;·&nbsp; Saved by: ${snap.savedBy}
    ${snap.importTs ? ' &nbsp;·&nbsp; Import: '+new Date(snap.importTs).toLocaleString() : ''}
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:20px">
    ${statuses.map(s=>`
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:${sColors[s]};font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:4px">${s}</div>
        <div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;color:${sColors[s]}">${fmt(grand[s]?.tons||0)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${grand[s]?.rolls||0} rolls</div>
      </div>`).join('')}
  </div>

  <!-- Table -->
  <div style="overflow-x:auto">
  <table class="data-table" style="font-size:12px">
    <thead><tr>
      <th>CUSTOMER</th>
      ${statuses.map(s=>`<th style="text-align:right;color:${sColors[s]}">${s}</th>`).join('')}
    </tr></thead>
    <tbody>`;

  customers.forEach((cust, ci) => {
    const row = snap.customers[cust] || {};
    if (isSmurfit(cust)) {
      html += `<tr style="background:var(--surface2);font-weight:bold">
        <td style="color:var(--accent)">${cust}</td>
        ${statuses.map(s=>`<td style="text-align:right;font-weight:bold;color:${sColors[s]}">${fmt(row[s]?.tons||0)}<br><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2)">${row[s]?.rolls||0}r</span></td>`).join('')}
      </tr>`;
    } else {
      html += `<tr style="background:${ci%2!==0?'var(--surface2)':''}">
        <td style="color:var(--text)">${cust}</td>
        ${statuses.map(s=>`<td style="text-align:right;color:${sColors[s]}">${fmt(row[s]?.tons||0)}<br><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2)">${row[s]?.rolls||0}r</span></td>`).join('')}
      </tr>`;
    }
  });

  html += `<tr style="background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-weight:bold;font-size:13px">
    <td style="padding:8px 10px">GRAND TOTAL</td>
    ${statuses.map(s=>`<td style="text-align:right;padding:8px 10px">${fmt(grand[s]?.tons||0)}<br><span style="font-size:9px;opacity:0.8">${grand[s]?.rolls||0}r</span></td>`).join('')}
  </tr></tbody></table></div>`;

  document.getElementById('snap-content').innerHTML = html;
}

function deleteTonSnapshot(dateKey) {
  if (!dateKey || !db) return;
  if (!confirm('Delete snapshot for ' + dateKey + '?')) return;
  db.ref('6021/tonSnapshots/' + dateKey).remove()
    .then(() => { showAlert('Snapshot deleted.','success'); viewTonSnapshots(); })
    .catch(err => showAlert('Error: '+err.message,'danger'));
}


function showInventorySummary() {
  const inv = state.inventory;
  if (!inv.length) { showAlert('No inventory loaded.','warning'); return; }
  window._summarySmurfitExpanded = window._summarySmurfitExpanded || false;

  const getStatus = r => {
    if ((r.pcsPending||0) > 0) return 'PICKED';
    const loc = (r.location||'').toUpperCase();
    const st  = (r.status||'').toUpperCase();
    if (loc === '23-GHOST-00' || st === 'GHOST') return 'GHOST';
    if (st === 'DAMAGED' || loc.includes('23-QH')) return 'DAMAGED';
    // Cycle Count location pattern: 23-CYC_CNT-00
    if (loc.includes('CYC_CNT') || loc.includes('CYC-CNT') || st === 'CYCLE COUNT') return 'CYCLE COUNT';
    return 'AVAILABLE';
  };

  const statuses = ['AVAILABLE','PICKED','DAMAGED','CYCLE COUNT','GHOST'];
  const allCols = [...statuses, 'TOTAL'];
  const statusColors = {
    'AVAILABLE':'var(--accent2)', 'PICKED':'var(--warning)',
    'DAMAGED':'var(--danger)', 'CYCLE COUNT':'var(--accent)',
    'GHOST':'var(--text2)', 'TOTAL':'var(--text)'
  };

  // Identify Smurfit Westrock rows
  const isSmurfit = c => c && (c.toUpperCase().includes('SMURFIT') || c.toUpperCase().includes('WESTROCK'));
  const customers = [...new Set(inv.map(r=>r.customer||'UNKNOWN'))].sort();

  const emptyBucket = () => ({tons:0, rolls:0});
  const addTo = (bucket, r) => { bucket.tons += r.tons||0; bucket.rolls += 1; };

  // Build customer map
  const map = {};
  customers.forEach(c => {
    map[c] = {};
    allCols.forEach(s => map[c][s] = emptyBucket());
  });

  // Build BU map for Smurfit rows
  const buMap = {}; // bu → status → {tons,rolls}

  inv.forEach(r => {
    const c = r.customer||'UNKNOWN';
    const s = getStatus(r);
    if (!map[c]) return;
    addTo(map[c][s], r); addTo(map[c]['TOTAL'], r);
    if (isSmurfit(c)) {
      const bu = r.bu||'UNKNOWN BU';
      if (!buMap[bu]) { buMap[bu]={}; allCols.forEach(s2=>buMap[bu][s2]=emptyBucket()); }
      addTo(buMap[bu][s], r); addTo(buMap[bu]['TOTAL'], r);
    }
  });

  // Grand totals
  const grand = {}; allCols.forEach(s => grand[s] = emptyBucket());
  inv.forEach(r => { const s=getStatus(r); addTo(grand[s],r); addTo(grand['TOTAL'],r); });

  const cell = (d, isTotal=false, color='') => {
    if (!d||(!d.tons&&!d.rolls)) return `<td style="text-align:right;color:var(--text2);opacity:0.35;${isTotal?'font-weight:bold;border-left:2px solid var(--border)':''}">${isTotal?'0':'—'}</td>`;
    return `<td style="text-align:right;font-weight:${isTotal?'bold':'normal'};color:${color||statusColors['AVAILABLE']};${isTotal?'border-left:2px solid var(--border)':''}">
      <div style="font-weight:bold;font-size:${isTotal?'14px':'inherit'}">${d.tons.toFixed(0)}</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2)">${d.rolls.toLocaleString()} rolls</div>
    </td>`;
  };

  const sortedBUs = Object.keys(buMap).sort();
  const expanded = window._summarySmurfitExpanded;

  // Separate Smurfit rows from others — merge into one combined Smurfit row
  const smurfitCustomers = customers.filter(c=>isSmurfit(c));
  const otherCustomers = customers.filter(c=>!isSmurfit(c));

  // Combine all Smurfit customers into one total
  const smurfitTotal = {}; allCols.forEach(s=>smurfitTotal[s]=emptyBucket());
  smurfitCustomers.forEach(c => allCols.forEach(s=>{
    smurfitTotal[s].tons += map[c][s].tons;
    smurfitTotal[s].rolls += map[c][s].rolls;
  }));

  const renderCustomerRow = (c, ci, altBg) => `
    <tr style="background:${altBg?'var(--surface)':''}">
      <td style="font-weight:bold">${c}</td>
      ${allCols.map(s=>cell(map[c][s], s==='TOTAL', statusColors[s])).join('')}
    </tr>`;

  // Build all rows
  let rows = '';
  let rowIdx = 0;

  otherCustomers.forEach(c => {
    rows += renderCustomerRow(c, rowIdx, rowIdx%2!==0);
    rowIdx++;
  });

  // Smurfit combined row with expand toggle
  if (smurfitCustomers.length) {
    rows += `
    <tr style="background:rgba(61,92,230,0.05);cursor:pointer" onclick="toggleSmurfitBU()" title="Click to ${expanded?'collapse':'expand'} BU detail">
      <td style="font-weight:bold">
        <span id="smurfit-chevron" style="color:var(--accent);margin-right:6px;font-size:12px">${expanded?'▼':'▶'}</span>
        SMURFIT WESTROCK
        <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-left:6px">${expanded?'(collapse)':'(expand by BU)'}</span>
      </td>
      ${allCols.map(s=>cell(smurfitTotal[s], s==='TOTAL', statusColors[s])).join('')}
    </tr>`;

    // BU sub-rows (shown/hidden based on expanded state)
    sortedBUs.forEach((bu,bi) => {
      rows += `
      <tr class="smurfit-bu-row" style="display:${expanded?'table-row':'none'};background:rgba(61,92,230,0.03)">
        <td style="padding-left:28px;color:var(--accent);font-size:11px">↳ ${bu}</td>
        ${allCols.map(s=>cell(buMap[bu][s], s==='TOTAL', statusColors[s])).join('')}
      </tr>`;
    });
    // Smurfit subtotal row (shown when expanded)
    rows += `
    <tr class="smurfit-bu-row" style="display:${expanded?'table-row':'none'};background:rgba(61,92,230,0.1);border-top:2px solid rgba(61,92,230,0.3)">
      <td style="padding-left:14px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px">▶ SMURFIT WESTROCK TOTAL</td>
      ${allCols.map(s=>cell(smurfitTotal[s], true, statusColors[s])).join('')}
    </tr>`;
  }

  let h = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px">📊 INVENTORY SUMMARY — TONS BY CUSTOMER</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px">Last import: ${state.lastImport?new Date(state.lastImport).toLocaleString():'—'}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="viewTonSnapshots()" style="font-size:11px">📅 View History</button>
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="saveTonSnapshot()" style="font-size:11px;background:var(--accent2);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent2)">📸 Save Snapshot</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:20px">
    ${allCols.map(s=>`
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;text-align:center">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:${statusColors[s]};letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:4px">${s}</div>
        <div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:bold;color:${statusColors[s]}">${(grand[s]?.tons||0).toFixed(0)}</div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${(grand[s]?.rolls||0).toLocaleString()} rolls</div>
      </div>`).join('')}
  </div>

  <div style="overflow-x:auto">
  <table class="data-table" id="inv-summary-table">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th style="text-align:left;min-width:200px">CUSTOMER / BU</th>
        ${allCols.map(s=>`<th style="text-align:right;color:${statusColors[s]}">${s}</th>`).join('')}
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>${rows}</tbody>
    <tfoot>
      <tr style="background:var(--surface2);border-top:3px solid var(--border)">
        <td style="font-weight:bold;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:1px">GRAND TOTAL</td>
        ${allCols.map(s=>`<td style="text-align:right;font-weight:bold;color:${statusColors[s]}">
          <div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:bold">${(grand[s]?.tons||0).toFixed(0)}</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${(grand[s]?.rolls||0).toLocaleString()} rolls</div>
        </td>`).join('')}
      </tr>
    </tfoot>
  </table>
  </div>`;

  document.getElementById('main-panel').innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px">'+h+'</div>';
}

function toggleSmurfitBU() {
  window._summarySmurfitExpanded = !window._summarySmurfitExpanded;
  showInventorySummary();
}



// ─── EDI IMPORT FILE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let _ediHBHLoads = []; // parsed HBH loads from uploaded file

function applyEDIColMapping() {
  const pdSel = document.getElementById('purch-doc-col');
  const piSel = document.getElementById('purch-item-col');
  if (!pdSel || !piSel) return;
  window._ediPurchDocIdx  = parseInt(pdSel.value);
  window._ediPurchItemIdx = parseInt(piSel.value);
  // Re-build sciGroups with new column indices
  const invByLot = {};
  state.inventory.forEach(r => { if (r.lot) invByLot[r.lot] = r; });
  const hasCatData = Object.values(state.dirData).some(x => x.stockCat);
  const sciGroups = {};
  Object.entries(state.dirData)
    .filter(([lot, d]) => !hasCatData || d.stockCat === 'I')
    .forEach(([lot, d]) => {
      const key = (d.shipment && d.shipment !== '') ? d.shipment
                : (d.soDoc && d.soDoc !== '') ? d.soDoc : d.customerPO;
      if (!key) return;
      if (!sciGroups[key]) sciGroups[key] = {
        shipment: key, zmo: d.customerPO||d.soDoc,
        invoiceRef: d.zmo, customerName: d.customerName, lots: []
      };
      const inv = invByLot[lot] || {};
      // Use the user-selected column indices for purchDoc/purchItem
      const purchDoc  = d['_pd']  || '';
      const purchItem = d['_pi']  || '';
      sciGroups[key].lots.push({
        lot, material: d.material, matDesc: d.matDesc,
        grossWt: d.grossWt, width: d.width, qtyMlf: d.qtyMlf,
        expDate: inv.expDate || null, bol: inv.bol || '', po: inv.po || '',
        prod2: inv.prod2 || ('Scientific Games ' + d.zmo),
        purchDoc, purchItem, vehicleId: d.vehicleId || ''
      });
    });
  Object.values(sciGroups).forEach(g => g.lots.sort((a,b)=>a.lot.localeCompare(b.lot)));
  window._ediSciGroups = sciGroups;
  showAlert('✓ Column mapping applied — PD: col '+(window._ediPurchDocIdx+1)+', PI: col '+(window._ediPurchItemIdx+1), 'success');
  showEDIImportFile();
}


function deleteEDISciLoad(key) {
  if (!window._ediSciDeleted) window._ediSciDeleted = new Set();
  window._ediSciDeleted.add(key);
  showEDIImportFile();
}

function deleteEDIHBHLoad(idx) {
  _ediHBHLoads.splice(idx, 1);
  showEDIImportFile();
}

function saveEDIExportStamp(keys) {
  if (!db) return;
  const now = Date.now();
  const user = state.currentUser || 'unknown';
  keys.forEach(k => {
    const safeKey = k.toString().replace(/[.#$[\]]/g, '_');
    db.ref('6021/ediExports/' + safeKey).set({ exportedAt: now, exportedBy: user });
  });
}

function loadEDIExportStamps(callback) {
  if (!db) { callback({}); return; }
  db.ref('6021/ediExports').once('value', snap => callback(snap.val() || {}));
}


function onEDISciChange(cb) {
  if (cb.checked) {
    // Uncheck all HBH
    document.querySelectorAll('.edi-hbh-chk').forEach(c => c.checked = false);
  }
}

function onEDIHBHChange(cb) {
  if (cb.checked) {
    // Uncheck all Sci Games
    document.querySelectorAll('.edi-sci-chk').forEach(c => c.checked = false);
  }
}


function buildEDIColPickerHTML() {
  const cols = window._dirColumnHeaders;
  if (!cols || !cols.length) return '';
  const pdIdx = window._ediPurchDocIdx  !== undefined ? window._ediPurchDocIdx  : 20;
  const piIdx = window._ediPurchItemIdx !== undefined ? window._ediPurchItemIdx : 21;
  const makeSelect = function(id, val) {
    let opts = '';
    cols.forEach(function(c) {
      opts += '<option value="'+c.idx+'"'+(c.idx===val?' selected':'')+'>'+c.letter+': '+(c.name||'(blank)')+'</option>';
    });
    return '<select id="'+id+'" style="background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:5px;padding:4px 8px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;outline:none">'+opts+'</select>';
  };
  return '<div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 16px;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap">'
    +'<span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px">PO# COLUMN MAPPING</span>'
