    +'<label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px">Purchasing Document: '+makeSelect('purch-doc-col', pdIdx)+'</label>'
    +'<label style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px">PO Item: '+makeSelect('purch-item-col', piIdx)+'</label>'
    +'<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="applyEDIColMapping()" style="font-size:11px">Apply</button>'
    +'<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">PO# = Doc-Item (e.g. 4512543138-10)</span>'
    +'</div>';
}


function toggleEDIDetail(id) {
  const el  = document.getElementById(id);
  const btn = document.getElementById(id + '-btn');
  if (!el) return;
  const open = el.style.display === 'none';
  el.style.display = open ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (btn) btn.textContent = open ? '▲' : '▼';
}


function showEDIImportFile() {
  state.currentView = 'edi';
  const _stamps = window._ediStamps || {};
  const panel = document.getElementById('main-panel');

  // Build Sci Games groups from dirData:
  // Filter: Stock Category = "I" only (if stockCat field present in data)
  // Group by: Shipment Number (fallback to customerPO/ZMO if no shipment field)
  // Sort rolls by: Batch (lot number) ascending
  const invByLot = {};
  state.inventory.forEach(r => { if (r.lot) invByLot[r.lot] = r; });

  const hasCatData = Object.values(state.dirData).some(x => x.stockCat);
  const sciGroups = {};
  Object.entries(state.dirData)
    .filter(([lot, d]) => !hasCatData || d.stockCat === 'I')
    .forEach(([lot, d]) => {
      // Priority: explicit shipment field → soDoc (SAP delivery/SO doc) → customerPO
      const key = (d.shipment && d.shipment !== '')
        ? d.shipment
        : (d.soDoc && d.soDoc !== '') ? d.soDoc
        : d.customerPO;
      if (!key) return;
      if (!sciGroups[key]) sciGroups[key] = {
        shipment: key,
        zmo: d.customerPO || d.soDoc,
        invoiceRef: d.zmo,
        customerName: d.customerName,
        lots: []
      };
      const inv = invByLot[lot] || {};
      sciGroups[key].lots.push({
        lot, material: d.material, matDesc: d.matDesc,
        grossWt: d.grossWt, width: d.width, qtyMlf: d.qtyMlf,
        expDate: inv.expDate || null,
        bol: inv.bol || '', po: inv.po || '',
        prod2: inv.prod2 || ('Scientific Games ' + d.zmo),
        purchDoc:  d.purchDoc  || '',
        purchItem: d.purchItem || '',
        vehicleId: d.vehicleId || ''
      });
    });

  // Sort rolls within each shipment by batch (lot) ascending
  Object.values(sciGroups).forEach(g => g.lots.sort((a,b) => a.lot.localeCompare(b.lot)));

  if (!window._ediSciDeleted) window._ediSciDeleted = new Set();
  const sciKeys = Object.keys(sciGroups).filter(k => !window._ediSciDeleted.has(k)).sort();
  window._ediSciGroups = sciGroups;

  const sectionStyle = 'background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px';

  let h = `
  <!-- Top bar -->
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
    <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px">📄 EDI IMPORT FILE BUILDER</div>
    
  </div>

  <!-- DIR Column Mapping -->
  ${buildEDIColPickerHTML()}

  <!-- Two-column layout -->
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px">

    <!-- ── CATALYST ── -->
    <div style="${sectionStyle};order:1">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1px;color:#0ea5e9">CATALYST LOADS</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px">Build guidelines coming soon</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px">
        COMING SOON
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── CATALYST XDK ── -->
    <div style="${sectionStyle};order:2">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1px;color:#6366f1">CATALYST XDK LOADS</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px">Build guidelines coming soon</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px">
        COMING SOON
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── HBH ── -->
    <div style="${sectionStyle};order:3">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--warning)">🏭 HBH LOADS</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px">Drag &amp; drop or click to upload GS file</div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="ediCheckAll('hbh',true);document.querySelectorAll('.edi-sci-chk').forEach(c=>c.checked=false)" title="Select All">☑</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="ediCheckAll('hbh',false)" title="Deselect All">☐</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Drop zone -->
      <div id="hbh-dropzone"
        ondragover="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='var(--warning)';this.style.background='rgba(255,160,50,0.08)'"
        ondragleave="this.style.borderColor='';this.style.background=''"
        ondrop="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='';this.style.background='';handleHBHDrop(event)"
        onclick="document.getElementById('hbh-file-input').click()"
        style="border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:18px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;user-select:none"
        onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='var(--warning)';this.style.background='rgba(255,160,50,0.04)'"
        onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='';this.style.background=''">
        <div style="font-size:22px;margin-bottom:6px">📂</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--warning)">Drop GS load file here</div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:4px">.xls or .xlsx &nbsp;·&nbsp; click to browse</div>
        <input type="file" id="hbh-file-input" accept=".xls,.xlsx" onchange="handleHBHUpload(event)" style="display:none">
      </div>`;


  // ── SCI GAMES section ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  {
    const sciGroups = window._ediSciGroups || {};
    const sciKeys = Object.keys(sciGroups).filter(k => !_ediSciDeleted.has(k));
    const dq2 = '"';
    h += `<div style="${sectionStyle};order:5">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--accent2)">🔬 SCI GAMES LOADS</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px">Built from loaded DIR data</div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="ediCheckAll('sci',true);document.querySelectorAll('.edi-hbh-chk').forEach(c=>c.checked=false)" title="Select All">☑</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="ediCheckAll('sci',false)" title="Deselect All">☐</button>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    if (!sciKeys.length) {
      h += `<div style="border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:24px;text-align:center;color:var(--text2);font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1px">
        None Available To Export
      </div>`;
    } else {
      const totalRolls = sciKeys.reduce((s,k)=>(sciGroups[k]&&sciGroups[k].lots?s+sciGroups[k].lots.length:s),0);
      h += `<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${sciKeys.length} ZMOs &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${totalRolls.toLocaleString()} rolls total</div>
      <div id="sci-load-list" style="max-height:420px;overflow-y:auto;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden">`;
      let alt = false;
      sciKeys.forEach(key => {
        if (_ediSciDeleted.has(key)) return;
        const g = sciGroups[key];
        if (!g||!g.lots||!g.lots.length) return;
        const sciStamp = _stamps[key] || null;
        const sciStampStr = sciStamp ? 'Exported: '+new Date(sciStamp.exportedAt).toLocaleString() : '';
        const totLF = g.lots.reduce(function(s,l){return s+(parseFloat(l.qtyMlf)||0);},0).toFixed(3);
        const totWt = g.lots.reduce(function(s,l){return s+(l.grossWt||0);},0).toLocaleString();
        const dq = dq2;
        h += '<div style='+dq+'border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)'+dq+'>'
          +'<div style='+dq+'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 12px;background:'+(alt?'var(--surface2)':'var(--surface)')+dq+'>'
          +'<input type='+dq+'checkbox'+dq+' class='+dq+'edi-sci-chk'+dq+' value='+dq+key+dq+' checked onchange='+dq+'onEDISciChange(this)'+dq+' style='+dq+'cursor:pointer;width:16px;height:16px;flex-shrink:0'+dq+'>'
          +'<div style='+dq+'flex:1;min-width:0'+dq+'>'
          +'<div style='+dq+'font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2);font-size:12px'+dq+'>'+g.shipment+'</div>'
          +'<div style='+dq+'font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)'+dq+'>'+g.customerName+' &nbsp;·&nbsp; '+g.lots.length+' rolls</div>'
          +(sciStampStr?'<div style='+dq+'font-size:9px;color:var(--accent2)'+dq+'>✓ '+sciStampStr+'</div>':'')
          +'</div>'
          +'<button onclick='+dq+'exportSingleSci(&quot;'+key+'&quot;)'+dq
          +' style='+dq+'background:var(--accent2);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:5px;padding:4px 12px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;margin-right:4px'+dq+'>Export</button>'
          +'<button onclick='+dq+'deleteEDISciLoad(&quot;'+key+'&quot;)'+dq
          +' style='+dq+'background:none;border:none;color:var(--danger);cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;padding:2px 4px'+dq+' title='+dq+'Remove load'+dq+'>✕</button>'
          +'</div></div>';
        alt = !alt;
      });
      h += '</div>';
    }
    h += '</div>';
  }

  if (_ediHBHLoads.length) {
    const totalHBHRolls = _ediHBHLoads.reduce((s,l)=>s+l.rows.length,0);
    h += `<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${_ediHBHLoads.length} loads loaded &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${totalHBHRolls.toLocaleString()} rolls total
      <button onclick="_ediHBHLoads=[];showEDIImportFile()" title="Clear all HBH loads"
        style="margin-left:8px;background:none;border:none;color:var(--danger);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;padding:0">✕ Clear All</button>
      <button onclick="document.getElementById('hbh-file-input').click()" title="Add another file"
        style="margin-left:8px;background:none;border:none;color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;padding:0">＋ Add File</button>
    </div>
    <div id="hbh-load-list" style="max-height:280px;overflow-y:auto;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden">`;

    _ediHBHLoads.forEach(function(load, i) {
      const alt = i%2!==0;
      const detailId = 'hbh-detail-'+i;
      let detailRows = '';
      (load.rows||[]).forEach(function(r, ri) {
        const bg = ri%2!==0 ? 'rgba(0,0,0,0.03)' : '';
        const expDisp = r.expDate ? (typeof r.expDate === 'number'
          ? new Date((r.expDate - 25569)*86400000).toLocaleDateString('en-US')
          : r.expDate) : '—';
        detailRows += '<tr style="background:'+bg+';border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">'
          +'<td style="padding:4px 8px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);white-space:nowrap">'+(r.lot||'—')+'</td>'
          +'<td style="padding:4px 8px">'+(r.sku||'')+'</td>'
          +'<td style="padding:4px 8px;color:var(--text2);max-width:160px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap">'+(r.productId||'')+'</td>'
          +'<td style="padding:4px 8px;color:var(--accent2);white-space:nowrap">'+(r.po5||'—')+'</td>'
          +'<td style="padding:4px 8px;text-align:right">'+(r.lf||'—')+'</td>'
          +'<td style="padding:4px 8px;text-align:right">'+(r.weight?(+r.weight).toLocaleString():'—')+'</td>'
          +'<td style="padding:4px 8px;white-space:nowrap">'+expDisp+'</td>'
          +'</tr>';
      });
      const totWt = (load.rows||[]).reduce(function(s,r){return s+(+r.weight||0);},0).toLocaleString();
      const dq = '"';
      const hbhKey = load.sheetName.replace(/[.#$[\]]/g,'_');
      const hbhStamp = _stamps[hbhKey] || null;
      const hbhStampStr = hbhStamp ? 'Exported: '+new Date(hbhStamp.exportedAt).toLocaleString() : '';
      h += '<div style='+dq+'border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)'+dq+'>'
        +'<div style='+dq+'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 12px;background:'+(alt?'var(--surface2)':'var(--surface)')+dq+'>'
        +'<input type='+dq+'checkbox'+dq+' class='+dq+'edi-hbh-chk'+dq+' value='+dq+i+dq+' checked onchange='+dq+'onEDIHBHChange(this)'+dq+' style='+dq+'cursor:pointer;width:16px;height:16px;accent-color:var(--warning);flex-shrink:0'+dq+'>'
        +'<div style='+dq+'flex:1;min-width:0;cursor:pointer'+dq+' onclick='+dq+'toggleEDIDetail(&quot;'+detailId+'&quot;)'+dq+'>'
        +'<div style='+dq+'font-weight:bold;color:var(--warning);font-size:12px'+dq+'>'+load.sheetName+'</div>'
        +'<div style='+dq+'font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap'+dq+'>'+load.poLine+'</div>'
        +'<div style='+dq+'font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)'+dq+'>Invoice: '+load.invoice+' · Truck: '+load.truck+'</div>'
        +'</div>'
        +'<div style='+dq+'text-align:right;white-space:nowrap;margin-right:4px'+dq+'>'
        +'<div style='+dq+'font-weight:bold;color:var(--warning);font-size:13px'+dq+'>'+load.rows.length+'</div>'
        +'<div style='+dq+'font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)'+dq+'>rolls</div>'
        +(hbhStampStr?'<div style='+dq+'font-size:9px;color:var(--warning);white-space:nowrap;margin-top:2px'+dq+'>✓ '+hbhStampStr+'</div>':'')
        +'</div>'
        +'<button onclick='+dq+'exportSingleHBH('+i+')'+dq
        +' style='+dq+'background:var(--warning);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:5px;padding:4px 12px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;margin-right:4px'+dq+'>Export</button>'
        +'<button onclick='+dq+'deleteEDIHBHLoad('+i+')'+dq
        +' style='+dq+'background:none;border:none;color:var(--danger);cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;padding:2px 4px'+dq+' title='+dq+'Remove load'+dq+'>✕</button>'
        +'<button id='+dq+detailId+'-btn'+dq+' onclick='+dq+'toggleEDIDetail(&quot;'+detailId+'&quot;)'+dq
        +' style='+dq+'background:none;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;padding:2px 8px'+dq+'>▼</button>'
        +'</div>'
        +'<div id='+dq+detailId+dq+' style='+dq+'display:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);overflow-x:auto;max-height:320px;overflow-y:auto'+dq+'>'
        +'<table style='+dq+'width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:10px'+dq+'>'
        +'<thead><tr style='+dq+'background:var(--surface2)'+dq+'>'
        +'<th style='+dq+'padding:5px 8px;text-align:left;color:var(--text2)'+dq+'>LOT #</th>'
        +'<th style='+dq+'padding:5px 8px;text-align:left;color:var(--text2)'+dq+'>SKU</th>'
        +'<th style='+dq+'padding:5px 8px;text-align:left;color:var(--text2)'+dq+'>PRODUCT ID</th>'
        +'<th style='+dq+'padding:5px 8px;text-align:left;color:var(--text2)'+dq+'>'+(load.col5hdr||'STO')+'</th>'
        +'<th style='+dq+'padding:5px 8px;text-align:right;color:var(--text2)'+dq+'>LF</th>'
        +'<th style='+dq+'padding:5px 8px;text-align:right;color:var(--text2)'+dq+'>WEIGHT</th>'
        +'<th style='+dq+'padding:5px 8px;text-align:left;color:var(--text2)'+dq+'>EXP DATE</th>'
        +'</tr></thead><tbody>'+detailRows
        +'<tr style='+dq+'background:rgba(255,160,50,0.08);font-weight:bold'+dq+'>'
        +'<td colspan='+dq+'5'+dq+' style='+dq+'padding:5px 8px;color:var(--warning)'+dq+'>TOTAL — '+load.rows.length+' rolls</td>'
        +'<td style='+dq+'padding:5px 8px;text-align:right;color:var(--warning)'+dq+'>'+totWt+'</td>'
        +'<td></td></tr>'
        +'</tbody></table></div></div>';
    });;
    h += `</div>`;
  }


  // ── IPG section ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  h += `<div style="${sectionStyle};order:4">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--accent)">📦 IPG LOADS</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px">Intertape Polymer Group — drag &amp; drop or click to upload</div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap">
          <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px">
            <label style="font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase">Load ID (BOL)</label>
            <input id="ipg-load-id" type="text" placeholder="e.g. 12519228"
              style="padding:7px 12px;border:1.5px solid var(--accent);border-radius:7px;font-family:var(--font);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;background:var(--surface);color:var(--text);outline:none;width:160px">
          </div>
          <div id="ipg-dropzone"
            ondragover="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='var(--accent)';this.style.background='rgba(79,110,247,0.05)'"
            ondragleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--border)';this.style.background=''"
            ondrop="event.preventDefault();this.style.borderColor='var(--border)';this.style.background='';handleIPGDrop(event)"
            style="border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px 20px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);transition:.2s;min-width:200px"
            onclick="document.getElementById('ipg-file-input').click()">
            <span style="font-size:16px">📄</span>
            <span style="font-weight:600;margin-left:6px">Drop Intertape file or click to browse</span>
            <div style="font-size:10px;margin-top:2px">.xlsx format</div>
            <input type="file" id="ipg-file-input" accept=".xlsx,.xls" style="display:none"
              onchange="if(this.files[0])processIPGFile(this.files[0])">
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="ipg-load-list"></div>
  </div>`;

  h += `</div>`; // close outer flex stack
  panel.innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px">' + h + '</div>';
  // Restore IPG loads if any are in memory (panel rebuild would clear the list div)
  if (_ipgLoads && _ipgLoads.length) renderIPGLoads();
}


// ─── IPG INBOUND FILE PROCESSING ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Width description → [subSku, numericWidth]
const IPG_WIDTH_TABLE = {
  "21'' 8/16ths":  ['02150', 21.5],
  "16'' 8/16ths":  ['01650', 16.5],
  "19''":          ['01900', 19.0],
  "22''":          ['02200', 22.0],
  "23'' 10/16ths": ['02310', 23.625],
  "37''":          ['03700', 37.0],
  "49''":          ['04900', 49.0],
  "97'' 14/16ths": ['09714', 97.14]
};

let _ipgLoads = []; // processed loads from IPG file

function handleIPGDrop(e) {
  const file = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
  if (file) processIPGFile(file);
}

function processIPGFile(file) {
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = ev => {
    try {
      const wb = XLSX.read(ev.target.result, {type:'binary', cellDates:true});
      const ws = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]];
      const rows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(ws, {header:1, raw:false, dateNF:'yyyy-mm-dd'});

      // Find header row (row with 'Roll ID')
      let headerIdx = rows.findIndex(r => r.some(c => String(c||'').trim() === 'Roll ID'));
      if (headerIdx === -1) { showAlert('Could not find Roll ID header in file','danger'); return; }

      const hdr = rows[headerIdx];
      const col = name => hdr.findIndex(c => String(c||'').trim().toLowerCase() === name.toLowerCase());

      const cRollId    = col('Roll ID');
      const cWidth     = col('Width(in)');
      const cDiam      = col('Diameter(in)');
      const cShipTo    = col('Ship To Short Name');
      const cCustOrder = col('Customer Order #');
      const cSomOrder  = col('SOM Order #');
      const cGrade     = col('Grade');
      const cShipFrom  = col('Ship From');
      const cLF        = col('Linear Feet');
      const cWeight    = col('Roll Weight (lbs)');
      const cCarrier   = col('Carrier');
      const cCarrierN  = col('Carrier Number');
      const cDeliver   = col('Deliver By Date');

      const dataRows = rows.slice(headerIdx + 1).filter(r => {
        const rollId  = String(r[cRollId]||'').trim();
        const somOrd  = String(r[cSomOrder]||'').trim();
        // Skip empty rows, TOTALS rows, or rows with no SOM Order #
        return rollId && somOrd && !/^(total|totals|sum|grand)/i.test(rollId);
      });

      if (!dataRows.length) { showAlert('No data rows found in file','warning'); return; }

      // Today's date as Excel serial for Exp Date column
      const today = new Date();
      const excelEpoch = new Date(1900, 0, 1);
      const todaySerial = Math.round((today - excelEpoch) / 86400000) + 1;

      // Group by SOM Order # (each load = one SOM Order #)
      const loadMap = {};
      dataRows.forEach(r => {
        const somOrder  = String(r[cSomOrder]||'').trim();
        const rollId    = String(r[cRollId]||'').trim();
        const widthDesc = String(r[cWidth]||'').trim();
        const grade     = String(r[cGrade]||'').trim();
        const diam      = String(r[cDiam]||'').trim();
        const shipFrom  = String(r[cShipFrom]||'').trim();
        const shipTo    = String(r[cShipTo]||'').trim();
        const custOrder = String(r[cCustOrder]||'').trim();
        const lf        = parseFloat(r[cLF])||0;
        const wt        = parseFloat(r[cWeight])||0;
        const carrier   = String(r[cCarrier]||'').trim();
        const carrierN  = String(r[cCarrierN]||'').trim();
        const delivDate = r[cDeliver]||'';

        const widthLookup = IPG_WIDTH_TABLE[widthDesc] || [widthDesc, parseFloat(widthDesc)||0];
        const subSku      = widthLookup[0];
        const widthNum    = widthLookup[1];
        const sku         = grade + subSku;
        const prodId      = [grade, widthDesc, diam, shipFrom].join(',');

        if (!loadMap[somOrder]) {
          loadMap[somOrder] = {
            somOrder, shipTo, custOrder, carrier, carrierN, delivDate,
            rolls: []
          };
        }
        loadMap[somOrder].rolls.push({
          sku, prodId, rollId, custOrder, wt, lf, widthNum, todaySerial
        });
      });

      _ipgLoads = Object.values(loadMap);
      renderIPGLoads();
      showAlert('✓ IPG file loaded — ' + dataRows.length + ' rolls across ' + _ipgLoads.length + ' load(s)', 'success');
    } catch(err) {
      showAlert('Error reading IPG file: ' + err.message, 'danger');
      console.error(err);
    }
  };
  reader.readAsBinaryString(file);
}

function deleteIPGLoad(idx) {
  _ipgLoads.splice(idx, 1);
  renderIPGLoads();
}

function renderIPGLoads() {
  const container = document.getElementById('ipg-load-list');
  if (!container) return;
  if (!_ipgLoads.length) { container.innerHTML = ''; return; }

  let h = '';
  _ipgLoads.forEach((load, i) => {
    const totalRolls = load.rolls.length;
    const totalWt    = load.rolls.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.wt,0).toLocaleString();
    const totalLF    = load.rolls.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.lf,0).toFixed(0);
    const detailId   = 'ipg-detail-' + i;
    const dq = '"';

    h += '<div style="border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:8px;overflow:hidden">';
    h += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 14px;background:var(--surface2)">';
    h += '<input type="checkbox" class="edi-ipg-chk" value="' + i + '" checked style="cursor:pointer;width:16px;height:16px;accent-color:var(--accent);flex-shrink:0">';
    h += '<div style="flex:1">';
    h += '<div style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px">SOM Order: ' + load.somOrder + '</div>';
    h += '<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">' + load.shipTo + ' · ' + load.custOrder + ' · ' + (load.carrier||'') + '_' + (load.carrierN||'') + '</div>';
    h += '</div>';
    h += '<div style="font-weight:bold;font-size:13px">' + totalRolls + ' rolls</div>';
    h += '<button onclick="toggleEDIDetail(&quot;' + detailId + '&quot;)" style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:5px;padding:3px 8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px">▼</button>';
    h += '<button onclick="exportIPGLoad(' + i + ')" style="background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:5px;padding:4px 10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:700">Export</button>';
    h += '<button onclick="deleteIPGLoad(' + i + ')" title="Remove load" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;color:var(--danger);padding:2px 6px;line-height:1" >✕</button>';
    h += '</div>';

    // Detail table
    h += '<div id="' + detailId + '" style="display:none;overflow-x:auto;max-height:320px;overflow-y:auto">';
    h += '<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px">';
    h += '<thead><tr style="background:var(--surface2);position:sticky;top:0">';
    ['LOT #','SKU','PRODUCT ID','LF','WEIGHT','WIDTH'].forEach(col => {
      h += '<th style="padding:6px 10px;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);white-space:nowrap">' + col + '</th>';
    });
    h += '</tr></thead><tbody>';
    load.rolls.forEach(r => {
      h += '<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">';
      h += '<td style="padding:5px 10px">' + r.rollId + '</td>';
      h += '<td style="padding:5px 10px;font-weight:bold">' + r.sku + '</td>';
      h += '<td style="padding:5px 10px;color:var(--text2)">' + r.prodId + '</td>';
      h += '<td style="padding:5px 10px">' + r.lf.toLocaleString() + '</td>';
      h += '<td style="padding:5px 10px">' + r.wt.toLocaleString() + '</td>';
      h += '<td style="padding:5px 10px">' + r.widthNum + '</td>';
      h += '</tr>';
    });
    h += '</tbody></table></div></div>';
  });

  container.innerHTML = h;
}

function exportIPGLoad(idx) {
  const load    = _ipgLoads[idx];
  if (!load) return;
  const loadId  = (document.getElementById('ipg-load-id')||{}).value||'';
  if (!loadId) { showAlert('Please enter a Load ID before exporting','warning'); return; }

  const totalRolls = load.rolls.length;
  const truck   = (load.carrier||'') + '_' + (load.carrierN||'');
  const poNum   = load.shipTo + ' ' + load.custOrder + ' ' + loadId;

  const aoa = [
    [''],
    ['Receiver', loadId,  '', 'Total Rolls', totalRolls, '', '', 'Fraction  Decimal'],
    ['PO #',     poNum,   '', '', '', '', '', 0.5, 0.5],
    ['Invoice #',load.custOrder],
    ['Truck #',  truck,   '', '', '', '', '', 'Piper IBD Order #'],
    [''],
    [''],
    ['SKU','Product ID','Lot#','Prod ID 2','PO#','Weight','Gross Weight','UOM','LF','Pcs','Width','Exp Date']
  ];

  load.rolls.forEach(r => {
    aoa.push([
      r.sku, r.prodId, r.rollId, r.custOrder, r.custOrder,
      r.wt, r.wt, 'ROLLS', r.lf, 1, r.widthNum, r.todaySerial
    ]);
  });

  const wb  = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  const ws  = XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet(aoa);
  // Format Exp Date column (col L = index 11) as date
  const range = XLSX.utils.decode_range(ws['!ref']);
  for (let row = 8; row <= range.e.r; row++) {
    const cell = ws[XLSX.utils.encode_cell({r:row, c:11})];
    if (cell) cell.z = 'm/d/yyyy';
  }
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, 'Sheet1');
  const fname = 'IPG_Import_' + load.custOrder + '_' + loadId + '.xlsx';
  XLSX.writeFile(wb, fname);
  showAlert('✓ Exported ' + fname, 'success');
}

function handleHBHDrop(e) {
  const file = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
  if (!file) return;
  processHBHFile(file);
}


function ediCheckAll(type, checked) {
  const cls = type === 'sci' ? '.edi-sci-chk' : '.edi-hbh-chk';
  document.querySelectorAll(cls).forEach(c => c.checked = checked);
}

function handleHBHUpload(e) {
  const file = e.target.files[0]; if (!file) return;
  processHBHFile(file);
}

// ─── HBH SKU CONVERSION ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Width → attachment suffix mapping (SKU = material + "." + attachment)
const HBH_SKU_MAP = [
  [26,      '2600'],  [29.5,   '2950'],  [31,     '3100'],
  [33.875,  '3314'],  [36,     '3600'],  [38,     '3800'],
  [40,      '4000'],  [42,     '4200'],  [48.5,   '4850'],
  [50,      '5000'],  [50.125, '50125'], [50.25,  '5025'],
  [54,      '5400'],  [56,     '5600'],  [56.25,  '5625']
];

function getHBHSku(material, width) {
  const w      = parseFloat(width) || 0;
  const entry  = HBH_SKU_MAP.find(([mw]) => Math.abs(mw - w) < 0.001);
  if (!entry || !material) return material || '';
  return material + '.' + entry[1];
}


function processHBHFile(file) {
  const reader = new FileReader();
  reader.onload = ev => {
    try {
      const wb = XLSX.read(ev.target.result, {type:'binary', raw:true});
      // Append to existing loads (support multiple file drops)
      const invByLot = {};
      state.inventory.forEach(r => { if (r.lot) invByLot[r.lot] = r; });

      const hbhPrefix = s => ('HBH ' + s).replace(/^HBH\s+HBH\s+/i, 'HBH ');

      wb.SheetNames.forEach(sn => {
        const ws   = wb.Sheets[sn];
        const rows = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(ws, {header:1, defval:'', raw:true});
        if (!rows || !rows.length) return;

        const gsGroups = {};
        rows.forEach(r => {
          if (!r || !r[0]) return;
          const gsNum    = (r[0]||'').toString().trim();
          if (!gsNum) return;
          const wrdBatch = (r[6]||'').toString().trim();
          if (!wrdBatch) return;
          const batch    = wrdBatch.startsWith('WRD') ? '5' + wrdBatch.slice(3) : wrdBatch;
          const truck    = (r[1]||'').toString().trim();
          const stoDoc   = (r[18]||'').toString().trim().replace(/^0+/,'') || '';
          const stoItem  = (r[19]||'').toString().trim().replace(/^0+/,'') || '';
          const sto      = stoDoc + (stoItem ? '-'+stoItem : '');
          const weight   = parseFloat(r[9]) || 0;
          const lf       = parseFloat(r[12]) || 0;
          const skuFile  = (r[21]||'').toString().trim();
          const d        = state.dirData[batch] || {};
          const inv      = invByLot[batch] || {};
          // custName: strip leading "HBH " if already present
          const rawCust  = d.customerName || '';
          const custName = rawCust.replace(/^HBH\s+/i, '');

          if (!gsGroups[gsNum]) gsGroups[gsNum] = { gsNum, truck, rolls:[] };
          gsGroups[gsNum].rolls.push({
            batch, sto, weight, lf,
            sku:          getHBHSku(d.material || skuFile, d.width || 0),
            productId:    d.matDesc   || '',
            width:        d.width     || 0,
            expDate:      inv.expDate || null,
            custName
          });
        });

        Object.values(gsGroups).forEach(group => {
          group.rolls.sort((a,b) => a.batch.localeCompare(b.batch));
          const first      = group.rolls[0] || {};
          const invoiceRef = first.sto || '';
          const custName   = first.custName || '';

          _ediHBHLoads.push({
            sheetName: group.gsNum,
            receiver:  group.gsNum,
            truck:     group.truck,
            invoice:   invoiceRef,
            poLine:    'HBH ' + custName + ' ' + invoiceRef + ' ' + group.gsNum,
            col5hdr:   'STO',
            rows: group.rolls.map(r => ({
              sku:         r.sku,
              productId:   r.productId,
              lot:         r.batch,
              prodId2:     'HBH ' + r.custName + ' ' + r.sto,
              po5:         r.sto,
              weight:      r.weight,
              grossWeight: r.weight,
              uom:         'ROLLS',
              lf:          r.lf,
              pcs:         1,
              width:       r.width,
              expDate:     r.expDate
            }))
          });
        });
      });

      showAlert('✓ ' + _ediHBHLoads.length + ' HBH loads loaded from ' + file.name, 'success');
      showEDIImportFile();
    } catch(err) {
      showAlert('Error reading file: ' + err.message, 'danger');
    }
  };
  reader.readAsBinaryString(file);
}





function dateToExcelSerial(d) {
  if (!d) return '';
  const dt = (d instanceof Date) ? d : new Date(d);
  if (isNaN(dt)) return '';
  return Math.round(dt.getTime() / 86400000) + 25569;
}

function buildEDISheet_SciGames(group) {
  const lots      = group.lots;
  const rollCount = lots.length;

  // Helper: get PO# for a lot (purchDoc-purchItem, fallback to inv.po)
  const getLotPO = l => {
    // Use _pd/_pi (user-mapped columns) first, then purchDoc/purchItem, then inv.po
    const pd = l._pd || l.purchDoc || '';
    const pi = l._pi || l.purchItem || '';
    if (pd) return pd + (pi ? '-' + pi : '');
    return l.po || '';
  };

  // Receiver = Shipment Number
  const receiver = group.shipment || '';
  // Invoice # = invoiceRef (soDoc-soItem)
  const invoice  = group.invoiceRef || '';
  // Truck # = Vehicle ID from DIR, fallback to BOL
  const truck    = lots.find(l => l.vehicleId)?.vehicleId
                || lots.find(l => l.bol)?.bol || '';
  // PO # header = same value as line data PO# (first lot's PO)
  // PO # header = customer name + shipment + truck (reference line)
  const poLine   = group.customerName + ' ' + group.shipment + (truck ? ' ' + truck : '');

  const aoa = [
    // Row 1 — empty
    [],
    // Row 2 — A:Receiver, B:value, D:Total Rolls, E:count, H:Fraction Decimal
    ['Receiver', receiver, null, 'Total Rolls', rollCount, null, null, 'Fraction  Decimal'],
    // Row 3 — A:PO #, B:value, H:0.5, I:0.5
    ['PO #', poLine, null, null, null, null, null, 0.5, 0.5],
    // Row 4 — A:Invoice #, B:value
    ['Invoice #', invoice],
    // Row 5 — A:Truck #, B:value, H:Piper IBD Order #
    ['Truck #', truck, null, null, null, null, null, 'Piper IBD Order #'],
    // Row 6 — empty
    [],
    // Row 7 — empty
    [],
    // Row 8 — column headers
    ['SKU','Product ID','Lot#','Prod ID 2','PO#','Weight','Gross Weight','UOM','LF','Pcs','Width','Exp Date']
  ];

  lots.forEach(l => {
    const poNum     = getLotPO(l);
    const expSerial = dateToExcelSerial(l.expDate);
    const weight    = l.grossWt || 0;
    const lf        = l.qtyMlf ? +l.qtyMlf.toFixed(3) : 0;

    aoa.push([
      l.material,
      l.matDesc,
      l.lot,
      l.prod2 || ('Scientific Games ' + invoice),
      poNum,
      weight, weight,
      'ROLLS',
      lf, 1,
      l.width || 0,
      expSerial || ''
    ]);
  });

  const ws = XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet(aoa);

  // Apply short date format (m/d/yyyy) to Exp Date column (col L = index 11)
  // Data rows start at row 9 (aoa index 8 = sheet row index 8, 0-based)
  const expColIdx = 11;
  for (let r = 8; r < aoa.length; r++) {
    const cellRef = XLSX.utils.encode_cell({ r, c: expColIdx });
    if (ws[cellRef] && ws[cellRef].v) {
      ws[cellRef].t = 'n';
      ws[cellRef].z = 'm/d/yyyy';
    }
  }

  return ws;
}





function buildEDISheet_HBH(load) {
  // Exact cell layout matching HBH EDI template
  const aoa = [
    // Row 1 — empty
    [],
    // Row 2 — Receiver / Total Rolls / Fraction Decimal
    ['Receiver', load.receiver, null, 'Total Rolls', load.rows.length, null, null, 'Fraction  Decimal'],
    // Row 3 — PO # / 0.5 fractions
    ['PO #', load.poLine, null, null, null, null, null, 0.5, 0.5],
    // Row 4 — Invoice #
    ['Invoice #', load.invoice],
    // Row 5 — Truck # / Piper IBD Order #
    ['Truck #', load.truck, null, null, null, null, null, 'Piper IBD Order #'],
    // Row 6 — empty
    [],
    // Row 7 — empty
    [],
    // Row 8 — column headers (STO not PO# for HBH)
    ['SKU','Product ID','Lot#','Prod ID 2','STO','Weight','Gross Weight','UOM','LF','Pcs','Width','Exp Date']
  ];

  load.rows.forEach(r => {
    const expSerial = dateToExcelSerial(r.expDate);
    const wt = typeof r.weight === 'string' ? parseFloat(r.weight.replace(/,/g,''))||0 : (r.weight||0);
    const gw = typeof r.grossWeight === 'string' ? parseFloat(r.grossWeight.replace(/,/g,''))||0 : (r.grossWeight||0);
    aoa.push([
      r.sku, r.productId, r.lot, r.prodId2, r.po5,
      wt, gw, r.uom || 'ROLLS',
      r.lf || 0, r.pcs || 1, r.width || 0,
      expSerial || ''
    ]);
  });

  const ws = XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet(aoa);
  // Apply short date format to Exp Date column (L = index 11, data starts row 9 = aoa index 8)
  for (let ri = 8; ri < aoa.length; ri++) {
    const cellRef = XLSX.utils.encode_cell({r: ri, c: 11});
    if (ws[cellRef] && ws[cellRef].v) {
      ws[cellRef].t = 'n';
      ws[cellRef].z = 'm/d/yyyy';
    }
  }
  return ws;
}



function exportSingleSci(key) {
  const group = (window._ediSciGroups||{})[key];
  if (!group||!group.lots.length) return;
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  const ws = buildEDISheet_SciGames(group);
  const safeName = group.shipment.toString().substring(0,31);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, safeName);
  const fname = 'EDI_SciGames_' + safeName + '.xlsx';
  XLSX.writeFile(wb, fname);
  saveEDIExportStamp([safeName]);
  window._ediStamps = window._ediStamps||{};
  window._ediStamps[safeName.replace(/[.#$[\]]/g,'_')] = {exportedAt:Date.now(),exportedBy:state.currentUser||''};
  showAlert('✓ Exported ' + fname, 'success');
  showEDIImportFile();
}

function exportSingleHBH(idx) {
  const load = _ediHBHLoads[idx];
  if (!load) return;
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  const ws = buildEDISheet_HBH(load);
  const safeName = load.sheetName.toString().substring(0,31);
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, safeName);
  const fname = 'EDI_HBH_' + safeName + '.xlsx';
  XLSX.writeFile(wb, fname);
  saveEDIExportStamp([safeName]);
  window._ediStamps = window._ediStamps||{};
  window._ediStamps[safeName.replace(/[.#$[\]]/g,'_')] = {exportedAt:Date.now(),exportedBy:state.currentUser||''};
  showAlert('✓ Exported ' + fname, 'success');
  showEDIImportFile();
}

function exportEDIFile() {
  const sciGroups = window._ediSciGroups || {};
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  let sheetCount = 0;
  const exportedKeys = [];

  // Sci Games selected loads
  document.querySelectorAll('.edi-sci-chk:checked').forEach(chk => {
    const key = chk.value;
    const group = sciGroups[key];
    if (!group || !group.lots.length) return;
    const ws = buildEDISheet_SciGames(group);
    const safeName = group.shipment.toString().substring(0,31);
    XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, safeName);
    exportedKeys.push(safeName);
    sheetCount++;
  });

  // HBH selected loads
  document.querySelectorAll('.edi-hbh-chk:checked').forEach(chk => {
    const idx = parseInt(chk.value);
    const load = _ediHBHLoads[idx];
    if (!load) return;
    const ws = buildEDISheet_HBH(load);
    const safeName = load.sheetName.toString().substring(0,31);
    XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, safeName);
    exportedKeys.push(safeName);
    sheetCount++;
  });

  if (!sheetCount) { showAlert('No loads selected for export.', 'warning'); return; }

  const d = new Date();
  const ts = d.getFullYear().toString().slice(2) +
    String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');
  const fname = 'EDI_Import_' + ts + '.xlsx';
  XLSX.writeFile(wb, fname);
  // Save export timestamps
  saveEDIExportStamp(exportedKeys);
  window._ediStamps = window._ediStamps || {};
  exportedKeys.forEach(k => { window._ediStamps[k.replace(/[.#$[\]]/g,'_')] = { exportedAt: Date.now(), exportedBy: state.currentUser||'' }; });
  showAlert('✓ Exported ' + sheetCount + ' load sheets to ' + fname, 'success');
  showEDIImportFile(); // refresh to show stamps
}

// ─── PENDING PUT AWAY ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function showPendingPutAway() {
  state.currentView = 'putaway';
  const PUT_AWAY_LOCS = ['23-TR', '23-RR', '23-GENERAL'];
  const inv = state.inventory.filter(r => {
    if ((r.pcsPending||0) > 0) return false;
    const loc = (r.location||'').trim().toUpperCase();
    return PUT_AWAY_LOCS.some(p => loc.startsWith(p) || loc.includes(p));
  });
  if (!inv.length) { showAlert('No pending put away inventory found in 23-TR, 23-RR, or 23-GENERAL locations.','warning'); return; }

  // Group: Customer → Date → BOL → SKU → rolls
  const grouped = {};
  inv.forEach(r => {
    const cust = r.customer||'UNKNOWN';
    const dt   = r.dateRecd ? new Date(r.dateRecd).toLocaleDateString('en-US') : 'Unknown Date';
    const bol  = r.bol||'—';
    const sku  = r.sku||'—';
    if (!grouped[cust]) grouped[cust] = {};
    if (!grouped[cust][dt]) grouped[cust][dt] = {};
    if (!grouped[cust][dt][bol]) grouped[cust][dt][bol] = {};
    if (!grouped[cust][dt][bol][sku]) grouped[cust][dt][bol][sku] = [];
    grouped[cust][dt][bol][sku].push(r);
  });

  const customers = Object.keys(grouped).sort();
  const totalTons  = inv.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);
  const totalBOLs  = new Set(inv.map(r=>r.bol).filter(Boolean)).size;

  let skuRowIdx = 0;

  let h = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
    <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px">📥 PENDING PUT AWAY</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="paToggleAll(true)">▼ Expand All</button>
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="paToggleAll(false)">▶ Collapse All</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px">
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px">CUSTOMERS</div>
      <div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">${customers.length}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px">TOTAL ROLLS</div>
      <div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--text)">${inv.length.toLocaleString()}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px">INBOUND BOLs</div>
      <div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2)">${totalBOLs.toLocaleString()}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px">TOTAL TONS</div>
      <div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--warning)">${Math.round(totalTons).toLocaleString()}</div>
    </div>
  </div>`;

  customers.forEach((cust, ci) => {
    const custData  = grouped[cust];
    const custRolls = Object.values(custData).flatMap(d=>Object.values(d).flatMap(b=>Object.values(b).flat()));
    const custTons  = custRolls.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);
    const custBOLs  = new Set(custRolls.map(r=>r.bol).filter(Boolean)).size;

    let bodyRows = '';

    Object.keys(custData).sort().forEach(dt => {
      Object.keys(custData[dt]).sort().forEach(bol => {
        Object.keys(custData[dt][bol]).sort().forEach((sku, si) => {
          const skuRolls = custData[dt][bol][sku];
          const skuTons  = skuRolls.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);
          const locs     = [...new Set(skuRolls.map(r=>r.location).filter(Boolean))].join(', ');
          const bus      = [...new Set(skuRolls.map(r=>r.bu).filter(Boolean))].join(', ');
          const rowId    = `pa-sku-${ci}-${skuRowIdx}`;
          const altBg    = skuRowIdx%2!==0;
          skuRowIdx++;

          // SKU summary row — clickable to expand lots
          bodyRows += `<tr style="background:${altBg?'var(--surface)':''}">
            <td>${dt}</td>
            <td style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">${bol}</td>
            <td style="font-size:10px">${locs}</td>
            <td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${bus}</td>
            <td style="cursor:pointer;user-select:none" onclick="paSkuToggle('${rowId}')">
              <span style="color:var(--accent);font-weight:bold">${sku}</span>
              <span id="${rowId}-chev" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--accent2);margin-left:6px">▶ ${skuRolls.length} lots</span>
            </td>
            <td style="text-align:right">${skuRolls.length}</td>
            <td style="text-align:right;font-weight:bold;color:var(--warning)">${Math.round(skuTons)}</td>
          </tr>`;

          // Sub-header row for lots (hidden by default)
          bodyRows += `<tr id="${rowId}-lot-hdr" style="display:none;background:rgba(61,92,230,0.08)">
            <td style="padding-left:28px;font-size:9px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px" colspan="4">↳ LOTS</td>
            <td style="font-size:9px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:1px;text-align:right;padding-right:12px">LOT #</td>
            <td style="font-size:9px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--text2);text-align:right">ROLLS</td>
            <td style="font-size:9px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--text2);text-align:right">TONS</td>
          </tr>`;
          // Individual lot rows (hidden by default)
          skuRolls.sort((a,b)=>(a.lot||'').localeCompare(b.lot||'')).forEach((r,ri) => {
            bodyRows += `<tr id="${rowId}-lot-${ri}" style="display:none;background:rgba(61,92,230,0.03)">
              <td colspan="4" style="padding-left:32px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)"></td>
              <td style="font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2);text-align:right;padding-right:12px">${r.lot||'—'}</td>
              <td style="text-align:right;font-size:10px">1</td>
              <td style="text-align:right;font-size:10px;color:var(--warning)">${Math.round(r.tons||0)}</td>
            </tr>`;
          });
        });
      });
    });

    // Customer subtotal
    bodyRows += `<tr style="background:var(--surface2);font-weight:bold">
      <td colspan="5" style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px">Customer Total</td>
      <td style="text-align:right;color:var(--accent2)">${custRolls.length}</td>
      <td style="text-align:right;font-weight:bold;color:var(--warning);font-size:13px">${Math.round(custTons)}</td>
    </tr>`;

    h += `<div style="margin-bottom:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden">
      <div onclick="paToggle('pa-${ci}')" style="cursor:pointer;padding:10px 14px;background:var(--surface);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;user-select:none"
           onmouseover="this.style.background='var(--surface2)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='var(--surface)'">
        <span id="pa-chev-${ci}" style="color:var(--accent);font-size:13px">▶</span>
        <span style="font-weight:bold;font-size:13px;flex:1">${cust}</span>
        <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">${custRolls.length} rolls</span>
        <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--accent2);margin-left:8px">${custBOLs} BOLs</span>
        <span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--warning);margin-left:8px">${Math.round(custTons).toLocaleString()} tons</span>
      </div>
      <div id="pa-${ci}" style="display:none;overflow-x:auto">
        <table class="data-table" style="font-size:11px;margin:0">
          <thead><tr>
            <th style="text-align:left">DATE REC'D</th>
            <th style="text-align:left">INBOUND BOL</th>
            <th style="text-align:left">LOCATION</th>
            <th style="text-align:left">BU</th>
            <th style="text-align:left">SKU (click to expand lots)</th>
            <th style="text-align:right">ROLLS</th>
            <th style="text-align:right">TONS</th>
          </tr></thead>
          <tbody>${bodyRows}</tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  });

  document.getElementById('main-panel').innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px">'+h+'</div>';
}


function paToggle(id) {
  const el=document.getElementById(id); if(!el) return;
  const idx=id.replace('pa-','');
  const chev=document.getElementById('pa-chev-'+idx);
  const open=el.style.display==='none';
  el.style.display=open?'block':'none';
  if(chev) chev.textContent=open?'▼':'▶';
}
function paSkuToggle(rowId) {
  const chev=document.getElementById(rowId+'-chev');
  const hdr=document.getElementById(rowId+'-lot-hdr');
  const lots=document.querySelectorAll('[id^="'+rowId+'-lot-"]:not([id$="-hdr"])');
  if(!lots.length) return;
  const open=lots[0].style.display==='none';
  if(hdr) hdr.style.display=open?'table-row':'none';
  lots.forEach(el=>el.style.display=open?'table-row':'none');
  if(chev){
    const count=lots.length;
    chev.textContent=open?('▼ '+count+' lots'):('▶ '+count+' lots');
    chev.style.color=open?'var(--warning)':'var(--accent2)';
  }
}
function paToggleAll(expand) {
  document.querySelectorAll('[id^="pa-"]').forEach(el=>{
    if(el.id.startsWith('pa-chev')) return;
    const idx=el.id.replace('pa-','');
    const chev=document.getElementById('pa-chev-'+idx);
    el.style.display=expand?'block':'none';
    if(chev) chev.textContent=expand?'▼':'▶';
  });
}

// ─── LAST PUT AWAY ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function showLastPutAway(filterDate='') {
  const inv = state.inventory.filter(r=>(r.pcsPending||0)===0 && (r.status||'').toUpperCase()!=='GHOST');
  if (!inv.length) { showAlert('No available inventory loaded.','warning'); return; }

  // Get unique dates for the picker
  const allDates = [...new Set(inv.map(r=>r.dateRecd?new Date(r.dateRecd).toLocaleDateString('en-US'):null).filter(Boolean))].sort((a,b)=>new Date(b)-new Date(a));

  // Use most recent date if no filter set
  const selectedDate = filterDate || allDates[0] || '';

  const filtered = selectedDate ? inv.filter(r=>{
    if (!r.dateRecd) return false;
    return new Date(r.dateRecd).toLocaleDateString('en-US') === selectedDate;
  }) : inv;

  // Group: Customer → Location
  const grouped = {};
  filtered.forEach(r => {
    const cust = r.customer||'UNKNOWN';
    const loc = r.location||'—';
    if (!grouped[cust]) grouped[cust] = {};
    if (!grouped[cust][loc]) grouped[cust][loc] = [];
    grouped[cust][loc].push(r);
  });

  const customers = Object.keys(grouped).sort();
  const totalTons = filtered.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);

  const fi = 'background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:12px;outline:none';

  let h = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
    <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px">📋 LAST PUT AWAY</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
      <select onchange="showLastPutAway(this.value)" style="${fi}">
        <option value="">All Dates</option>
        ${allDates.map(d=>`<option value="${d}"${d===selectedDate?' selected':''}>${d}</option>`).join('')}
      </select>
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="lpaToggleAll(true)">▼ Expand All</button>
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="lpaToggleAll(false)">▶ Collapse All</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px">
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px">DATE FILTER</div>
      <div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">${selectedDate||'All Dates'}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px">ROLLS</div>
      <div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--text)">${filtered.length.toLocaleString()}</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px">TOTAL TONS</div>
      <div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--warning)">${Math.round(totalTons).toLocaleString()}</div>
    </div>
  </div>`;

  if (!filtered.length) {
    h += `<div class="alert alert-info">No inventory found for the selected date.</div>`;
  } else {
    customers.forEach((cust, ci) => {
      const custData = grouped[cust];
      const custRolls = Object.values(custData).flat();
      const custTons = custRolls.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);

      h += `<div style="margin-bottom:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden">
        <div onclick="lpaToggle('lpa-${ci}')" style="cursor:pointer;padding:10px 14px;background:var(--surface);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;user-select:none"
             onmouseover="this.style.background='var(--surface2)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='var(--surface)'">
          <span id="lpa-chev-${ci}" style="color:var(--accent);font-size:13px">▶</span>
          <span style="font-weight:bold;font-size:13px;flex:1">${cust}</span>
          <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">${custRolls.length} rolls</span>
          <span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--warning);margin-left:8px">${Math.round(custTons).toLocaleString()} tons</span>
        </div>
        <div id="lpa-${ci}" style="display:none">
          <table class="data-table" style="font-size:11px;margin:0">
            <thead><tr>
              <th style="text-align:left">LOCATION</th>
              <th style="text-align:left">LOT #</th>
              <th style="text-align:right">ROLLS</th>
              <th style="text-align:right">TONS</th>
            </tr></thead>
            <tbody>`;

      Object.keys(custData).sort().forEach((loc, li) => {
        const locRolls = custData[loc];
        const lots = [...new Set(locRolls.map(r=>r.lot).filter(Boolean))];
        const locTons = locRolls.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.tons||0),0);
        h += `<tr style="background:${li%2!==0?'var(--surface)':''}">
          <td style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">${loc}</td>
          <td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${lots.slice(0,4).join(', ')}${lots.length>4?' +'+( lots.length-4)+' more':''}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right">${locRolls.length}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;font-weight:bold;color:var(--warning)">${Math.round(locTons)}</td>
        </tr>`;
      });

      h += `<tr style="background:var(--surface2);font-weight:bold">
        <td colspan="2" style="color:var(--text2)">Customer Total</td>
        <td style="text-align:right;color:var(--accent2)">${custRolls.length}</td>
        <td style="text-align:right;color:var(--warning);font-size:13px">${Math.round(custTons)}</td>
      </tr>`;
      h += `</tbody></table></div></div>`;
    });
  }

  document.getElementById('main-panel').innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px">'+h+'</div>';
}

function lpaToggle(id) {
  const el=document.getElementById(id); if(!el) return;
  const idx=id.replace('lpa-','');
  const chev=document.getElementById('lpa-chev-'+idx);
  const open=el.style.display==='none';
  el.style.display=open?'block':'none';
  if(chev) chev.textContent=open?'▼':'▶';
}
function lpaToggleAll(expand) {
  document.querySelectorAll('[id^="lpa-"]').forEach(el=>{
    if(el.id.startsWith('lpa-chev')) return;
    const idx=el.id.replace('lpa-','');
    const chev=document.getElementById('lpa-chev-'+idx);
    el.style.display=expand?'block':'none';
    if(chev) chev.textContent=expand?'▼':'▶';
  });
}


// ─── CYCLE COUNT (6021) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function saveCycleCount() {
  const entries = (window._ccEntries||[]).map(e=>({
    ...e,
    rows: e.rows.map(r=>({sku:r.sku, bu:r.bu||'', productId:r.productId||r.sku, lot:r.lot||'', skid:r.skidId||'', dateRecd:r.dateRecd?new Date(r.dateRecd).toLocaleDateString('en-US'):'', pcs:r.pcs||0}))
  }));
  const id = 'CC-'+new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit',year:'2-digit'}).replace(/\//g,'')+'-'+Date.now().toString().slice(-4);
  const session = { id, createdAt:Date.now(), status:'pending', countedBy:state.currentUser?state.currentUser.name:'Unknown', locations:window._ccLocations||[], entries, adjustments:[] };
  if (db) db.ref('cycleCount6021/'+id).set(session).catch(()=>{});
  window._ccLastSession = session;
  loadCCHistory();
  // Word export not available in PickFlow — session saved to Firebase
  showCCReport(session);
}
function showCycleCountStart() {
  state.currentView = 'cyclecount';
  const SKIP_LOCS = ['23-TR','23-RR','23-GENERAL','01-GENERAL','23-GHOST','CYC_CNT'];
  const panel = document.getElementById('main-panel');
  panel.innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px"><div style="color:var(--text2);font-size:13px">Loading cycle count data...</div></div>';

  if (!db) {
    panel.innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px"><div class="alert alert-warning">Not connected to database.</div></div>';
    return;
  }

  // Load ALL location sources in parallel: sessions history + custom location list
  Promise.all([
    db.ref('cycleCount6021').orderByChild('createdAt').once('value'),
    db.ref('locationList6021').once('value')
  ]).then(([sessionSnap, locSnap]) => {
    const data     = sessionSnap.val() || {};
    const sessions = Object.values(data).sort((a,b)=>b.createdAt-a.createdAt);

    // Build full location list from all known sources
    const locSet = new Set();

    // 1. All locations ever in inventory (any status)
    state.inventory.forEach(r => { if (r.location) locSet.add(r.location); });

    // 2. All locations ever counted in any session
    sessions.forEach(s => (s.locations||[]).forEach(l => locSet.add(l)));

    // 3. Manually added persistent locations
    const customLocsObj = locSnap.val() || {};
    Object.keys(customLocsObj).forEach(l => locSet.add(l));
    window._ccCustomLocs = new Set(Object.keys(customLocsObj));

    // 4. Auto-fill gaps using the warehouse location naming pattern (e.g. 23-XX-YY)
    //    Detect prefix + max aisle + max bay from known locations, then generate full grid
    const patternRe = /^(\d+)-(\d+)-(\d+)$/;
    const prefixGroups = {};
    [...locSet].forEach(l => {
      const m = l.match(patternRe);
      if (!m) return;
      const prefix = m[1];
      const aisle  = parseInt(m[2], 10);
      const bay    = parseInt(m[3], 10);
      if (!prefixGroups[prefix]) prefixGroups[prefix] = { maxAisle:0, maxBay:{}, globalMaxBay:0 };
      const g = prefixGroups[prefix];
      if (aisle > g.maxAisle) g.maxAisle = aisle;
      if (!g.maxBay[aisle] || bay > g.maxBay[aisle]) g.maxBay[aisle] = bay;
      if (bay > g.globalMaxBay) g.globalMaxBay = bay; // track max bay across ALL aisles
    });
    // Generate every aisle/bay combo using the global max bay so no aisle is short-changed
    Object.entries(prefixGroups).forEach(([prefix, g]) => {
      for (let a = 0; a <= g.maxAisle; a++) {
        const aisleStr = String(a).padStart(2,'0');
        const maxB = g.globalMaxBay || 0;  // use global max so sparse aisles get full range
        if (maxB === 0) continue; // no bays seen for this aisle yet — skip
        for (let b = 1; b <= maxB; b++) {
          locSet.add(prefix + '-' + aisleStr + '-' + String(b).padStart(2,'0'));
        }
      }
    });

    // Cache for tracker and other views
    window._ccHistoricLocs = [...locSet];

    // Filter skip locs
    const allLocs     = [...locSet].sort();
    const storageLocs = allLocs.filter(l => !SKIP_LOCS.some(p => l.toUpperCase().includes(p.toUpperCase())));

    // Month window
    const now        = new Date();
    const monthStart = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), 1).getTime();
    const monthEnd   = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth()+1, 0, 23,59,59).getTime();
    const monthName  = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'long',year:'numeric'});
    const todayStr   = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US',{weekday:'long',month:'long',day:'numeric',year:'numeric'});

    // Working days remaining
    function workingDaysRemaining() {
      const lastDay = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth()+1, 0).getDate();
      let count = 0;
      for (let d = now.getDate(); d <= lastDay; d++) {
        const dow = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), d).getDay();
        if (dow !== 0 && dow !== 6) count++;
      }
      return count;
    }
    const wdRemaining = workingDaysRemaining();

    // Suggested: all locs with put-away activity in the last 5 working days
    const _getWorkingDaysAgo = (n) => {
      const d = new Date(); d.setHours(0,0,0,0);
      let count = 0;
      while (count < n) {
        d.setDate(d.getDate() - 1);
        const day = d.getDay();
        if (day !== 0 && day !== 6) count++;
      }
      return d.getTime();
    };
    const fiveWorkingDaysAgo = _getWorkingDaysAgo(3);

        // Last counted date per location (across all sessions)
    const locLastCounted = {};
    sessions.forEach(s => {
      if (!s.createdAt) return;
      (s.locations||[]).forEach(loc => {
        if (!locLastCounted[loc] || s.createdAt > locLastCounted[loc])
          locLastCounted[loc] = s.createdAt;
      });
    });

    const locLastPutaway = {};
    state.inventory.forEach(r => {
      const loc = (r.location||'').toUpperCase();
      if (!r.location || SKIP_LOCS.some(p => loc.includes(p.toUpperCase()))) return;
      if ((r.pcsPending||0) > 0) return;
      if (r.dateRecd) {
        const t = r.dateRecd instanceof Date ? r.dateRecd.getTime() : new Date(r.dateRecd).getTime();
        if (isNaN(t) || t < fiveWorkingDaysAgo) return;
        if (!locLastPutaway[r.location] || t > locLastPutaway[r.location])
          locLastPutaway[r.location] = t;
      }
    });
    const _toMidnight = ts => { const d=new Date(ts); d.setHours(0,0,0,0); return d.getTime(); };
    const suggestedLocs = Object.entries(locLastPutaway)
      .sort((a,b) => {
        const dayDiff = _toMidnight(b[1]) - _toMidnight(a[1]); // most recent date first
        if (dayDiff !== 0) return dayDiff;
        return a[0].localeCompare(b[0]);                         // same day → location A→Z
      }).slice(0,15)
      .map(([loc,ts])=>({
        loc,
        date: new Date(ts).toLocaleDateString('en-US'),
        lastCounted: locLastCounted[loc]
          ? new Date(locLastCounted[loc]).toLocaleDateString('en-US')
          : null
      }));

    const fi = 'background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 12px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:13px;outline:none;width:100%';

    // Month count map
    const monthCountMap = {};
    sessions.forEach(s => {
      if (!s.createdAt||s.createdAt<monthStart||s.createdAt>monthEnd) return;
      (s.locations||[]).forEach(loc=>{ monthCountMap[loc]=(monthCountMap[loc]||0)+1; });
    });
    window._ccMonthCountMap = monthCountMap;

    // Last counted date per location (across all sessions, not just this month)
        const uncountedLocs   = storageLocs.filter(l => !monthCountMap[l]);
    const countedLocsArr  = storageLocs.filter(l =>  monthCountMap[l]);
    const pct             = storageLocs.length > 0 ? Math.round(countedLocsArr.length/storageLocs.length*100) : 0;
    const pctColor        = pct>=100?'var(--accent2)':pct>=50?'var(--warning)':'var(--danger)';
    const monthSessions   = sessions.filter(s=>s.createdAt>=monthStart&&s.createdAt<=monthEnd);
    let totalLines=0, accurateLines=0, totalAdjAdd=0, totalAdjMiss=0, totalAdjExp=0;
    monthSessions.forEach(s=>{
      const adjMap = {};
      (s.adjustments||[]).forEach(a=>{ adjMap[a.loc] = a; }); // keyed by location only

      // Accuracy is per LOCATION — a location is accurate if net adj = 0
      const sessionLocs = [...new Set((s.entries||[]).filter(e=>!e.empty&&e.sku).map(e=>e.loc))];
      sessionLocs.forEach(loc=>{
        totalLines++;
        const saved = adjMap[loc];
        const add  = saved ? (saved.adjAdd||0)  : 0;
        const miss = saved ? (saved.adjMiss||0) : 0;
        if (add === 0 && miss === 0) accurateLines++; // accurate only if no adjustments at all
        totalAdjAdd  += add;
        totalAdjMiss += miss;
      });
      // Expected rolls for count accuracy
      (s.entries||[]).forEach(e=>{
        if (e.empty) return;
        totalAdjExp += (e.expectedPlt||0);
      });
    });
    const binAcc = totalLines>0 ? Math.round(accurateLines/totalLines*100) : null;
    const cntAcc = totalAdjExp>0 ? Math.max(0,Math.round((1-(totalAdjAdd+totalAdjMiss)/totalAdjExp)*100)) : null;

    let html = `
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:18px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px">🔢 CYCLE COUNT</div>
        <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--accent2);font-weight:bold;margin-top:4px">${todayStr}</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:2px">Goal: count all locations within <strong style="color:var(--accent)">${monthName}</strong></div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="showAddLocationModal()" style="font-size:11px">+ Add Location</button>
        <button class="btn" onclick="showCCTracker()" style="font-size:11px;background:var(--surface2)">📊 Month Tracker</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Summary cards -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px">
      ${[
        {label:'TOTAL LOCATIONS', val:storageLocs.length, color:'var(--text)'},
        {label:'COUNTED', val:countedLocsArr.length, color:'var(--accent2)'},
        {label:'NOT COUNTED', val:uncountedLocs.length, color:uncountedLocs.length>0?'var(--danger)':'var(--accent2)'},
        {label:'SESSIONS', val:monthSessions.length, color:'var(--accent)'},
        {label:'BIN ACCURACY', val:binAcc!==null?binAcc+'%':'—', color:binAcc===null?'var(--text2)':binAcc>=100?'var(--accent2)':binAcc>=95?'var(--warning)':'var(--danger)'},
        {label:'COUNT ACCURACY', val:cntAcc!==null?cntAcc+'%':'—', color:cntAcc===null?'var(--text2)':cntAcc>=100?'var(--accent2)':cntAcc>=90?'var(--warning)':'var(--danger)'},
        {label:'WORK DAYS LEFT', val:wdRemaining, color:wdRemaining<=3?'var(--danger)':wdRemaining<=7?'var(--warning)':'var(--accent2)'}
      ].map(c=>`
        <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:${c.color};letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:4px;font-weight:bold">${c.label}</div>
          <div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:bold;color:${c.color}">${c.val}</div>
        </div>`).join('')}
    </div>

    <!-- Main 3-col grid -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:200px 1fr 300px;gap:14px;align-items:start">

      <!-- Suggested -->
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--warning);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:8px">⚡ SUGGESTED</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.4">Most recently put-away locations</div>`;

    if (!suggestedLocs.length) {
      html += `<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);text-align:center;padding:12px">No recent put-away data</div>`;
    } else {
      suggestedLocs.forEach(({loc, date, lastCounted}) => {
        const isCounted = monthCountMap[loc] > 0;
        html += `<div onclick="ediSuggestSelect('${loc}')" title="Click to pre-select" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 6px;margin-bottom:2px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid var(--border);background:${isCounted?'rgba(26,158,122,0.07)':'rgba(224,62,62,0.07)'}"
          onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(79,110,247,0.1)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='${isCounted?'rgba(26,158,122,0.07)':'rgba(224,62,62,0.07)'}'">
          <span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:${isCounted?'var(--accent2)':'var(--danger)'};display:inline-block;flex-shrink:0"></span>
          <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
            <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">${loc}</div>
            <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2)">Put away: ${date}</div>
            <div style="font-size:9px;color:${lastCounted?'var(--accent2)':'var(--danger)'}">Counted: ${lastCounted||'Never'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>`;
      });
    }

    html += `</div>

      <!-- Location selector -->
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:10px;font-weight:bold">
          SELECT LOCATIONS TO COUNT
          <span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:normal;margin-left:8px">${storageLocs.length} total locations (${uncountedLocs.length} not yet counted)</span>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group" style="margin-bottom:10px">
          <input type="text" id="cc-loc-search" placeholder="Filter locations..." oninput="filterCCLocs()" style="${fi}">
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="document.querySelectorAll('.cc-loc-chk').forEach(c=>c.checked=true);updateCCSelCount()">Select All</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="document.querySelectorAll('.cc-loc-chk').forEach(c=>c.checked=false);updateCCSelCount()">Clear All</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="selectUncountedOnly()" style="background:rgba(224,62,62,0.1);color:var(--danger);border-color:var(--danger)">Select Uncounted Only</button>
          <span id="cc-sel-count" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);padding:5px 8px">0 selected</span>
        </div>
        <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:10px">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px">
            <span style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--text);font-size:12px">${monthName} Progress</span>
            <span style="font-weight:bold;color:${pctColor};font-size:12px">${countedLocsArr.length} / ${storageLocs.length} &nbsp; ${pct}%
              <span style="font-size:10px;color:${wdRemaining<=3?'var(--danger)':'var(--text2)'}"> &nbsp;(${wdRemaining} work days left)</span>
            </span>
          </div>
          <div style="background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;height:8px;overflow:hidden">
            <div style="width:${pct}%;background:${pctColor};height:100%;border-radius:4px;transition:width 0.4s"></div>
          </div>
          ${(()=>{
            const remaining = storageLocs.length - countedLocsArr.length;
            if (remaining <= 0) return '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--accent2);margin-top:6px;font-weight:bold">✓ All locations counted this month!</div>';
            const perDay = wdRemaining > 0 ? Math.ceil(remaining / wdRemaining) : remaining;
            const urgColor = perDay >= 20 ? 'var(--danger)' : perDay >= 10 ? 'var(--warning)' : 'var(--accent2)';
            return '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:6px">'
              + '<span style="color:var(--text2)">To finish on time: </span>'
              + '<span style="font-weight:bold;color:'+urgColor+'">'+perDay+' location'+(perDay===1?'':'s')+' / day</span>'
              + '<span style="color:var(--text2)"> &nbsp;('+remaining+' remaining ÷ '+wdRemaining+' work day'+(wdRemaining===1?'':'s')+')</span>'
              + '</div>';
          })()}
        </div>
        <div class="cc-loc-list" id="cc-loc-list" style="max-height:340px;overflow-y:auto;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:6px">`;

    if (!storageLocs.length) {
      html += '<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--text2);padding:20px;font-size:13px">No locations found. Import inventory first.</div>';
    } else {
      storageLocs.forEach(l => {
        const avail   = state.inventory.filter(r=>r.location===l&&(r.pcsPending||0)===0).length;
        const picked  = state.inventory.filter(r=>r.location===l&&(r.pcsPending||0)>0).length;
        const mc      = monthCountMap[l]||0;
        const isSugg  = suggestedLocs.some(s=>s.loc===l);
        const isCustom= window._ccCustomLocs && window._ccCustomLocs.has(l);
        const isEmpty = avail===0 && picked===0;
        const badge   = mc>0
          ? `<span style="background:rgba(26,158,122,0.15);color:var(--accent2);border-radius:10px;padding:1px 8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:bold">✓ ${mc}x</span>`
          : `<span style="background:rgba(224,62,62,0.1);color:var(--danger);border-radius:10px;padding:1px 8px;font-size:11px">Not counted</span>`;
        const suggBorder = isSugg ? 'border-left:3px solid var(--warning);' : '';
        html += `<label class="cc-loc-item" data-counted="${mc>0}" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);${suggBorder}" onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(79,110,247,0.07)'" onmouseout="this.style.background=''">
          <input type="checkbox" class="cc-loc-chk" value="${l}" onchange="updateCCSelCount()" style="cursor:pointer;width:16px;height:16px">
          <span style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);min-width:90px">${l}</span>
          ${isSugg?`<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--warning);font-weight:bold">⚡</span>`:''}
          ${isCustom?`<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--accent);background:rgba(79,110,247,0.12);border-radius:4px;padding:1px 5px">custom</span>`:''}
          ${isEmpty
            ? `<span style="color:var(--text2);font-size:12px;font-style:italic">Empty</span>`
            : `<span style="color:var(--accent2);font-size:12px">${avail} avail</span>`}
          ${picked?`<span style="color:var(--warning);font-size:12px">${picked} picked</span>`:''}
          <span style="margin-left:auto">${badge}</span>
          ${isCustom&&isAdmin()?`<button onclick="event.preventDefault();removeCustomLocation('${l}')" style="background:none;border:none;color:var(--danger);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:0 4px;margin-left:4px" title="Remove location">✕</button>`:''}
        </label>`;
      });
    }

    html += `</div>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%;margin-top:12px;font-size:14px;padding:12px" onclick="startCycleCount()">Start Count →</button>
      </div>

      <!-- Recent counts -->
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:10px;font-weight:bold">RECENT COUNTS</div>
        <div id="cc-inline-history">`;

    const recent = sessions.slice(0,10);
    if (!recent.length) {
      html += '<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2)">No cycle counts yet.</div>';
    } else {
      html += recent.map(s=>`
        <div style="padding:9px 8px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:6px;font-size:12px">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:4px">
            <span style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer" onclick="viewCCSession('${s.id}')">${s.id}</span>
            ${isAdmin()?`<button onclick="confirmDeleteSession('${s.id}')" style="background:none;border:none;color:var(--danger);cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;padding:0">✕</button>`:''}
          </div>
          <div style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;cursor:pointer" onclick="viewCCSession('${s.id}')">${new Date(s.createdAt).toLocaleString()} · ${s.countedBy}</div>
          <div style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px">${(s.locations||[]).length} locations${s.adjustments&&s.adjustments.length?` · <span style="color:var(--accent2)">Adjusted</span>`:''}</div>
        </div>`).join('');
    }

    html += `</div></div></div>`;

    panel.innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px">' + html + '</div>';
    window._ccAllLocs = storageLocs;
    window._ccSuggestedLocs = suggestedLocs.map(s=>s.loc);
  });
}

// Show modal to pick which uncounted locations to select
function selectUncountedOnly() {
  const mm       = window._ccMonthCountMap || {};
  const allLocs  = window._ccAllLocs || [];
  const uncounted = allLocs.filter(l => !mm[l]);

  if (!uncounted.length) { showAlert('All locations have been counted this month!', 'success'); return; }

  // Build inventory summary per location
  const invByLoc = {};
  (state.inventory||[]).forEach(r => {
    if (!r.location) return;
    if (!invByLoc[r.location]) invByLoc[r.location] = {avail:0, picked:0};
    if ((r.pcsPending||0)>0) invByLoc[r.location].picked++;
    else invByLoc[r.location].avail++;
  });

  const fi = 'background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:12px;outline:none;width:100%;box-sizing:border-box';

  let rows = uncounted.map((loc, i) => {
    const inv  = invByLoc[loc] || {avail:0, picked:0};
    const desc = inv.avail ? `${inv.avail} avail` : inv.picked ? `${inv.picked} picked` : 'Empty';
    const descColor = inv.avail ? 'var(--accent2)' : inv.picked ? 'var(--warning)' : 'var(--text2)';
    return `<label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:7px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;"
      onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(79,110,247,0.06)'" onmouseout="this.style.background=''">
      <input type="checkbox" class="unc-loc-chk" value="${loc}" checked style="width:15px;height:15px;cursor:pointer;accent-color:var(--accent)">
      <span style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);min-width:90px">${loc}</span>
      <span style="font-size:11px;color:${descColor}">${desc}</span>
    </label>`;
  }).join('');

  let h = `<div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()">
    <div class="modal" style="width:480px;max-height:80vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column">
      <h2 style="margin-bottom:4px">Select Uncounted Locations</h2>
      <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:12px">${uncounted.length} locations not yet counted this month</p>
      <div style="margin-bottom:10px">
        <input type="text" placeholder="Filter..." oninput="filterUncountedModal(this.value)" style="${fi}">
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px">
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="document.querySelectorAll('.unc-loc-chk').forEach(c=>c.checked=true)">☑ All</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="document.querySelectorAll('.unc-loc-chk').forEach(c=>c.checked=false)">☐ None</button>
        <span id="unc-sel-count" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);padding:5px">${uncounted.length} selected</span>
      </div>
      <div id="unc-loc-list" style="flex:1;overflow-y:auto;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;max-height:380px">
        ${rows}
      </div>
