      <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:14px">
        <button class="btn" onclick="closeModal()">Cancel</button>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="applyUncountedSelection()">Apply Selection</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>`;

  document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', h);
  // Update count as user checks/unchecks
  document.querySelectorAll('.unc-loc-chk').forEach(c => {
    c.addEventListener('change', () => {
      const sel = document.querySelectorAll('.unc-loc-chk:checked').length;
      const el = document.getElementById('unc-sel-count');
      if (el) el.textContent = sel + ' selected';
    });
  });
}

function filterUncountedModal(query) {
  const q = query.toLowerCase();
  document.querySelectorAll('#unc-loc-list label').forEach(label => {
    const loc = label.querySelector('.unc-loc-chk')?.value || '';
    label.style.display = loc.toLowerCase().includes(q) ? '' : 'none';
  });
}

function applyUncountedSelection() {
  const selected = new Set(
    [...document.querySelectorAll('.unc-loc-chk:checked')].map(c => c.value)
  );
  // Uncheck everything in the main list first, then check selected uncounted ones
  document.querySelectorAll('.cc-loc-chk').forEach(c => {
    if (selected.has(c.value)) c.checked = true;
    // leave already-checked ones alone if not in uncounted set
  });
  updateCCSelCount();
  closeModal();
}


// Add a custom persistent location
function showAddLocationModal() {
  const fi = 'width:100%;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 12px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:14px;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;margin-top:6px';
  let h  = '<div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()">';
  h += '<div class="modal" style="width:380px">';
  h += '<h2 style="margin-bottom:12px">➕ Add Location</h2>';
  h += '<p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:14px">Add a location that should always appear in the cycle count list, even when empty.</p>';
  h += `<label style="font-size:12px;font-weight:bold">Location Name</label>
        <input id="new-loc-input" type="text" placeholder="e.g. 23-04-15" style="${fi}" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')saveCustomLocation()">`;
  h += '<div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:16px">';
  h += '<button class="btn" onclick="closeModal()">Cancel</button>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveCustomLocation()">Add Location</button>';
  h += '</div></div></div>';
  document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', h);
  setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('new-loc-input')?.focus(), 50);
}

function saveCustomLocation() {
  const val = (document.getElementById('new-loc-input')?.value||'').trim().toUpperCase();
  if (!val) { showAlert('Please enter a location name.','warning'); return; }
  if (!db)  { showAlert('Not connected.','warning'); return; }
  db.ref('locationList6021/' + val.replace(/[.#$[\]]/g,'-')).set(true)
    .then(() => {
      closeModal();
      showAlert('Location ' + val + ' added.', 'success');
      showCycleCountStart();
    })
    .catch(err => showAlert('Error: '+err.message,'danger'));
}

function removeCustomLocation(loc) {
  if (!db) return;
  const key = loc.replace(/[.#$[\]]/g,'-');
  db.ref('locationList6021/'+key).remove()
    .then(() => { showAlert('Location '+loc+' removed.','success'); showCycleCountStart(); })
    .catch(err => showAlert('Error: '+err.message,'danger'));
}



// Click a suggested location to pre-check it in the main list
function ediSuggestSelect(loc) {
  const chks = document.querySelectorAll('.cc-loc-chk');
  chks.forEach(c => { if (c.value === loc) c.checked = true; });
  updateCCSelCount();
  // Scroll the location into view
  const item = [...document.querySelectorAll('.cc-loc-item')].find(el => {
    const chk = el.querySelector('.cc-loc-chk');
    return chk && chk.value === loc;
  });
  if (item) item.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'nearest'});
}


function showCCTracker() {
  state.currentView = 'cctracker';
  const panel = document.getElementById('main-panel');
  panel.innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px"><div style="color:var(--text2)">Loading tracker...</div></div>';

  const SKIP_LOCS = ['23-TR','23-RR','23-GENERAL','01-GENERAL','23-GHOST','CYC_CNT'];
  // All locations: inventory (ever seen) + session history + custom — no capacity ref needed
  const locSet2 = new Set(window._ccHistoricLocs || []);
  state.inventory.forEach(r => { if (r.location) locSet2.add(r.location); });
  const allLocs     = [...locSet2].sort();
  const storageLocs = allLocs.filter(l => !SKIP_LOCS.some(p=>l.toUpperCase().includes(p.toUpperCase())));

  const now = new Date();
  const year  = now.getFullYear();
  const month = now.getMonth();
  const monthName = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'long',year:'numeric'});
  const monthStart = new Date(year, month, 1).getTime();
  const monthEnd   = new Date(year, month+1, 0, 23,59,59).getTime();
  const lastDay    = new Date(year, month+1, 0).getDate();
  const today      = now.getDate();

  // Working days in month & remaining
  function isWorkday(y, m, d) {
    const dow = new Date(y, m, d).getDay();
    return dow !== 0 && dow !== 6;
  }
  let totalWorkDays = 0, remainWorkDays = 0;
  for (let d = 1; d <= lastDay; d++) {
    if (isWorkday(year, month, d)) {
      totalWorkDays++;
      if (d >= today) remainWorkDays++;
    }
  }
  const passedWorkDays = totalWorkDays - remainWorkDays;

  if (!db) { panel.innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px"><div class="alert alert-warning">Not connected to database.</div></div>'; return; }

  db.ref('cycleCount6021').orderByChild('createdAt').once('value', snap => {
    const data = snap.val() || {};
    const sessions = Object.values(data).filter(s=>s.createdAt>=monthStart&&s.createdAt<=monthEnd).sort((a,b)=>a.createdAt-b.createdAt);

    // Build per-location count map: loc → array of dates counted
    const locDates = {};
    sessions.forEach(s => {
      const d = new Date(s.createdAt).getDate();
      (s.locations||[]).forEach(loc => {
        if (!locDates[loc]) locDates[loc] = new Set();
        locDates[loc].add(d);
      });
    });

    const countedLocs   = storageLocs.filter(l => locDates[l]?.size > 0);
    const uncountedLocs = storageLocs.filter(l => !locDates[l]?.size);
    const pct = storageLocs.length > 0 ? Math.round(countedLocs.length/storageLocs.length*100) : 0;
    const pctColor = pct>=100?'var(--accent2)':pct>=50?'var(--warning)':'var(--danger)';
    const wdColor  = remainWorkDays<=3?'var(--danger)':remainWorkDays<=7?'var(--warning)':'var(--accent2)';

    // Build calendar day headers
    const calDays = [];
    for (let d = 1; d <= lastDay; d++) calDays.push(d);
    const workdays = calDays.filter(d => isWorkday(year, month, d));

    let html = `
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px">📊 CYCLE COUNT TRACKER — ${monthName.toUpperCase()}</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:4px">All locations must be counted at least once this month</div>
      </div>
      <button class="btn" onclick="showCycleCountStart()" style="font-size:11px">← Back to Count</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Summary bar -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:20px">
      ${[
        {l:'TOTAL LOCATIONS', v:storageLocs.length, c:'var(--text)'},
        {l:'COUNTED', v:countedLocs.length, c:'var(--accent2)'},
        {l:'REMAINING', v:uncountedLocs.length, c:uncountedLocs.length>0?'var(--danger)':'var(--accent2)'},
        {l:'% COMPLETE', v:pct+'%', c:pctColor},
        {l:'WORK DAYS DONE', v:passedWorkDays+'/'+totalWorkDays, c:'var(--text2)'},
        {l:'WORK DAYS LEFT', v:remainWorkDays, c:wdColor}
      ].map(x=>`
        <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:${x.c};letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:4px">${x.l}</div>
          <div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:bold;color:${x.c}">${x.v}</div>
        </div>`).join('')}
    </div>

    <!-- Progress bar -->
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:12px 16px;margin-bottom:20px">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px">
        <span style="font-weight:bold;font-size:13px">${monthName} Progress</span>
        <span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2)">
          ${remainWorkDays} working day${remainWorkDays!==1?'s':''} remaining to count <strong style="color:${wdColor}">${uncountedLocs.length}</strong> location${uncountedLocs.length!==1?'s':''}
        </span>
      </div>
      <div style="background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;height:10px;overflow:hidden">
        <div style="width:${pct}%;background:${pctColor};height:100%;border-radius:4px;transition:width 0.4s"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Two-column: Not Counted | Counted ─────────────────────────────── -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px">

      <!-- NOT COUNTED -->
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:14px">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px">
          <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--danger);letter-spacing:1px">❌ NOT YET COUNTED (${uncountedLocs.length})</div>
        </div>
        ${uncountedLocs.length === 0
          ? `<div style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--accent2);font-size:13px;font-weight:bold">🎉 All locations counted!</div>`
          : `<div style="max-height:400px;overflow-y:auto">
          ${uncountedLocs.map((loc,i)=>{
            const inv = state.inventory.filter(r=>r.location===loc);
            const rolls = inv.filter(r=>(r.pcsPending||0)===0).length;
            return `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:3px;background:${i%2!==0?'var(--surface2)':'rgba(224,62,62,0.05)'}">
              <span style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px">${loc}</span>
              <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">${rolls?rolls+' rolls':'Empty'}</span>
            </div>`;
          }).join('')}
          </div>`
        }
      </div>

      <!-- COUNTED -->
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:14px">
        <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:10px">✅ COUNTED (${countedLocs.length})</div>
        ${countedLocs.length === 0
          ? `<div style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--text2);font-size:12px">No locations counted yet this month.</div>`
          : `<div style="max-height:400px;overflow-y:auto">
          ${countedLocs.map((loc,i)=>{
            const days = [...(locDates[loc]||[])].sort((a,b)=>a-b);
            const countStr = days.length>1?`${days.length}x (days ${days.join(', ')})`:(`day ${days[0]}`);
            return `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:3px;background:${i%2!==0?'var(--surface2)':'rgba(26,158,122,0.05)'}">
              <span style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px">${loc}</span>
              <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--accent2)">${countStr}</span>
            </div>`;
          }).join('')}
          </div>`
        }
      </div>
    </div>`;

    panel.innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px">' + html + '</div>';
  });
}



function renderCCLocList(locs, monthCountMap) {
  const listEl = document.getElementById('cc-loc-list');
  if (!listEl) return;
  if (!locs.length) { listEl.innerHTML='<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--text2);padding:16px">No locations found in inventory.</div>'; return; }

  listEl.innerHTML = locs.map(l => {
    const cnt = state.inventory.filter(r=>r.location===l&&(r.pcsPending||0)===0).length;
    const picked = state.inventory.filter(r=>r.location===l&&(r.pcsPending||0)>0).length;
    const monthCount = monthCountMap[l]||0;
    const countedBadge = monthCount>0
      ? `<span style="background:rgba(26,158,122,0.15);color:var(--accent2);border-radius:10px;padding:1px 8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:bold">✓ ${monthCount}x this month</span>`
      : `<span style="background:rgba(224,62,62,0.1);color:var(--danger);border-radius:10px;padding:1px 8px;font-size:11px">Not counted</span>`;
    return `<label class="cc-loc-item" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)" onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(79,110,247,0.07)'" onmouseout="this.style.background=''">
      <input type="checkbox" class="cc-loc-chk" value="${l}" onchange="updateCCSelCount()" style="cursor:pointer;width:16px;height:16px">
      <span style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);min-width:80px">${l}</span>
      <span style="color:var(--accent2);font-size:12px">${cnt} avail</span>
      ${picked?`<span style="color:var(--warning);font-size:12px">${picked} picked</span>`:''}
      <span style="margin-left:auto">${countedBadge}</span>
    </label>`;
  }).join('');
}

function updateCCSelCount() {
  const n = document.querySelectorAll('.cc-loc-chk:checked').length;
  const el = document.getElementById('cc-sel-count');
  if (el) el.textContent = n + ' selected';
}

function filterCCLocs() {
  const q = (document.getElementById('cc-loc-search')||{}).value||'';
  document.querySelectorAll('.cc-loc-chk').forEach(chk=>{
    const row = chk.closest('label');
    if (row) row.style.display = chk.value.toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase()) ? '' : 'none';
  });
}

function loadCCHistory(inline=false) {
  const targetId = inline ? 'cc-inline-history' : 'cc-history-list';
  const el = document.getElementById(targetId);
  if (!el) return;
  if (!db) { el.innerHTML='<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);padding:8px 4px">No history (offline)</div>'; return; }
  db.ref('cycleCount6021').orderByChild('createdAt').limitToLast(10).once('value', snap => {
    const data = snap.val();
    if (!data) { el.innerHTML='<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);padding:8px 4px">No cycle counts yet.</div>'; return; }
    const sessions = Object.values(data).sort((a,b)=>b.createdAt-a.createdAt);
    el.innerHTML = sessions.map(s=>`
      <div style="padding:9px 8px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:6px;font-size:12px">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:4px">
          <span style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer" onclick="viewCCSession('${s.id}')">${s.id}</span>
          ${isAdmin()?`<button onclick="confirmDeleteSession('${s.id}')" title="Delete" style="background:none;border:none;color:var(--danger);cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;padding:0">✕</button>`:''}
        </div>
        <div style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px;cursor:pointer" onclick="viewCCSession('${s.id}')">${new Date(s.createdAt).toLocaleString()} · ${s.countedBy}</div>
        <div style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px">${(s.locations||[]).length} locations${s.adjustments&&s.adjustments.length?` · <span style="color:var(--accent2)">Adjusted</span>`:''}</div>
      </div>`).join('');
  });
}

function startCycleCount() {
  const selected = [...document.querySelectorAll('.cc-loc-chk:checked')].map(c=>c.value);
  if (!selected.length) { showAlert('Select at least one location.','warning'); return; }

  // Build per-location skid detail (excluding picked)
  const locData = {};
  selected.forEach(loc => { locData[loc] = []; });
  state.inventory.forEach(r => {
    if (!selected.includes(r.location)) return;
    if ((r.pcsPending||0) > 0) return;
    locData[r.location].push(r);
  });

  // Build entries grouped by loc+sku
  const entries = [];
  selected.forEach(loc => {
    const rows = locData[loc].sort((a,b)=>(a.sku||'').localeCompare(b.sku||''));
    const skuGroups = {};
    rows.forEach(r=>{ if(!skuGroups[r.sku]) skuGroups[r.sku]={sku:r.sku,rows:[],totalPcs:0,totalPlt:0}; skuGroups[r.sku].rows.push(r); skuGroups[r.sku].totalPcs+=r.pcs||0; skuGroups[r.sku].totalPlt++; });
    if (Object.keys(skuGroups).length===0) {
      entries.push({ loc, sku:'', expectedPcs:0, expectedPlt:0, rows:[], empty:true });
    } else {
      Object.values(skuGroups).forEach(sg => entries.push({ loc, sku:sg.sku, expectedPcs:sg.totalPcs, expectedPlt:sg.totalPlt, rows:sg.rows, empty:false }));
    }
  });

  window._ccEntries = entries;
  window._ccLocations = selected;
  window._ccLocData = locData;

  // Show count sheet preview — no input needed, just confirm and save
  let html = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
    <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:2px">🔢 COUNT SHEET PREVIEW</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="showCycleCountStart()">← Back</button>
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="printCCCurrentSheet()" style="background:var(--accent2);color:#fff">🖨 Print Preview</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="saveCycleCount()">💾 Save Count</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="alert alert-info" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    Review the count sheet below. Click <strong>Save &amp; Export</strong> to save this session and download the Word document to take to the floor. You can re-open this session later to enter adjustments after the physical count.
  </div>`;

  selected.forEach(loc => {
    const locEntries = entries.filter(e=>e.loc===loc);
    const locPlt = locEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.expectedPlt||0),0);
    const locPcs = locEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.expectedPcs||0),0);

    html += `<div style="margin-bottom:20px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden">
      <div style="background:var(--surface);padding:8px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
        <span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">📍 ${loc}</span>
        <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-left:16px">${locPlt} pallets &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${locPcs.toLocaleString()} pcs</span>
      </div>
      <div style="overflow-x:auto">
      <table class="data-table" style="font-size:11px;margin:0"><thead><tr>
        <th>SKU</th><th>BU</th><th>PRODUCT ID</th><th>LOT #</th><th>SKID ID</th><th>DATE REC'D</th>
        <th style="text-align:center">ROLLS</th><th style="text-align:right">PCS</th><th>COUNT NOTES</th>
      </tr></thead><tbody>`;

    if (locEntries.length===0 || locEntries[0].empty) {
      html += '<tr><td colspan="8" style="text-align:center;color:var(--text2);font-style:italic;padding:10px">No available inventory</td></tr>';
    } else {
      locEntries.forEach(e => {
        (e.rows||[]).forEach(r => {
          html += `<tr>
            <td style="color:var(--accent);font-weight:bold">${r.sku||''}</td>
            <td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--accent2)">${r.bu||''}</td>
            <td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${r.productId||r.sku||''}</td>
            <td style="font-size:10px">${r.lot||''}</td>
            <td style="font-size:10px">${r.skidId||''}</td>
            <td style="font-size:10px">${r.dateRecd?new Date(r.dateRecd).toLocaleDateString('en-US'):''}</td>
            <td style="text-align:center">1</td>
            <td style="text-align:right">${(r.pcs||0).toLocaleString()}</td>
            <td style="color:var(--text2);font-size:10px">___________________</td>
          </tr>`;
        });
        html += `<tr style="background:var(--surface);font-weight:bold">
          <td colspan="5" style="color:var(--text2);font-size:10px">${e.sku} Total</td><td></td>
          <td style="text-align:center;color:var(--accent2)">${e.expectedPlt}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;color:var(--accent2)">${e.expectedPcs.toLocaleString()}</td><td></td>
        </tr>`;
      });
    }
    html += `<tr style="background:var(--surface2);font-weight:bold">
      <td colspan="6">Grand Total</td>
      <td style="text-align:center;color:var(--accent)">${locPlt}</td>
      <td style="text-align:right;color:var(--accent)">${locPcs.toLocaleString()}</td><td></td>
    </tr>`;
    html += '</tbody></table></div></div>';
  });

  document.getElementById('main-panel').innerHTML = html;
}

function updateVar(idx) { /* legacy — kept for compatibility */ }

function viewCCSession(id) {
  if (!db) return;
  db.ref('cycleCount6021/'+id).once('value', snap=>{ const s=snap.val(); if(s) showCCReport(s); });
}

function deleteSession(sessionId) {
  if (!db) { showAlert('Not connected.','warning'); return; }
  db.ref('cycleCount6021/' + sessionId).remove()
    .then(() => {
      closeModal();
      showAlert('Session ' + sessionId + ' deleted.', 'success');
      if (window._ccLastSession && window._ccLastSession.id === sessionId) {
        window._ccLastSession = null;
      }
      showCycleCountStart();
    })
    .catch(err => { showAlert('Error deleting session: ' + err.message, 'danger'); });
}


function toggleLocSection(id) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  if (!el) return;
  const btn = document.getElementById(id + '-btn');
  const open = el.style.display === 'none';
  el.style.display = open ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (btn) btn.textContent = open ? '▼' : '▶';
}

function toggleAllLocSections(expand) {
  document.querySelectorAll('[id^="loc-detail-"]').forEach(el => {
    const id = el.id;
    const btn = document.getElementById(id + '-btn');
    el.style.display = expand ? 'block' : 'none';
    if (btn) btn.textContent = expand ? '▼' : '▶';
  });
}

function printCCCountSheet(sessionId) {
  // Find session from Firebase then render print window
  if (!db) { showAlert('Not connected.','warning'); return; }
  db.ref('cycleCount6021/' + sessionId).once('value', snap => {
    const session = snap.val();
    if (!session) { showAlert('Session not found.','warning'); return; }
    _renderCCPrintWindow(session);
  });
}

function printCCCurrentSheet() {
  const session = window._ccLastSession;
  if (!session) { showAlert('No active session.','warning'); return; }
  _renderCCPrintWindow(session);
  // Print window opens; stay on current view
}

function _renderCCPrintWindow(session) {
  let rows = '';
  let grandTotalRolls = 0, grandTotalPcs = 0;

  session.locations.forEach((loc, locIdx) => {
    const locEntries = (session.entries||[]).filter(e => e.loc === loc);
    const locRolls = locEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.expectedPlt||0),0);
    const locPcs   = locEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.expectedPcs||0),0);
    grandTotalRolls += locRolls;
    grandTotalPcs   += locPcs;

    rows += `<div class="loc-block" style="${locIdx>0?'page-break-before:always':''}">
      <table class="loc-header-table">
        <tr>
          <td class="loc-name">📍 ${loc}</td>
          <td class="loc-summary">${locRolls} rolls &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${locPcs.toLocaleString()} pcs</td>
        </tr>
      </table>
      <table class="count-table">
        <colgroup>
          <col class="sku"><col class="bu"><col class="prodid">
          <col class="lot"><col class="chk"><col class="skid">
          <col class="daterecd"><col class="rolls"><col class="pcs"><col class="notes">
        </colgroup>
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>SKU</th>
            <th>BU</th>
            <th>PRODUCT ID</th>
            <th>LOT #</th>
            <th class="chk-hdr">✓</th>
            <th>SKID ID</th>
            <th>REC'D DATE</th>
            <th class="num">ROLLS</th>
            <th class="num">PCS</th>
            <th class="wide">COUNT NOTES</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>`;

    if (!locEntries.length || locEntries[0].empty) {
      rows += `<tr><td colspan="10" class="empty-cell">No available inventory</td></tr>`;
    } else {
      locEntries.forEach(e => {
        (e.rows||[]).forEach(r => {
          rows += `<tr>
            <td class="bold-cell">${r.sku||''}</td>
            <td class="bu-cell">${r.bu||''}</td>
            <td class="small-cell">${r.productId||r.sku||''}</td>
            <td class="small-cell">${r.lot||''}</td>
            <td class="chk-cell"><span class="checkbox"></span></td>
            <td class="small-cell">${r.skid||''}</td>
            <td class="small-cell">${r.dateRecd||''}</td>
            <td class="num">1</td>
            <td class="num">${(r.pcs||0).toLocaleString()}</td>
            <td class="notes-cell"></td>
          </tr>`;
        });
      });
    }

    rows += `<tr class="total-row">
      <td colspan="7" class="total-label">LOCATION TOTAL</td>
      <td class="num">${locRolls}</td>
      <td class="num">${locPcs.toLocaleString()}</td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>`;
    rows += `</tbody></table></div>`;
  });

  const dateStr = new Date(session.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit',year:'numeric'});

  const html = `<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>Cycle Count — ${session.id}</title>
  <style>
    @page { size: landscape; margin: 0.45in; }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt; color: #111; }
    .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end;
      border-bottom: 2px solid #333; padding-bottom: 6px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .page-header h1 { font-size: 14pt; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 1px; }
    .page-header p { font-size: 8pt; color: #555; margin-top: 2px; }
    .page-header .right { text-align: right; font-size: 8pt; }
    .loc-block { margin-bottom: 0; }
    .loc-header-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;
      background: #f0f0f0; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-bottom: none; }
    .loc-header-table td { padding: 5px 8px; }
    .loc-name { font-weight: bold; font-size: 10pt; color: #333; }
    .loc-summary { text-align: right; font-size: 8pt; color: #666; }
    .count-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;
      border: 1px solid #ccc; table-layout: fixed; }
    .count-table col.sku      { width: 82px; }
    .count-table col.bu       { width: 76px; }
    .count-table col.prodid   { width: 180px; }
    .count-table col.lot      { width: 90px; }
    .count-table col.chk      { width: 22px; }
    .count-table col.skid     { width: 68px; }
    .count-table col.daterecd { width: 60px; }
    .count-table col.rolls    { width: 36px; }
    .count-table col.pcs      { width: 36px; }
    .count-table col.notes    { width: 130px; }
    .count-table th { background: #333; color: #fff; font-size: 7.5pt;
      padding: 3px 4px; text-align: left; border: 1px solid #555; white-space: nowrap; }
    .count-table td { padding: 3px 4px; border: 1px solid #ddd;
      font-size: 7.5pt; vertical-align: middle; white-space: nowrap;
      overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
    .count-table td.notes-cell { white-space: normal; word-break: break-word; }
    .count-table th.num, .count-table td.num { text-align: right; }
    .count-table th.chk-hdr { text-align: center; }
    .chk-cell { text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; }
    .checkbox { display: inline-block; width: 12px; height: 12px;
      border: 1.5px solid #555; border-radius: 2px; }
    .notes-cell { background: #fafafa; }
    .grand-total-block { margin-top: 20px; border: 2px solid #333;
      border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 16px; background: #f9f9f9;
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
    .grand-total-block .gt-label { font-size: 11pt; font-weight: bold; color: #333; }
    .grand-total-block .gt-vals  { font-size: 12pt; font-weight: bold; color: #1a5276; }
    .signature-block { margin-top: 28px; border-top: 1px solid #ccc;
      padding-top: 16px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 24px; }
    .sig-field { font-size: 8.5pt; }
    .sig-field .sig-line  { border-bottom: 1px solid #555; height: 26px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .sig-field .sig-label { color: #666; font-size: 7.5pt; }
    @media print {
      body { -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; print-color-adjust: exact; }
    }
  </style>
  </head><body>
  <div class="page-header">
    <div>
      <h1>CYCLE COUNT — ${session.id}</h1>
      <p>Date: ${dateStr} &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${session.locations.length} locations &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${grandTotalRolls} rolls</p>
    </div>
    <div class="right">
      <strong>PICKFLOW 6021</strong><br>
      Printed: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}
    </div>
  </div>

  ${rows}

  <div class="grand-total-block">
    <div class="gt-label">GRAND TOTAL — ALL LOCATIONS</div>
    <div class="gt-vals">${grandTotalRolls} Rolls &nbsp;&nbsp; ${grandTotalPcs.toLocaleString()} Pcs</div>
  </div>

  <div class="signature-block">
    <div class="sig-field">
      <div class="sig-line"></div>
      <div class="sig-label">Counted By (Print Name)</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sig-field">
      <div class="sig-line"></div>
      <div class="sig-label">Signature</div>
    </div>
    <div class="sig-field">
      <div class="sig-line"></div>
      <div class="sig-label">Date / Time Completed</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>window.onload=function(){window.print();}<\/script>
  </body></html>`;

  const w = window.open('','_blank','width=1200,height=850');
  w.document.write(html);
  w.document.close();
}






function showCCReport(session) {
  state.currentView = 'ccreport';
  const adjs = session.adjustments||[];
  const getAdj = (loc) => adjs.find(a=>a.loc===loc);

  let totExpPlt=0, totExpPcs=0, totActPlt=0, totActPcs=0;
  session.entries.forEach(e => {
    const a = getAdj(e.loc);
    const adjAdd2 = a?(a.adjAdd||0):0, adjMiss2 = a?(a.adjMiss||0):0;
    const adjPlt = adjAdd2 - adjMiss2;
    const pcsPerPlt = e.expectedPlt>0 ? e.expectedPcs/e.expectedPlt : 0;
    totExpPlt += e.expectedPlt||0; totExpPcs += e.expectedPcs||0;
    totActPlt += (e.expectedPlt||0) + adjPlt;
    totActPcs += Math.round((e.expectedPcs||0) + adjPlt*pcsPerPlt);
  });
  const totVarPlt = totActPlt - totExpPlt;
  const hasAdj = adjs.length > 0;
  // Bin accuracy: per LOCATION — a location is accurate if net adjustment = 0
  const nonEmptyLocs = [...new Set((session.entries||[]).filter(e=>!e.empty&&e.sku).map(e=>e.loc))];
  const totalLines7   = nonEmptyLocs.length;
  const accurateLines7 = nonEmptyLocs.filter(loc => {
    const a = getAdj(loc);
    return !a || ((a.adjAdd||0) === 0 && (a.adjMiss||0) === 0); // accurate = zero adjustments entered
  }).length;
  const binAcc = totalLines7>0 ? Math.round(accurateLines7/totalLines7*100) : 100;
  const adjCount = adjs.filter(a=>(a.adjAdd||0)-(a.adjMiss||0)!==0).length;

  let html = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:1px">${session.id}</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">${new Date(session.createdAt).toLocaleString()} · By ${session.countedBy}
        ${hasAdj?` · <span style="color:var(--accent2)">✓ Adjustments entered</span>`:` · <span style="color:var(--warning)">Pending adjustments</span>`}
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="showCycleCountStart()">← Back</button>
      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="showCCCountSheetView('${session.id}')">📋 Count Sheet</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="showCCAdjustments('${session.id}')">✎ Enter Adjustments</button>
      ${isAdmin()?`<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="confirmDeleteSession('${session.id}')" style="background:rgba(224,62,62,0.1);color:var(--danger);border-color:rgba(224,62,62,0.5)">🗑 Delete Session</button>`:''}

      <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="printCCCurrentSheet()">🖨 Print</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="stats-grid" style="margin-bottom:20px">
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">LOCATIONS</div><div class="stat-value">${session.locations.length}</div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">EXPECTED PLT</div><div class="stat-value">${totExpPlt}</div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">ACTUAL ROLLS</div><div class="stat-value ${hasAdj?totVarPlt===0?'green':totVarPlt>0?'yellow':'red':''}">${hasAdj?totActPlt:'—'}</div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">VARIANCE PLT</div><div class="stat-value ${totVarPlt===0?'green':totVarPlt>0?'yellow':'red'}">${hasAdj?(totVarPlt>=0?'+':'')+totVarPlt:'—'}</div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">BIN ACCURACY</div><div class="stat-value ${binAcc>=100?'green':binAcc>=95?'yellow':'red'}">${accurateLines7}/${totalLines7}<br><span style="font-size:18px">${binAcc}%</span></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">VARIANCES</div><div class="stat-value ${adjCount>0?'yellow':'green'}">${adjCount}</div></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Expand All / Collapse All -->
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px">
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="toggleAllLocSections(true)">▼ Expand All</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="toggleAllLocSections(false)">▶ Collapse All</button>
  </div>`;

  // Per-location COLLAPSED summary rows (accordion)
  session.locations.forEach((loc, li) => {
    const locEntries = session.entries.filter(e=>e.loc===loc);
    const locExpPlt = locEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.expectedPlt||0),0);
    const locExpPcs = locEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.expectedPcs||0),0);
    const locSkus = [...new Set(locEntries.filter(e=>e.sku).map(e=>e.sku))];

    // Compute location-level adjustment totals — apply adj ONCE per location
    const locAdj    = getAdj(loc);
    const locAdjAdd  = locAdj?(locAdj.adjAdd||0):0;
    const locAdjMiss = locAdj?(locAdj.adjMiss||0):0;
    const locNetAdj  = locAdjAdd - locAdjMiss;
    const locActPlt  = locExpPlt + locNetAdj;
    const locVarPlt  = locNetAdj;  // variance IS the net adjustment
    // Bin accuracy: accurate only if NO adjustments entered at all (not just net=0)
    const locBinAcc  = (locAdjAdd === 0 && locAdjMiss === 0) ? 100 : 0;
    const varColor = locVarPlt===0?'var(--accent2)':locVarPlt>0?'var(--warning)':'var(--danger)';
    const accColor = locBinAcc>=100?'var(--accent2)':locBinAcc>=95?'var(--warning)':'var(--danger)';
    const hasLocAdj = (locAdjAdd+locAdjMiss)>0;

    // Build detail rows (hidden by default)
    let detailRows = '';
    if (!locEntries.length || locEntries[0].empty) {
      detailRows = `<tr><td colspan="${hasAdj?11:8}" style="text-align:center;color:var(--text2);font-style:italic;padding:10px">No available inventory</td></tr>`;
    } else {
      locEntries.forEach(e => {
        const a = getAdj(e.loc);
        // Adjustments are per-location only — we don't know which SKU was affected
        const adjAdd3=0, adjMiss3=0, netR=0;
        const isAccR = locNetAdj===0;   // location-level accuracy
        const actPlt = e.expectedPlt;   // show expected; adj shown in location total row
        const pcsPerPlt = e.expectedPlt>0?e.expectedPcs/e.expectedPlt:0;
        const actPcs = e.expectedPcs;
        const varPcs = 0;
        const vColor = 'var(--accent2)';
        const rowAccColor = 'var(--text2)';

        (e.rows||[]).forEach((r,ri)=>{
          detailRows += `<tr style="background:${ri%2===0?'':'var(--surface)'}">
            <td style="color:var(--accent);font-weight:bold">${r.sku||''}</td>
            <td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${r.productId||''}</td>
            <td style="font-size:10px">${r.po||''}</td>
            <td style="font-size:10px">${r.lot||''}</td>
            <td style="font-size:10px">${r.skidId||''}</td>
            <td style="text-align:center">1</td>
            <td style="text-align:right">${(r.pcs||0).toLocaleString()}</td>
            ${hasAdj?'<td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td>':'<td></td>'}
          </tr>`;
        });
        // SKU row with adjustments
        detailRows += `<tr style="background:var(--surface2);font-weight:bold">
          <td colspan="4" style="color:var(--text2);font-size:10px">${e.sku} — ${''}</td>
          <td></td>
          <td style="text-align:center;color:var(--accent2)">${e.expectedPlt}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;color:var(--accent2)">${e.expectedPcs.toLocaleString()}</td>
          ${hasAdj?`
          <td style="text-align:right;color:${netR===0?'var(--text2)':netR>0?'var(--warning)':'var(--danger)'}">${netR===0?'—':(netR>0?'+':'')+netR}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;color:var(--accent2)">${actPlt}</td>
          <td style="text-align:right;font-weight:bold;color:${vColor}">${varPcs!==0?(varPcs>0?'+':'')+varPcs.toLocaleString():'✓'}</td>
          <td style="font-size:10px;color:${rowAccColor}">${isAccR?'✓ ACCURATE':'✗ VARIANCE'}</td>`:'<td></td>'}
        </tr>`;
      });
    }

    html += `
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden">
      <!-- Collapsed header — always visible, click to expand -->
      <div onclick="toggleLocSection('loc-detail-${li}')" style="cursor:pointer;padding:10px 14px;background:var(--surface);display:grid;grid-template-columns:28px 100px 1fr auto auto auto auto auto;gap:8px;align-items:center;user-select:none"
           onmouseover="this.style.background='var(--surface2)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='var(--surface)'">
        <span id="loc-chevron-${li}" style="color:var(--accent2);font-size:13px">▶</span>
        <span style="font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);font-size:13px">${loc}</span>
        <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">${locSkus.length} SKU${locSkus.length!==1?'s':''} · ${locExpPlt} exp plt · ${locExpPcs.toLocaleString()} pcs</span>
        ${hasAdj?`
        <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:${varColor}">${locVarPlt===0?'—':(locVarPlt>0?'+':'')+locVarPlt} var</span>
        <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:${varColor}">${hasAdj?locActPlt+' act':'—'}</span>
        <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:${accColor}">${locBinAcc}% bin</span>
        <span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;background:${hasLocAdj?'rgba(240,101,101,0.12)':'rgba(26,158,122,0.12)'};color:${hasLocAdj?'var(--danger)':'var(--accent2)'}">${hasLocAdj?'✗ VARIANCE':'✓ ACCURATE'}</span>`
        :`<span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span>`}
      </div>
      <!-- Expandable detail -->
      <div id="loc-detail-${li}" style="display:none;overflow-x:auto">
        <table class="data-table" style="font-size:11px;margin:0">
          <thead><tr>
            <th>SKU</th><th>PRODUCT ID</th><th>PO #</th><th>LOT #</th><th>SKID ID</th>
            <th style="text-align:center">PLT</th><th style="text-align:right">PCS</th>
            ${hasAdj?'<th style="text-align:right;color:var(--warning)">ADJ PLT</th><th style="text-align:right;color:var(--accent2)">ACTUAL ROLLS</th><th style="text-align:right">VAR PCS</th><th>BIN ACC</th>':'<th>COUNT NOTES</th>'}
          </tr></thead>
          <tbody>${detailRows}</tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  });

  document.getElementById('main-panel').innerHTML = html;
  window._ccLastSession = session;
}

function showCCCountSheetView(sessionId) {
  state.currentView = 'ccsheet';
  const load = (session) => {
    window._ccLastSession = session;

    let html = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:1px">${session.id} — COUNT SHEET</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)">${new Date(session.createdAt).toLocaleString()} · By ${session.countedBy} · ${session.locations.length} locations</div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="showCCReport(window._ccLastSession)">← Back to Summary</button>
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="printCCCurrentSheet()" style="background:var(--accent2);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent2)">🖨 Print (Landscape)</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;

    session.locations.forEach(loc => {
      const locEntries = session.entries.filter(e=>e.loc===loc);
      const locRolls = locEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.expectedPlt||0),0);
      const locPcs   = locEntries.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.expectedPcs||0),0);

      html += `<div style="margin-bottom:20px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden">
        <div style="background:var(--surface);padding:8px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between">
          <div>
            <span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">📍 ${loc}</span>
            <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-left:12px">${locRolls} rolls · ${locPcs.toLocaleString()} pcs</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="overflow-x:auto">
        <table class="data-table" style="font-size:11px;margin:0">
          <thead><tr>
            <th>SKU</th>
            <th>BU</th>
            <th>PRODUCT ID</th>
            <th>LOT #</th>
            <th style="text-align:center">✓</th>
            <th>SKID ID</th>
            <th>REC'D DATE</th>
            <th style="text-align:center">ROLLS</th>
            <th style="text-align:right">PCS</th>
            <th>COUNT NOTES</th>
          </tr></thead>
          <tbody>`;

      if (!locEntries.length || locEntries[0].empty) {
        html += '<tr><td colspan="10" style="text-align:center;color:var(--text2);font-style:italic;padding:10px">No available inventory</td></tr>';
      } else {
        locEntries.forEach(e => {
          const rows = e.rows||[];
          if (!rows.length) {
            html += `<tr>
              <td style="color:var(--accent);font-weight:bold">${e.sku}</td>
              <td colspan="7" style="color:var(--text2);font-size:10px">No roll detail available</td>
              <td style="text-align:right">${e.expectedPcs.toLocaleString()}</td><td></td>
            </tr>`;
          } else {
            rows.forEach((r,ri) => {
              // bu and dateRecd come from saved session rows
              const bu       = r.bu || '';
              const dateRecd = r.dateRecd || '';
              html += `<tr style="background:${ri%2===0?'':'var(--surface)'}">
                <td style="color:var(--accent);font-weight:bold">${r.sku||''}</td>
                <td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--accent2);font-weight:bold">${bu}</td>
                <td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${r.productId||''}</td>
                <td style="font-size:10px">${r.lot||''}</td>
                <td style="text-align:center">☐</td>
                <td style="font-size:10px">${r.skid||''}</td>
                <td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">${dateRecd}</td>
                <td style="text-align:center">1</td>
                <td style="text-align:right">${(r.pcs||0).toLocaleString()}</td>
                <td style="color:var(--text2);font-size:10px">___________________</td>
              </tr>`;
            });
          }
        });
      }

      html += `<tr style="background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-weight:bold">
        <td colspan="7" style="padding:6px 8px">Location Total</td>
        <td style="text-align:center">${locRolls}</td>
        <td style="text-align:right">${locPcs.toLocaleString()}</td>
        <td></td>
      </tr>`;
      html += `</tbody></table></div></div>`;
    });

    document.getElementById('main-panel').innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px">' + html + '</div>';
  };

  if (db) {
    db.ref('cycleCount6021/'+sessionId).once('value', snap => {
      const s = snap.val();
      if (s) load(s);
      else showAlert('Session not found.','warning');
    });
  } else if (window._ccLastSession) {
    load(window._ccLastSession);
  }
}



function showCCAdjustments(sessionId) {
  state.currentView = 'ccadjust';
  const load = (session) => {
    const adjs   = session.adjustments || [];
    const getAdj = (loc) => adjs.find(a => a.loc === loc);

    // One row per LOCATION (not per SKU)
    const rows = [];
    session.locations.forEach(loc => {
      const entries = (session.entries||[]).filter(e => e.loc===loc);
      const expRolls = entries.reduce((s,e) => s+(e.expectedPlt||0), 0);
      const saved    = getAdj(loc) || {};
      rows.push({
        loc,
        expRolls,
        adjAdd:  saved.adjAdd  || 0,
        adjMiss: saved.adjMiss || 0,
        notes:   saved.notes   || '',
        isEmpty: entries.length === 0 || entries[0].empty
      });
    });

    const totalExp = rows.reduce((s,r) => s+(r.expRolls||0), 0);

    let html = `
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1px">✎ ENTER ADJUSTMENTS</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:4px">${session.id} &nbsp;·&nbsp; Both ADD and MISSING are positive entries</div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="showCCReport(window._ccLastSession)">← Back</button>
        <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="saveAdjustments()" style="background:var(--accent2);border-color:var(--accent2)">💾 Save Adjustments</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Info banner -->
    <div style="background:rgba(79,110,247,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(79,110,247,0.2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 14px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:14px">
      <strong style="color:var(--accent)">ADD</strong> = extra rolls found (over expected) &nbsp;·&nbsp;
      <strong style="color:var(--danger)">MISSING</strong> = rolls not found (under expected) &nbsp;·&nbsp;
      Net = Add − Missing
    </div>

    <!-- Summary bar -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px">
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:4px">EXP ROLLS</div>
        <div id="rt-exp" style="font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--text)">${totalExp}</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--accent2);letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:4px">TOTAL ADD</div>
        <div id="rt-add" style="font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2)">0</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--danger);letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:4px">TOTAL MISSING</div>
        <div id="rt-miss" style="font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--danger)">0</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text2);letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:4px">NET ADJ ROLLS</div>
        <div id="rt-net" style="font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--text)">+0</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:4px">ACTUAL ROLLS</div>
        <div id="rt-act" style="font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">${totalExp}</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--accent2);letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:2px">BIN ACCURACY</div>
        <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px"># accurate / # total</div>
        <div id="rt-acc" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2)">—</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;text-align:center">
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--accent2);letter-spacing:1px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:2px">COUNT ACCURACY</div>
        <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:4px">(1−adj/exp)×100</div>
        <div id="rt-cacc" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2)">—</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Adjustments table — one row per LOCATION -->
    <div style="overflow-x:auto">
    <table class="data-table" style="font-size:12px;border-collapse:collapse;width:100%">
      <thead>
        <tr style="background:var(--surface2)">
          <th style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:left;white-space:nowrap">LOCATION</th>
          <th style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:right;white-space:nowrap">EXP ROLLS</th>
          <th style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:center;color:var(--accent2);white-space:nowrap">ADD ↑</th>
          <th style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:center;color:var(--danger);white-space:nowrap">MISSING ↓</th>
          <th style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:right;white-space:nowrap">NET ADJ</th>
          <th style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:right;white-space:nowrap">ACTUAL ROLLS</th>
          <th style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap">BIN ACCURACY</th>
          <th style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap">COUNT ACCURACY</th>
          <th style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:left">NOTES</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody id="adj-tbody">`;

    const inputStyle = 'width:65px;text-align:center;border:1.5px solid;border-radius:5px;padding:5px 6px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:13px;outline:none;-webkit-appearance:none;-moz-appearance:textfield;appearance:none;';

    rows.forEach((r, idx) => {
      if (r.isEmpty) return;
      html += `
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
          <td style="padding:7px 10px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent);white-space:nowrap">${r.loc}</td>
          <td style="padding:7px 10px;text-align:right;font-weight:bold">${r.expRolls}</td>
          <td style="padding:7px 10px;text-align:center">
            <input id="adj-add-${idx}" type="text" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]*" value="${r.adjAdd||0}"
              oninput="updateAdjRow(${idx},${r.expRolls})"
              style="${inputStyle}background:rgba(26,158,122,0.06);border-color:var(--accent2);">
          </td>
          <td style="padding:7px 10px;text-align:center">
            <input id="adj-miss-${idx}" type="text" inputmode="numeric" pattern="[0-9]*" value="${r.adjMiss||0}"
              oninput="updateAdjRow(${idx},${r.expRolls})"
              style="${inputStyle}background:rgba(224,62,62,0.06);border-color:var(--danger);">
          </td>
          <td id="adj-net-${idx}" style="padding:7px 10px;text-align:right;font-weight:bold">—</td>
          <td id="adj-act-${idx}" style="padding:7px 10px;text-align:right;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent)">${r.expRolls}</td>
          <td id="adj-acc-${idx}" style="padding:7px 10px;text-align:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2)">✓ ACCURATE</td>
          <td id="adj-cacc-${idx}" style="padding:7px 10px;text-align:center;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2)">100%</td>
          <td style="padding:7px 10px">
            <input id="adj-notes-${idx}" type="text" value="${r.notes||''}" placeholder="Notes..."
              style="width:160px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:5px 8px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;outline:none">
          </td>
        </tr>`;
    });

    html += `
      </tbody>
      <tfoot>
        <tr style="background:var(--surface2);font-weight:bold;font-size:12px">
          <td style="padding:8px 10px">GRAND TOTAL</td>
          <td id="gt-exp"  style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:right">${totalExp}</td>
          <td id="gt-add"  style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:center;color:var(--accent2)">+0</td>
          <td id="gt-miss" style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:center;color:var(--danger)">-0</td>
          <td id="gt-net"  style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:right">+0</td>
          <td id="gt-act"  style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:right;color:var(--accent)">${totalExp}</td>
          <td id="gt-acc"  style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:center;color:var(--accent2)">100%</td>
          <td id="gt-cacc" style="padding:8px 10px;text-align:center;color:var(--accent2)">100%</td>
          <td></td>
        </tr>
      </tfoot>
    </table>
    </div>`;

    document.getElementById('main-panel').innerHTML = '<div class="panel-inner" style="padding:20px">' + html + '</div>';
    window._ccLastSession  = session;
    window._ccAdjSession   = session;
    window._ccAdjRows      = rows;
    updateAdjRow();
  };

  if (db) {
    db.ref('cycleCount6021/'+sessionId).once('value', snap => {
      const s = snap.val();
      if (s) load(s);
      else showAlert('Session not found.','warning');
    });
  } else if (window._ccLastSession) {
    load(window._ccLastSession);
  }
}





function updateAdjRow(idx, expRolls) {
  const rows = window._ccAdjRows || [];
  const dataRows = rows.filter(r => !r.isEmpty);

  let totalAdd=0, totalMiss=0, totalExp=0, totalAct=0, accurateCount=0;

  dataRows.forEach((r, i) => {
    const addEl  = document.getElementById('adj-add-'+i);
    const missEl = document.getElementById('adj-miss-'+i);
    if (!addEl || !missEl) return;

    const add  = parseInt(addEl.value)  || 0;
    const miss = parseInt(missEl.value) || 0;
    const exp  = r.expRolls || 0;
    const net  = add - miss;
    const act  = exp + net;
    const isAccurate = (net === 0);

    totalAdd  += add;
    totalMiss += miss;
    totalExp  += exp;
    totalAct  += act;
    if (isAccurate) accurateCount++;

    const countPct = exp > 0 ? Math.max(0, Math.round((1 - (add + miss)/exp)*100)) : 100;
    const netEl    = document.getElementById('adj-net-'+i);
    const actEl    = document.getElementById('adj-act-'+i);
    const accEl    = document.getElementById('adj-acc-'+i);
    const caccEl   = document.getElementById('adj-cacc-'+i);

    if (netEl)  { netEl.textContent  = (net>=0?'+':'')+net; netEl.style.color = net===0?'var(--text2)':net>0?'var(--accent2)':'var(--danger)'; }
    if (actEl)  { actEl.textContent  = act; actEl.style.color = isAccurate?'var(--accent)':act<exp?'var(--danger)':'var(--accent2)'; }
    if (accEl)  { accEl.innerHTML    = isAccurate?'<span style="color:var(--accent2)">✓ ACCURATE</span>':'<span style="color:var(--danger)">✗ VARIANCE</span>'; }
    if (caccEl) { caccEl.textContent = countPct+'%'; caccEl.style.color = countPct>=100?'var(--accent2)':countPct>=90?'var(--warning)':'var(--danger)'; }
  });

  const totalNet = totalAdd - totalMiss;
  const binPct   = dataRows.length > 0 ? Math.round(accurateCount/dataRows.length*100) : 100;
  const caccPct  = totalExp > 0 ? Math.max(0, Math.round((1 - (totalAdd + totalMiss)/totalExp)*100)) : 100;
  const caccColor= caccPct>=100?'var(--accent2)':caccPct>=90?'var(--warning)':'var(--danger)';
  const binColor = binPct>=100?'var(--accent2)':binPct>=90?'var(--warning)':'var(--danger)';

  // Summary bar
  const set = (id,val) => { const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.textContent=val; };
  const setColor = (id,c) => { const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.style.color=c; };
  set('rt-add',  totalAdd);                                          setColor('rt-add',  totalAdd>0?'var(--accent2)':'var(--text2)');
  set('rt-miss', totalMiss);                                         setColor('rt-miss', totalMiss>0?'var(--danger)':'var(--text2)');
  set('rt-net',  (totalNet>=0?'+':'')+totalNet);                     setColor('rt-net',  totalNet===0?'var(--text2)':totalNet>0?'var(--accent2)':'var(--danger)');
  set('rt-act',  totalAct);
  set('rt-acc',  accurateCount+'/'+dataRows.length+' ('+binPct+'%)'); setColor('rt-acc',  binColor);
  set('rt-cacc', caccPct+'%');                                        setColor('rt-cacc', caccColor);

  // Grand total row
  set('gt-add',  '+'+totalAdd);   setColor('gt-add',  totalAdd>0?'var(--accent2)':'var(--text2)');
  set('gt-miss', '-'+totalMiss);  setColor('gt-miss', totalMiss>0?'var(--danger)':'var(--text2)');
  set('gt-net',  (totalNet>=0?'+':'')+totalNet); setColor('gt-net', totalNet===0?'var(--text2)':totalNet>0?'var(--accent2)':'var(--danger)');
  set('gt-act',  totalAct);       setColor('gt-act',  'var(--accent)');
  set('gt-acc',  binPct+'%');     setColor('gt-acc',  binColor);
  set('gt-cacc', caccPct+'%');    setColor('gt-cacc', caccColor);
}

// Save adjustments to Firebase
function saveAdjustments() {
  const session = window._ccAdjSession;
  if (!session || !db) { showAlert('Nothing to save.','warning'); return; }

  const rows    = (window._ccAdjRows||[]).filter(r=>!r.isEmpty);
  const adjustments = rows.map((r, i) => {
    const add   = parseInt(document.getElementById('adj-add-'+i)?.value)  || 0;
    const miss  = parseInt(document.getElementById('adj-miss-'+i)?.value) || 0;
    const notes = document.getElementById('adj-notes-'+i)?.value || '';
    return { loc:r.loc, adjAdd:add, adjMiss:miss, notes };
  }).filter(a => a.adjAdd||a.adjMiss||a.notes);

  db.ref('cycleCount6021/'+session.id+'/adjustments').set(adjustments)
    .then(() => {
      showAlert('✓ Adjustments saved.','success');
      session.adjustments = adjustments;
      window._ccLastSession = session;
    })
    .catch(err => showAlert('Error: '+err.message,'danger'));
}



function confirmDeleteSession(sessionId) {
  let h = '<div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()">';
  h += '<div class="modal" style="width:380px;text-align:center">';
  h += '<h2 style="color:var(--danger)">Delete Count Session</h2>';
  h += '<p style="margin:16px 0;font-size:14px">Delete session <strong style="color:var(--accent)">'+sessionId+'</strong>?<br>';
  h += '<span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text2)">This will remove the count data and reset all totals for this session. This cannot be undone.</span></p>';
  h += '<div class="modal-actions">';
  h += '<button class="btn" onclick="closeModal()">Cancel</button>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-danger" data-sid="'+sessionId+'" onclick="deleteSession(this.dataset.sid)">Delete Session</button>';
  h += '</div></div></div>';
  document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML = h;
}

function showDataPreview() {
  state.currentView = 'preview';
  state.activeTicket=null; updateTicketList();
  window.invFilters={sku:'',loc:'',cust:'',bu:'',lot:''};
  const customers=[...new Set(state.inventory.map(r=>r.customer))].sort();
  const skus=[...new Set(state.inventory.map(r=>r.sku))].sort();

  window.switchTab=(tab,page=0)=>{
    const tabs=[['inventory','Raw Inventory'],['dir','DIR Data']];
    document.getElementById('ptabs').innerHTML=tabs.map(t=>{
      const active = t[0]===tab;
      return '<button data-tab="'+t[0]+'" onclick="window.switchTab(this.dataset.tab)" style="padding:7px 14px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid '+(active?'var(--accent)':'var(--border)')+';background:'+(active?'rgba(26,82,118,0.1)':'var(--surface2)')+';color:'+(active?'var(--accent)':'var(--text2)')+';cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px">'+t[1]+'</button>';
    }).join('');

    if (tab==='inventory') {
      // Only build filter inputs once; update table separately to preserve focus
      if (!document.getElementById('inv-filter-bar')) {
        document.getElementById('pcontent').innerHTML = `
          <div id="inv-filter-bar" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr auto;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;align-items:flex-end">
            <div class="form-group"><label>FILTER CUSTOMER</label><input type="text" id="f-cust" placeholder="Customer..." oninput="applyInvFilter()" style="background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;outline:none;width:100%"></div>
            <div class="form-group"><label>FILTER BU</label><select id="f-bu" onchange="applyInvFilter()" style="background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;outline:none;width:100%"><option value="">All BUs...</option></select></div>
            <div class="form-group"><label>FILTER SKU</label><input type="text" id="f-sku" placeholder="SKU..." oninput="applyInvFilter()" style="background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;outline:none;width:100%"></div>
            <div class="form-group"><label>FILTER LOCATION</label><input type="text" id="f-loc" placeholder="Location..." oninput="applyInvFilter()" style="background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;outline:none;width:100%"></div>
            <div class="form-group"><label>FILTER LOT #</label><input type="text" id="f-lot" placeholder="Lot #..." oninput="applyInvFilter()" style="background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;outline:none;width:100%"></div>
            <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="clearInvFilters()">✕ Clear</button>
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="exportInvToExcel()" style="white-space:nowrap">&#11123; Export Excel</button>
          </div>
          <div id="inv-table-wrap"></div>`;
      }
      applyInvFilter(page);
    } else {

      const dirTsStr = state.lastDirImport
        ? '✓ Last DIR Import: ' + new Date(state.lastDirImport).toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit',year:'numeric'}) + ' ' + new Date(state.lastDirImport).toLocaleTimeString('en-US',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})
        : 'No DIR imported yet';
      const zmoCount2 = Object.values(state.dirData).filter(d=>d.zmo).length;
      const finp = 'background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:6px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:11px;outline:none;width:100%';

      // Build or preserve filter bar
      if (!document.getElementById('dir-filter-bar')) {
        document.getElementById('pcontent').innerHTML =
          '<div id="dir-filter-bar" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr auto;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;align-items:flex-end">' +
          '<div class="form-group"><label>FILTER BATCH / LOT #</label><input type="text" id="df-lot" placeholder="Batch or Lot #..." oninput="applyDirFilter()" style="'+finp+'"></div>' +
          '<div class="form-group"><label>FILTER SKU (MATERIAL)</label><input type="text" id="df-sku" placeholder="Material / SKU..." oninput="applyDirFilter()" style="'+finp+'"></div>' +
          '<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="clearDirFilter()">&#x2715; Clear</button>' +
          '<button class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="exportDirToExcel()" style="white-space:nowrap">&#11123; Export Excel</button>' +
          '</div>' +
          '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:10px;padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(26,122,74,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(26,122,74,0.2);border-radius:6px">' +
          '<span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;color:var(--accent2)">'+dirTsStr+'</span>' +
          '<span id="dir-record-count" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2)"></span>' +
          '</div>' +
          '<div id="dir-table-wrap"></div>';
      }
      applyDirFilter();
    }
  };

  document.getElementById('main-panel').innerHTML=`
    <div class="panel">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:20px">
        <div class="section-title" style="margin:0;border:none">DATA PREVIEW</div>
        <button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="showDashboard()">← Back</button>
      </div>
      <div class="stats-grid" style="margin-bottom:20px">
        <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Total Rolls</div><div class="stat-value">${state.inventory.length.toLocaleString()}</div></div>
        <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Customers</div><div class="stat-value green">${[...new Set(state.inventory.map(r=>r.customer))].length}</div></div>
        <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Locations</div><div class="stat-value">${[...new Set(state.inventory.map(r=>r.location))].length}</div></div>
        <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">DIR Records</div><div class="stat-value orange">${Object.keys(state.dirData).length}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div id="ptabs" style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px"></div>
      <div id="pcontent"></div>
    </div>`;
  window.switchTab('inventory');
}

// ─── ARCHIVE SETTINGS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function showArchiveSettings() {
  const eastern = new Date(new Date().toLocaleString('en-US',{timeZone:'America/New_York'}));
  document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML=`
    <div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()">
      <div class="modal">
        <h2>📁 ARCHIVE SETTINGS</h2>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:12px">Current Eastern Time: <span style="color:var(--accent)">${eastern.toLocaleTimeString('en-US',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})} ${new Date().getTimezoneOffset()<300?'EDT':'EST'}</span></div>
        <div class="form-group" style="margin-bottom:12px"><label>EOD AUTO-ARCHIVE TIME</label><input type="time" id="eod-time" value="${state.eodTime}"></div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px">
          <input type="checkbox" id="eod-enabled" ${state.eodEnabled?'checked':''}>
          <label for="eod-enabled" style="font-size:12px;cursor:pointer">Enable EOD auto-archive</label>
        </div>
        <button class="btn btn-danger" onclick="if(confirm('Archive ALL open tickets?'))archiveAll()" style="width:100%;margin-bottom:12px">📁 Archive All Open Tickets Now</button>
        <div class="modal-actions">
          <button class="btn" onclick="closeModal()">Cancel</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveEodSettings()">Save</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
}

function saveEodSettings() {
  state.eodTime=document.getElementById('eod-time').value;
  state.eodEnabled=document.getElementById('eod-enabled').checked;
  closeModal(); saveSettings(); setupEodTimer();
  showAlert('✓ Settings saved.','success');
}

function archiveAll(silent=false) {
  if (!isAdmin()) return;
  const count=state.tickets.length;
  state.tickets.forEach(t=>{ t.archivedAt=Date.now(); t.archivedBy=state.currentUser?state.currentUser.name:'EOD Auto'; state.archivedTickets.push(t); });
  state.tickets=[];
  state.activeTicket=null;
  const cutoff=Date.now()-(90*24*60*60*1000);
  state.archivedTickets=state.archivedTickets.filter(t=>t.archivedAt>cutoff);
  saveTickets(); saveArchive(); updateTicketList(); showDashboard();
  if (!silent) showAlert(`✓ ${count} tickets archived.`,'success');
}

// ─── EOD TIMER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let eodFired=false;
function getEasternTime() { return new Date(new Date().toLocaleString('en-US',{timeZone:'America/New_York'})); }
function setupEodTimer() {
  if (eodTimer) clearInterval(eodTimer); eodFired=false;
  eodTimer=setInterval(()=>{
    if (!state.eodEnabled||!state.currentUser) return;
    const et=getEasternTime();
    const [h,m]=state.eodTime.split(':').map(Number);
    if (et.getHours()===h&&et.getMinutes()===m&&et.getSeconds()<59&&!eodFired) {
      eodFired=true;
      db.ref('6021/eodLock/'+et.toLocaleDateString().replace(/\//g,'-')+'_'+state.eodTime.replace(':','-')).transaction(cur=>{
        if (cur===null) return true;
      }).then(r=>{ if (r.committed) { archiveAll(true); showAlert('EOD: Tickets auto-archived.','success'); } }).catch(()=>{});
    }
    if (!(et.getHours()===h&&et.getMinutes()===m)) eodFired=false;
  },10000);
}

// ─── UTILS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function closeModal() {
  document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML = '';
  document.querySelectorAll('.modal-overlay').forEach(el => el.remove());
}

function showAlert(msg,type) {
  const d=document.createElement('div');
  d.className='alert alert-'+type;
  d.style.cssText=[
    'position:fixed',
    'top:50%',
    'left:50%',
    'transform:translate(-50%,-50%)',
    'z-index:9999',
    'min-width:360px',
    'max-width:620px',
    'padding:22px 32px',
    'text-align:center',
    'font-size:17px',
    'font-weight:bold',
    'letter-spacing:0.3px',
    'box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)',
    'border-radius:10px',
    'border-width:2px'
  ].join(';');
  d.textContent=msg;
  document.body.appendChild(d);
  setTimeout(()=>d.remove(),4000);
}


// ─── USER MANAGEMENT ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function showUserManagement() {
  const users = state.users.length ? state.users : USERS;
  let h = '<div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()">';
  h += '<div class="modal" style="width:680px;max-width:97vw">';
  h += '<h2>&#128101; Manage Users</h2>';

  // User list
  h += '<div style="margin-bottom:16px">';
  h += '<table class="data-table" style="font-size:12px"><thead><tr><th>NAME</th><th>ROLE</th><th>PASSWORD</th><th style="text-align:center">ACTIONS</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
  users.forEach(u => {
    const isSelf = state.currentUser && u.id === state.currentUser.id;
    const roleColor = u.role==='admin' ? 'var(--warning)' : 'var(--accent2)';
    h += '<tr>';
    h += '<td style="font-weight:bold">'+u.name+(isSelf?' <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text2)">(you)</span>':'')+'</td>';
    h += '<td><span style="font-weight:bold;color:'+roleColor+'">'+u.role.toUpperCase()+'</span></td>';
    h += '<td style="color:var(--text2);font-size:11px">'+(u.password ? '&#9679;&#9679;&#9679;&#9679;&#9679;&#9679;' : '<em>No password</em>')+'</td>';
    h += '<td style="text-align:center;white-space:nowrap">';
    h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" data-uid="'+u.id+'" onclick="editUserModal(this.dataset.uid)" style="margin-right:4px">&#9998; Edit</button>';
    if (!isSelf) h += '<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" data-uid="'+u.id+'" onclick="deleteUserConfirm(this.dataset.uid)">&#x2715; Delete</button>';
    h += '</td></tr>';
  });
  h += '</tbody></table></div>';

  // Add new users — multi-row
  const fi = 'background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;outline:none;width:100%';
  h += '<div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:14px">';
  h += '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px">';
  h += '<div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text2)">ADD NEW USERS</div>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-sm" onclick="addUserRow()">+ Add Row</button>';
  h += '</div>';
  h += '<div id="new-users-rows">';
  // One blank row to start
  h += '<div class="nu-row" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr auto;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;align-items:center">';
  h += '<input type="text" class="nu-name" placeholder="Full Name" style="'+fi+'">';
  h += '<select class="nu-role" style="'+fi+'"><option value="user">User</option><option value="admin">Admin</option></select>';
  h += '<input type="text" class="nu-pwd" placeholder="Password (optional)" style="'+fi+'">';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" data-remove="1" onclick="this.parentElement.remove()">&#x2715;</button>';
  h += '</div></div>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveAllNewUsers()" style="width:100%;margin-top:8px">Save All New Users</button>';
  h += '</div>';

  h += '<div class="modal-actions"><button class="btn" onclick="closeModal()">Close</button></div>';
  h += '</div></div>';
  document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML = h;
}

function editUserModal(uid) {
  const users = state.users.length ? state.users : USERS;
  const u = users.find(x=>x.id===uid);
  if (!u) return;
  const isSelf = state.currentUser && uid === state.currentUser.id;
  const fi = 'background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;outline:none;width:100%';
  let h = '<div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()">';
  h += '<div class="modal" style="width:420px">';
  h += '<h2>&#9998; Edit User — '+u.name+'</h2>';
  h += '<div class="form-group"><label>ROLE</label>';
  h += '<select id="eu-role" style="'+fi+'"'+(isSelf?' disabled title="Cannot change your own role"':'')+'>'; 
  h += '<option value="user"'+(u.role==='user'?' selected':'')+'>User</option>';
  h += '<option value="admin"'+(u.role==='admin'?' selected':'')+'>Admin</option>';
  h += '</select></div>';
  h += '<div class="form-group"><label>NEW PASSWORD <span style="font-weight:normal;font-size:10px">(leave blank to keep current / clear for no password)</span></label>';
  h += '<input type="text" id="eu-pwd" placeholder="Enter new password or leave blank..." style="'+fi+'"></div>';
  h += '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);margin-top:6px">Current: '+(u.password?'Password set':'<em>No password</em>')+'</div>';
  h += '<div class="modal-actions">';
  h += '<button class="btn" onclick="showUserManagement()">&#8592; Back</button>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-danger" data-uid="'+uid+'" onclick="clearUserPassword(this.dataset.uid)">Clear Password</button>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-primary" data-uid="'+uid+'" onclick="saveUserEdit(this.dataset.uid)">Save Changes</button>';
  h += '</div></div></div>';
  document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML = h;
}

function addUserRow() {
  const fi = 'background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;padding:7px 10px;color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font);font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;outline:none;width:100%';
  const container = document.getElementById('new-users-rows');
  if (!container) return;
  const row = document.createElement('div');
  row.className = 'nu-row';
  row.style.cssText = 'display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr auto;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;align-items:center';
  row.innerHTML =
    '<input type="text" class="nu-name" placeholder="Full Name" style="'+fi+'">' +
    '<select class="nu-role" style="'+fi+'"><option value="user">User</option><option value="admin">Admin</option></select>' +
    '<input type="text" class="nu-pwd" placeholder="Password (optional)" style="'+fi+'">' +
    '<button class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="this.parentElement.remove()">&#x2715;</button>';
  container.appendChild(row);
}

function saveAllNewUsers() {
  const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.nu-row');
  if (!rows.length) { showAlert('No users to add.','warning'); return; }
  const toAdd = [];
  let hasError = false;
  rows.forEach(row => {
    const name = (row.querySelector('.nu-name').value||'').trim();
    const role = row.querySelector('.nu-role').value;
    const pwd  = (row.querySelector('.nu-pwd').value||'').trim();
    if (!name) { hasError = true; return; }
    const id = name.replace(/\s+/g,'').substring(0,12)+'_'+Date.now().toString().slice(-4)+(Math.random()*100|0);
    toAdd.push({ id, name, password: pwd||null, role });
  });
  if (hasError) { showAlert('Please fill in all name fields.','warning'); return; }
  if (!toAdd.length) { showAlert('No valid users to add.','warning'); return; }
  if (!db) { showAlert('No database connection.','danger'); return; }
  const updates = {};
  toAdd.forEach(u=>{ updates['6021/users/'+u.id]={ name:u.name, password:u.password, role:u.role }; });
  db.ref().update(updates)
    .then(()=>{ showAlert('✓ '+toAdd.length+' user'+(toAdd.length>1?'s':'')+' added.','success'); showUserManagement(); })
    .catch(e=>showAlert('Error: '+e.message,'danger'));
}

function saveUserEdit(uid) {
  const users = state.users.length ? state.users : USERS;
  const u = users.find(x=>x.id===uid);
  if (!u) return;
  const isSelf = state.currentUser && uid === state.currentUser.id;
  const newRole = isSelf ? u.role : document.getElementById('eu-role').value;
  const newPwdField = (document.getElementById('eu-pwd').value||'').trim();
  const newPwd = newPwdField==='' ? u.password : (newPwdField||null);
  const pwdChanged = newPwdField !== '';

  // Show confirmation if password is being changed
  if (pwdChanged) {
    const msg = newPwd
      ? 'Set password to "' + newPwd + '" for ' + u.name + '?'
      : 'Clear password for ' + u.name + '? They will log in with no password.';
    let h = '<div class="modal-overlay">';
    h += '<div class="modal" style="width:380px;text-align:center">';
    h += '<h2>Confirm Password Change</h2>';
    h += '<p style="margin:16px 0;font-size:14px">'+msg+'</p>';
    h += '<div class="modal-actions">';
    h += '<button class="btn" data-uid="'+uid+'" onclick="editUserModal(this.dataset.uid)">&#8592; Back</button>';
    h += '<button class="btn btn-primary" data-uid="'+uid+'" data-role="'+newRole+'" data-pwd="'+(newPwd||'__null__')+'" onclick="confirmSaveUser(this.dataset.uid,this.dataset.role,this.dataset.pwd)">Yes, Save</button>';
    h += '</div></div></div>';
    document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML = h;
  } else {
    // No password change — just save role
    db.ref('6021/users/'+uid).update({ role:newRole })
      .then(()=>{ showAlert('✓ User updated.','success'); showUserManagement(); })
      .catch(e=>showAlert('Error: '+e.message,'danger'));
  }
}

function confirmSaveUser(uid, role, pwdRaw) {
  const pwd = pwdRaw === '__null__' ? null : pwdRaw;
  db.ref('6021/users/'+uid).update({ role, password: pwd })
    .then(()=>{ showAlert('✓ Password saved successfully.','success'); showUserManagement(); })
    .catch(e=>showAlert('Error saving: '+e.message,'danger'));
}

function clearUserPassword(uid) {
  db.ref('6021/users/'+uid).update({ password:null })
    .then(()=>{ showAlert('✓ Password cleared.','success'); showUserManagement(); })
    .catch(e=>showAlert('Error: '+e.message,'danger'));
}

function deleteUserConfirm(uid) {
  const users = state.users.length ? state.users : USERS;
  const u = users.find(x=>x.id===uid);
  if (!u) return;
  let h = '<div class="modal-overlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeModal()">';
