  h += '<div class="modal" style="width:380px;text-align:center">';
  h += '<h2 style="color:var(--danger)">&#x2715; Delete User</h2>';
  h += '<p style="margin:16px 0;font-size:14px">Are you sure you want to delete <strong>'+u.name+'</strong>? This cannot be undone.</p>';
  h += '<div class="modal-actions">';
  h += '<button class="btn" onclick="showUserManagement()">Cancel</button>';
  h += '<button class="btn btn-danger" data-uid="'+uid+'" onclick="deleteUser(this.dataset.uid)">Delete User</button>';
  h += '</div></div></div>';
  document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML = h;
}

function deleteUser(uid) {
  db.ref('6021/users/'+uid).remove()
    .then(()=>{ showAlert('✓ User deleted.','success'); closeModal(); })
    .catch(e=>showAlert('Error: '+e.message,'danger'));
}


// ─── EXPORT TO EXCEL ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function exportInvToExcel() {
  // Use currently filtered inventory (respects all active filters)
  const cust = (document.getElementById('f-cust')||{}).value||'';
  const bu   = (document.getElementById('f-bu')||{}).value||'';
  const sku  = (document.getElementById('f-sku')||{}).value||'';
  const loc  = (document.getElementById('f-loc')||{}).value||'';
  const lot  = (document.getElementById('f-lot')||{}).value||'';
  let rows = state.inventory;
  if (cust) rows = rows.filter(r=>r.customer.toLowerCase().includes(cust.toLowerCase()));
  if (bu)   rows = rows.filter(r=>(r.bu||'').toLowerCase()===bu.toLowerCase());
  if (sku)  rows = rows.filter(r=>(r.sku||'').toLowerCase().includes(sku.toLowerCase()));
  if (loc)  rows = rows.filter(r=>(r.location||'').toLowerCase().includes(loc.toLowerCase()));
  if (lot)  rows = rows.filter(r=>(r.lot||'').toLowerCase().includes(lot.toLowerCase()));

  const data = [['CUSTOMER','BU','SKU','LOT #','SKID ID','PRODUCT ID','PROD ID 2','LOCATION','DATE RECD','EXP DATE','ZMO','STATUS','PCS PENDING','WEIGHT']];
  rows.forEach(r => {
    const expD = r.dirExpDate||r.expDate;
    const isPicked = (r.pcsPending||0)>0;
    data.push([
      r.customer||'', r.bu||'', r.sku||'', r.lot||'', r.skidId||'',
      r.productId||'', r.prod2||'', r.location||'',
      r.dateRecd ? new Date(r.dateRecd).toLocaleDateString() : '',
      expD ? new Date(expD).toLocaleDateString() : '',
      r.zmo||'',
      isPicked ? 'PICKED' : (r.status||''),
      r.pcsPending||0, r.grossWt||0
    ]);
  });
  const ws = XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet(data);
  ws['!cols'] = data[0].map(()=>({wch:18}));
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, 'Raw Inventory');
  XLSX.writeFile(wb, 'PickFlow_6021_Inventory_'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+'.xlsx');
  showAlert('✓ Inventory exported to Excel.','success');
}

function exportDirToExcel() {
  const lotF = (document.getElementById('df-lot')||{}).value||'';
  const skuF = (document.getElementById('df-sku')||{}).value||'';
  const lotQ = lotF.trim().toUpperCase();
  const skuQ = skuF.trim().toUpperCase();
  let entries = Object.entries(state.dirData||{});
  if (lotQ) entries = entries.filter(([b])=>b.toUpperCase().includes(lotQ));
  if (skuQ) entries = entries.filter(([,d])=>(d.material||'').toUpperCase().includes(skuQ)||(d.matDesc||'').toUpperCase().includes(skuQ));

  const data = [['BATCH / LOT #','MATERIAL #','MATERIAL DESC','DOC TYPE','ZMO','CUSTOMER PO','MFG DATE','CUSTOMER']];
  entries.forEach(([batch,d])=>{
    const dZmo = d.zmo||(d.soDoc?d.soDoc+(d.soItem?'-'+d.soItem:''):'');
    data.push([batch, d.material||'', d.matDesc||'', d.docType||'', dZmo||'', d.customerPO||'', d.mfgDate||'', d.customerName||'']);
  });
  const ws = XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet(data);
  ws['!cols'] = data[0].map(()=>({wch:20}));
  const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
  XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, 'DIR Data');
  XLSX.writeFile(wb, 'PickFlow_6021_DIR_'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+'.xlsx');
  showAlert('✓ DIR data exported to Excel.','success');
}

// ─── INIT ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

window.addEventListener('load', function() {
  buildLoginScreen();
  localStorage.removeItem('pickflow_state');
  listenToFirebase();
});

</script>
</body>
</html>
